clean_body: Vote. Serve. Pray. | | | November 06, 2024 | | | Woo-Hoo and Congratulations! Yesterday, 2 Chronicles 7:14 was made manifest. The voice of America was heard loud and clear, and today, our future shines brighter than it has in a long, long time. To God be the Glory. Over these past few weeks, the True the Vote team has been firing on all cylinders — assisting thousands of voters, election workers, and grassroots organizations through VoteAlert; keeping watch over drop boxes and tabulation centers in key battleground states like Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin; and rapidly deploying legal counsel, law enforcement, and other support across the country. Did we face challenges? Yes. Did we record fraud? Yes. But despite the hurdles, we’re proud of the way things were handled—on the fly, efficiently, with unwavering commitment to upholding election integrity. And while some issues are still under review, the bigger story is the victory of what didn’thappen. Efforts to clean voter rolls, monitor dropboxes, train and support election workers, educate and support voters (with multilingual resources), and advocate for common-sense reforms, all came together in a powerful and effective way. Voters showed up, united. And bad actors were effectively stopped in their tracks. | | It’s been a long road, but now it feels like we’re stepping into a new morning for America—a morning full of hope and promise. To everyone who served, prayed, supported, or shared this mission—thank you. To all the other organizations who worked tirelessly, right alongside us—thank you. All of us, shields linked, made a difference at the ballot box. So, what’s next? Well, the dust hasn’t fully settled from this election yet. There are still several House and Senate races that are too close to call, and some that may require recounts. Our focus remains on these areas, but we’re also looking ahead to what comes next in the 2024 election cycle. Here’s a breakdown of the critical milestones still to come: Certificate of Ascertainment of Appointment of Electors: Deadline December 11, 2024 In every presidential election year, each state’s executive (governor or secretary of state) issues a Certificate of Ascertainment —a document that officially names the electors who will cast the state's electoral votes for president and vice president. While this process was contentious in 2020, we hope that 2024 will see it carried out smoothly and without issues. What’s included in the Certificate of Ascertainment? Names of electors who are appointed to cast votes. The state’s certified election results (the "canvass") showing the total number of votes cast and how they were distributed among presidential candidates. The seal of the state , verifying the authenticity of the certificate. A security feature to prevent fraud and verify the certificate’s legitimacy. Meeting and Vote of Electors: December 17, 2024 On December 17, 2024 —the first Tuesday after the second Wednesday in December—electors will meet in their respective states to cast their official votes for president and vice president. This is a key safeguard to ensure electors vote according to the certified results of the election. During this meeting, electors must: Cast their votes for president and vice president. Sign multiple certificates affirming their votes. Transmit these certificates to Washington, DC, and state officials. These protocols ensure that the electors’ votes are legitimate, transparent, and in line with the outcome of their state’s election. Deadline for Electoral Votes to Be Received: December 25, 2024 By December 25, 2024 , all states must submit their electoral certificates to Washington, DC. If any certificates are not received by this deadline, the President of the Senate or the Archivist of the United States will request that the state’s chief election officer submit the missing certificate. This step ensures that every electoral vote is accounted for and that the process remains transparent and timely. The 119th Congress Convenes: January 3, 2025 On January 3, 2025 , the 119th Congress will convene, and newly elected members will be sworn in. One of the first tasks in the House of Representatives will be the election of the Speaker of the House , which sets the stage for the important business ahead—including certifying the electoral votes. Congress Counts Electoral Votes: January 6, 2025 On January 6, 2025 , Congress will meet in a joint session at 1:00 p.m. to officially count and certify the electoral votes. The President of the Senate will preside, but their role is purely ministerial —they have no authority to unilaterally accept, reject, or alter the certified results of the electors. If any objections are raised, they must be filed by both a member of the House and Senate , and they will be debated and voted upon according to established procedures. This process ensures that every electoral vote is thoroughly scrutinized and that the final result reflects the true will of the American people. Inauguration Day: January 20, 2025 The newly elected president and vice president will take their oaths of office at 12:00 p.m. on January 20, 2025 , marking the peaceful transition of power and reaffirming the strength of our democracy. Looking Ahead In addition to monitoring these milestones, our team will continue reviewing reports filed with us over these last few weeks, and preparing for advocacy opportunities in 2025, including reforms like photo voter ID, secure paper ballots, and accurate voter rolls! We’ll continue to keep you apprised of our efforts, as we move forward with great optimism for America’s future. On November 5, 2024, 2 Chronicles 7:14 was made manifest. To God be the Glory.** Ever onward— | P.S. Just in case you’re wondering, we are also looking forward to having an honest conversation about what happened in 2020, not to relitigate it, but to prevent it from ever happening again. As Winston Churchill wisely said, “Those that fail to learn from history are doomed to repeat it.” | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2024 True the Vote PO Box 3109 #19128 Houston, Texas 77253-3109, United States of America

name: Heidi Campbell
subject: Moving forward together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/ANuxmAsWB0CHLK9S_7eA4Q2?contactdata=gsdINMHFQ9Z8Zt7ymvp3rGmN3oYfVzfTbCiPABmEbdOO8rREXK+EEc5LJ6vrNownbJUnRZKL6g67M2p5kk5YiGNIvGqVPrQ00VSII6lux1jYD5Z/71cx367WRlzgHkBs&quick=true [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ANuxmAsWB0CHLK9S_7eA4Q2?contactdata=gsdINMHFQ9Z8Zt7ymvp3rGmN3oYfVzfTbCiPABmEbdOO8rREXK+EEc5LJ6vrNownbJUnRZKL6g67M2p5kk5YiGNIvGqVPrQ00VSII6lux1jYD5Z/71cx367WRlzgHkBs&quick=true]
Peter,
For most of us this was a uniquely tough conclusion to a hard-fought election.
That’s because we’re paying attention and we know that the majority just voted for continued division and chaos and a slate-of-hate that marginalizes and hurts so many Americans.
We know that the majority voted against women and for a group of ideologues who intend to enact the policies of Project2025 [https://static.project2025.org/2025_MandateForLeadership_FULL.pdf] .
I heard from so many people today who are reeling from the outcome- who are sad and frankly terrified about what the future holds. And despite the fact that we won the election for Senate District 20 last night and will hang on to this seat, I also woke up this morning feeling fearful and bereft.
Early this morning my husband and I stumbled into the car and drove in a dismayed stupor to get breakfast seeking the most sane and accepting (aka Maga-less) atmosphere we could find, and ran into some old friends and talked for over an hour about how we were going to cope. Pop-tarts, puppies, off-the-grid road-trips to Montana, real estate in Portugal, and binging Bollywood movies were proffered, but we left with our dread intact.
I’d blocked off a few days post-election to rejuvenate, but felt too uneasy to relax so I started sorting through the backlog of papers in my office that had accrued over the course of the election. As I was going through the bills we’d worked on, the legislation that had passed through committees, constituent correspondence, and seminars I’d attended- glancing over issues that have been supported by thousands of Tennesseans who care deeply about our environment, healthcare, affordability, infrastructure, education, DCS children, mental health, disability/women’s/immigrant rights, criminal justice reform, small businesses, and many other issues- the dread began to dissipate.
Today nothing has changed about the amazing work that all of these people do. Today we are still living with a strong economy, basic freedom (reproductive rights notwithstanding), and a powerful collection of non-profit organizations committed to making a difference. And while we know that things are going to be bad with this group we’ve just elected, their reach will not be universal. We will do everything that we can to continue the work until we can’t.
And because we will cede every branch of government to them, they will bear ALL responsibility for what happens going forward. All of the hand-wringing about the economy (which is stronger than any other in the world right now), and social policies will now be THEIR responsibility.
FOX NEWS won’t be able to drive up ratings with disinformation about Democrats because it will be irrelevant. And we know that it won’t go well because this is an incompetent greedy group of grifters. They will have to own the chaos that ensues because they are in control of every single branch of government- including SCOTUS.
We really have no idea how this will play out, but we DO know that the thousands of people in this state who are doing work that really helps people will continue to do so, and that we are all in this together. And that is really what matters most.
So, I am going to do my best to ignore Trump and focus on this district. Because all politics is local. And the more that we continue to support one another and the things that matter, the less daunting the greater problems (that we cannot solve in the foreseeable future) become, and the closer we get to creating solutions ourselves. Government is not the answer to everything. There are so many other ways we can move forward together. And while we must continue to fight for compassionate and sane representation- I believe that together we can model a future that works. And I truly look forward to working with the supermajority to pass legislation that helps Tennesseans.
This is a tough day, but we have a lot of amazing people on our side- we will get through this- together!
Hang in there!
Heidi

What did I tell ya, folks?!
For months, I’ve been saying that Jacky Rosen’s race in Nevada is going to come down to the smallest of margins. Now, here we are the day after the election, and the race is still TOO CLOSE TO CALL.

**So I need you to listen up:** Jacky had to spend every last dollar she had to fight back against the $75 MILLION that the GOP dumped into this race to buy this seat. Today, she needs urgent grassroots support to prepare for what’s next.

**So I’m _pleading_ with you to show your support for Jacky’s race at this pivotal moment:**

clean_body: We need your help to make sure this election stays free and fair | | | | What did I tell ya, folks?! For months, I’ve been saying that Jacky Rosen’s race in Nevada is going to come down to the smallest of margins. Now, here we are the day after the election, and the race is still TOO CLOSE TO CALL. So I need you to listen up: Jacky had to spend every last dollar she had to fight back against the $75 MILLION that the GOP dumped into this race to buy this seat. Today, she needs urgent grassroots support to prepare for what’s next. So I’m pleading with you to show your support for Jacky’s race at this pivotal moment: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thank you for helping us take this all the way to the end! – James The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. I will continue fighting for the ideals and values we hold dear and to ensure conservative voices in New Mexico are not drowned out. | [](http://links.yvetteherrell.com/u/click?_t=60a077210c21435397f83f8f2527f964&_m=ab4e4df4ee40463da1227c7a237f9123&_e=IlReYX5u9ecSvepFuEnbOUI9Eam29tT_x1nxQpbemXBW1ezdY6eNVrUQ1ItEeOICyoUkXDoyXuag6V0h9Nn2EXq5Pulvw4f0hhc_Ub2Ttt07RYsl0knpUs8sK_At8WMpuWO300MED8ZoKWXZYx-tkOur42_2Zf_YaNL4zJzJx9iaOLtz-sfL28TZumfhzh1NzxUjNfe864regzFd3fg1cw%3D%3D)

Peter,

I’m taking this opportunity to thank you for your support throughout this campaign.

While it was not the outcome we wanted, it’s been an incredible journey, and I am so grateful for each and every one of you.

There’s one thing we can all be sure of: Under the leadership of President Trump and a Republican Congress, _**America will be great again!**_

I will continue fighting for the ideals and values we hold dear and to ensure conservative voices in New Mexico are not drowned out.

Thank you again, may God bless you, and God bless America!

Yvette Herrell

name: Jeff Hurd
subject: WOW! Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Hurd For Congress _Copyright © 2024 Jeff Hurd For Congress_ **Our mailing address is:**
body:
| | | [](https://link.jeffhurdforcolorado.com/u/click?_t=155acc46612c4a2685aa85fa73fe7acf&_m=a1aa4b52de9943cdbe2a97ba416b785b&_e=iIl6937z-3-8iZQAw-J0bJJhnVo4jmgPH7GRHxsIaH_XLBBvLW7fdV_r14QE7txAECgD1HxNqktcy9wFiG80fdkMkdOerlyqcUX_6iyL-H0CbTrRwAWtr8ErOxxfJDHLXGsmAR4exhBYFa6IGFuuQmTXhHpsGKa0ahOkelCoLcLJ1vnM9a37imqgSoZ1jf0Zc5uCwGHthEtiGHJEhIHWjw%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, I am so filled with gratitude and frankly, I’m looking for the words as I write this email to you. Thanks to your incredible support, we delivered a resounding victory in Colorado’s 3rd District. This victory isn’t just mine—it’s ours. For our families, our communities, and our country. Your enthusiasm, generosity, and support for our vision for America made all the difference. Whether you volunteered to knock on doors and spread our message to neighbors, you made a financial contribution to our campaign, or supported our campaign at the ballot box—THANK YOU. As your voice in Washington, I promise to spend every single day working tirelessly to uphold the Constitution and represent our Colorado values in Congress. Together, we will focus on the issues that unite us: securing the border, unleashing American energy, and protecting our water and agriculture. I am committed to listening, learning, and acting in ways that honor the trust voters have placed in me. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. It will be an honor and privilege to represent the district where I was raised. I look forward to getting to work for you and your family. Sincerely, Jeff Hurd **Congressman-Elect, CO-03**
---

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, I am so filled with gratitude and frankly, I’m looking for the words as I write this email to you. Thanks to your incredible support, we delivered a resounding victory in Colorado’s 3rd District. This victory isn’t just mine—it’s ours. For our families, our communities, and our country. Your enthusiasm, generosity, and support for our vision for America made all the difference. Whether you volunteered to knock on doors and spread our message to neighbors, you made a financial contribution to our campaign, or supported our campaign at the ballot box—THANK YOU. As your voice in Washington, I promise to spend every single day working tirelessly to uphold the Constitution and represent our Colorado values in Congress. Together, we will focus on the issues that unite us: securing the border, unleashing American energy, and protecting our water and agriculture. I am committed to listening, learning, and acting in ways that honor the trust voters have placed in me. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. It will be an honor and privilege to represent the district where I was raised. I look forward to getting to work for you and your family. Sincerely, Jeff Hurd Congressman-Elect, CO-03 | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Hurd For Congress Copyright © 2024 Jeff Hurd For Congress Our mailing address is: Jeff Hurd For Congress 2695 Patterson Rd, Suite 2-287 Grand Junction, CO 81506 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . You can also reach us at mailto:info@jeffhurdforcolorado.com.

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Thank You Wisconsin!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-muktult-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,Thanks to you, Wisconsin made history last night. Our state delivered the final blow to Kamala Harris' campaign by **delivering Wisconsin 's 10 electoral votes to President Donald J. Trump! **At the national level, President Donald J. Trump took back the White House, Republicans flipped the U.S. Senate, and held onto the U.S. House!At the state level, Republicans maintained the majority in both state legislative chambers, delivered the Vote Yes non-citizen voting constitutional amendment, and even flipped Kenosha County's District Attorney seat. To sum it all up, we made gains all across Wisconsin last night with stronger margins in rural, urban, and suburban areas. In order to win elections in Wisconsin, Republicans must have good candidates who run strong campaigns. The state party provides crucial infrastructure to candidates including data, ground game, communications support, and Election Integrity support. **THANK YOU** to our thousands of volunteers and voters. Together, we will Make America Great Again!Thank you,Chairman Brian Schimming | **PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. www.WisGOP.org Republican Party of Wisconsin **|** 148 E. Johnson Street**|** Madison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-muktult-931243C5-didthutlhu-y) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-u-muktult-didthutlhu-j/)

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americansis on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znacsghqg55mav0blff7quqgro435rclai4as46g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjjmcor0cdh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zobmd5tn4kh3b8s9kj5fi4pq7afhbvalahevep9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjjmcor0cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zea9mhgu0rkp21oua4i323odo8dl159ocbdhg8r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjjmcor0cdh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

name: Rep. Nancy Mace
subject: THERE’S A NEW SHERIFF IN TOWN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Mace
body:
This is HUGE for ALL Americans!

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmje2scrak422s70qtd6ivl7jajk8nclsaacdcc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjjmeoj6cth2bs)

[ ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0jurqtubtfpke9q0ana8dkenpmaqb7vjt8fr36o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjjmeoj6cth2bs)
**THERE 'S A NEW SHERIFF IN TOWN!**
**[I just FIRED a _sanctuary sheriff_ and FLIPPED this critical Sheriff's seat!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0l6fvuu6kf1i414k127adkgafed37to0u1q1380_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjjmeoj6cth2bs)**
Nancy Mace here, and I'm proud to announce: **South Carolina is OFFICIALLY NO sanctuary for CRIMINAL illegal aliens.**

[****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zks37hp1oditcg8m5dkicgkcjemb8kgvrjk70bl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjjmeoj6cth2bs)
For too long, Sheriff Kristin Graziano prioritized _sanctuary policies_ over South Carolina FAMILIES.
Instead of working with ICE, she allowed dangerous criminal aliens to walk freely in our communities.
Even ICE's records showed SHOCKING numbers _**\- noncitizens with criminal charges, including assault and sex offenses, who were NOT detained. **_
[_Enough was enough._](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7elviei4rf00nsavs3ft5hl1gcgmpth91geda98_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjjmeoj6cth2bs)
Together, we flipped the sheriff's seat!
South Carolina is SAFER as a result.
**This isn 't just a win for South Carolina, it's a victory for ALL of America. **
**We 're sending a clear message to EVERY border state: when you endanger families by coddling criminals, you WILL be held accountable.**

name: Hillsdale College via GOP Presidential
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0uk82a2rotnfrv9e51nnc2e9lbeuoijcsnr4tco_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjge0o74cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfcr3627k4jvmjkca8k2g1kkhrn93idlmq58nehg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjge0o74cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu0l75ld9qhik3m7v8ajqqs9kjcdvatc5vv1p448_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjge0o74cdh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| |

name: Mark M. Yarbrough
subject: A letter that speaks to our culture
body:
Our culture so closely resembles that of ancient Corinth

| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za8n7bj86ojln4f090ag89a4517phb0unjh78l5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjge4or1c1h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Our culture so closely resembles that of ancient Corinth, it’s as if Paul wrote his epistle of **[1 Corinthians](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqe6009son5t779lsqe3hm9rod94k4dna1gfrmh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjge4or1c1h2bs)** directly to us. Like the Corinthians of old, we find ourselves in a society that is obsessed with self, indifferent (if not antagonistic) to God, confused about love, in denial of the Resurrection, and riddled with sin. Unfortunately, these sins have influenced the church today, just as they influenced the Corinthian church. How should we respond? Paul gives instructions in 1 Corinthians, and I invite you to study this pivotal book in a **[new Dallas Theological Seminary free online course](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0vipl1ggdkudti4uo0m1htunk5c2c93s4da2m7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjge4or1c1h2bs)** , taught by Dr. Tom Constable. Dr. Constable served as an esteemed professor in the Bible Exposition department at Dallas Theological Seminary. In this seven-session course, you’ll learn about the history and background surrounding Paul’s messages to the church at Corinth. You’ll also explore how to find your identity in Christ instead of culture, delve into the famous love chapter (1 Corinthians 13), and find a renewed desire to use your spiritual gifts to share the gospel of Jesus Christ with the world. I encourage you to get started today. | [**Activate Your Free Course!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbo11gp0qokdnj7e48f84i4m8vqu655m4td583h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjge4or1c1h2bs)
---
Blessings,
Mark M. Yarbrough, Ph.D.
President
Dallas Theological Seminary
| | Dallas Theological Seminary 3909 Swiss Ave Dallas, TX 75204 USA

---

body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zff27iepnd5b1kcg3sn7t98sclreq4n0mknpoh4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjge2ob2cth2bs)

| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfanthbpo71gs0prjbtnbh73ams526eftv4jam6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjge2ob2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9jucg1pn76n3u280v98arebvha1frsp33pe2dlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cjge2ob2cth2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

# Trump Wins! A Victory For America...
But The Fight For Your Financial Freedom Isn’t Over
We did it. President Trump is headed back to the White House, and America's future is looking brighter, but make no mistake, the fight is far from over.

Even with President Trump back in the Oval Office, his hands are tied until inauguration day, and the Democrats controlling Congress know it.

They want to keep their power, even if it means more pain for everyday Americans like you.

Biden’s runaway inflation eats at your savings every single day. Suffocating regulations have crushed small businesses and stolen the dream of financial independence from millions.

Worst of all...

Your 401(k)s, IRAs, and traditional retirement accounts are caught in the middle of endless volatility and this political battlefield.

The elites will do anything to keep their grip on the stock market, even if it means you lose everything. But there’s a way out.

name: Common Sense Club
subject: And the winner is…
body:
Peter, Tuesday night a clear message was sent. Common Sense prevailed and truth was victorious! I’d first like to start out
|
---
| Peter, Tuesday night a clear message was sent. Common Sense prevailed and truth was victorious! **I’d first like to start out by saying thank you.** New Jersey swung further to the Right than we ever could have anticipated. Thousands of Common Sense voters like you showed up all around New Jersey and it showed. We saw many counties turn red for the first time in decades. It is clear: New Jersey voters are DONE with woke agendas, media lies, and leftwing lunacy! Our message is resonating with New Jerseyans at a large scale. Of course, there is still much work to be done. But looking ahead to 2025 there is reason to hope. There is reason to keep pressing on. We need to stay the course and keep speaking out. But with time and persistence, I believe the Common Sense Majority will prevail. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader

name: Mark M. Yarbrough
subject: A letter that speaks to our culture
body:
Our culture so closely resembles that of ancient Corinth, it’s as if Paul wrote his epistle of 1 Corinthians directly to us.

| | |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TQSQ_hPS1Jz8Z3eZFFCxfg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpDyX4P0SJaHR0cHM6Ly9jb3Vyc2VzLmR0cy5lZHUvcmVnaXN0ZXIvMS1jb3JpbnRoaWFucy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0xY29yaW50aGlhbnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUUtUk9ONTc2NzlXA3NwY0IKZys5jSxnpnJsaFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Our culture so closely resembles that of ancient Corinth, it’s as if Paul wrote his epistle of **[1 Corinthians](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TQSQ_hPS1Jz8Z3eZFFCxfg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpDyX4P0SJaHR0cHM6Ly9jb3Vyc2VzLmR0cy5lZHUvcmVnaXN0ZXIvMS1jb3JpbnRoaWFucy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0xY29yaW50aGlhbnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUUtUk9ONTc2NzlXA3NwY0IKZys5jSxnpnJsaFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** directly to us. Like the Corinthians of old, we find ourselves in a society that is obsessed with self, indifferent (if not antagonistic) to God, confused about love, in denial of the Resurrection, and riddled with sin. Unfortunately, these sins have influenced the church today, just as they influenced the Corinthian church. How should we respond? Paul gives instructions in 1 Corinthians, and I invite you to study this pivotal book in a **[new Dallas Theological Seminary free online course](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TQSQ_hPS1Jz8Z3eZFFCxfg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpDyX4P0SJaHR0cHM6Ly9jb3Vyc2VzLmR0cy5lZHUvcmVnaXN0ZXIvMS1jb3JpbnRoaWFucy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0xY29yaW50aGlhbnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUUtUk9ONTc2NzlXA3NwY0IKZys5jSxnpnJsaFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** , taught by Dr. Tom Constable. Dr. Constable served as an esteemed professor in the Bible Exposition department at Dallas Theological Seminary. In this seven-session course, you’ll learn about the history and background surrounding Paul’s messages to the church at Corinth. You’ll also explore how to find your identity in Christ instead of culture, delve into the famous love chapter (1 Corinthians 13), and find a renewed desire to use your spiritual gifts to share the gospel of Jesus Christ with the world. I encourage you to get started today. | [**Activate Your Free Course!**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TQSQ_hPS1Jz8Z3eZFFCxfg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpDyX4P0SJaHR0cHM6Ly9jb3Vyc2VzLmR0cy5lZHUvcmVnaXN0ZXIvMS1jb3JpbnRoaWFucy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0xY29yaW50aGlhbnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUUtUk9ONTc2NzlXA3NwY0IKZys5jSxnpnJsaFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
Blessings,
Mark M. Yarbrough, Ph.D.
President
Dallas Theological Seminary
| | Dallas Theological Seminary 3909 Swiss Ave Dallas, TX 75204 USA

---

Restore Our Nation
---

Dr. Constable served as an esteemed professor in the Bible Exposition department at Dallas Theological Seminary. In this seven-session course, you’ll learn about the history and background surrounding Paul’s messages to the church at Corinth. You’ll also explore how to find your identity in Christ instead of culture, delve into the famous love chapter (1 Corinthians 13), and find a renewed desire to use your spiritual gifts to share the gospel of Jesus Christ with the world. I encourage you to get started today. | ~ Blessings, Mark M. Yarbrough, Ph.D. President Dallas Theological Seminary | | Dallas Theological Seminary 3909 Swiss Ave Dallas, TX 75204 USA Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

name: Mark M. Yarbrough
subject: A letter that speaks to our culture
body:
Our culture so closely resembles that of ancient Corinth, it's as if Paul wrote his epistle of 1 Corinthians directly to us.

| | |
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=88fbd39fb5d74796975205a79ed07969&_e=bzEtLbtmWBFFpGhfI1OYhfaCC9CbC-iNvEaPckb7xos5zFDTvHEYzbnqrKNXaCQW9Ni00GLHKJEJhGRMsCHj8e5d5Mgmq-J4UY5qk71wvEp_Qgxc-L3ZmjkZz4R-ZUgEz_BxEyFliL9C5EPqMa1nQhDHY0YVf9s4Rvk6mixns6wzH_xZb9tmrAIULCeD6_2iGRTG-ZP64ZMA4Azxb3X54KpGCL3gqUp7OLnnKFlX5uJceQnNisSLywV-U--9vdfKUqEugjwGh2xLlL908IZ0EldlueFOjkoysSMT4M7YKXyziDZBxPmxJoW3HYr_bmkFheR31_TuxuosZY1_PAn92rlGQTY5_IhJSj8am7EVDxk%3D)

| | | Dear Friend, Our culture so closely resembles that of ancient Corinth, it's as if Paul wrote his epistle of **[1 Corinthians](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=88fbd39fb5d74796975205a79ed07969&_e=bzEtLbtmWBFFpGhfI1OYhfaCC9CbC-iNvEaPckb7xos5zFDTvHEYzbnqrKNXaCQW9Ni00GLHKJEJhGRMsCHj8e5d5Mgmq-J4UY5qk71wvEp_Qgxc-L3ZmjkZz4R-ZUgEz_BxEyFliL9C5EPqMa1nQhDHY0YVf9s4Rvk6mixns6wzH_xZb9tmrAIULCeD6_2iGRTG-ZP64ZMA4Azxb3X54C1EFxgKzQ6Fb5eVk1q-6WlVwVHt8RxBcKz5i6fu9wSqK2WVv1g1uw68TNasE6SmanPW0aG3QOeDWdq3PeUQ9g7LD-HASo1yIpf_7RFbqXF7q5NsDmEdu4MZlifpOAlzFAYL8ZyWz07blMvGBDbf6Ug%3D)** directly to us. Like the Corinthians of old, we find ourselves in a society that is obsessed with self, indifferent (if not antagonistic) to God, confused about love, in denial of the Resurrection, and riddled with sin. Unfortunately, these sins have influenced the church today, just as they influenced the Corinthian church. How should we respond? Paul gives instructions in 1 Corinthians, and I invite you to study this pivotal book in a **[new Dallas Theological Seminary free online course](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=88fbd39fb5d74796975205a79ed07969&_e=bzEtLbtmWBFFpGhfI1OYhfaCC9CbC-iNvEaPckb7xos5zFDTvHEYzbnqrKNXaCQW9Ni00GLHKJEJhGRMsCHj8e5d5Mgmq-J4UY5qk71wvEp_Qgxc-L3ZmjkZz4R-ZUgEz_BxEyFliL9C5EPqMa1nQhDHY0YVf9s4Rvk6mixns6wzH_xZb9tmrAIULCeD6_2iGRTG-ZP64ZMA4Azxb3X54G-t48n--Z9nu12yv4V936VxH2miee8ttjttMRjikas5Tf70VoUqnKxk4x4XYDx3_7sveioRjsZm0O01kxQ0sSG4YBPEhHX7g1_QigN9_yJGoFAVPwseyr9M-DdWOS_b5YCDfF8twiicfqv5sU1Na6k%3D)** , taught by Dr. Tom Constable. Dr. Constable served as an esteemed professor in the Bible Exposition department at Dallas Theological Seminary. In this seven-session course, you'll learn about the history and background surrounding Paul's messages to the church at Corinth. You'll also explore how to find your identity in Christ instead of culture, delve into the famous love chapter (1 Corinthians 13), and find a renewed desire to use your spiritual gifts to share the gospel of Jesus Christ with the world. I encourage you to get started today. | [**Activate Your Free Course!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=88fbd39fb5d74796975205a79ed07969&_e=bzEtLbtmWBFFpGhfI1OYhfaCC9CbC-iNvEaPckb7xos5zFDTvHEYzbnqrKNXaCQW9Ni00GLHKJEJhGRMsCHj8e5d5Mgmq-J4UY5qk71wvEp_Qgxc-L3ZmjkZz4R-ZUgEz_BxEyFliL9C5EPqMa1nQhDHY0YVf9s4Rvk6mixns6wzH_xZb9tmrAIULCeD6_2iGRTG-ZP64ZMA4Azxb3X54OAi5nbcr-Ou_tTILCiwU7zEK_dldAWEkWnhVV5-7OyQ3K82bnEkiX5Ts_MRfJLGYGVo85NiF8eAtMNvNalHXH54FznG7lbB0HN3c_kp99O7obRWZf5EBTZv15BTgpqB5HVQln_hPeeDu6WaOpgMkq4%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5204b437021541e6b0dc9640947cbcd3&_e=haaq7AILb4lWAuzCpBx6KdGkkmpPPFTf7F9jOWAm1MQCGLMKe629iXxxJH11bXzYciK0rP6-cJlEUA9yLMqLAAn3t7b7O9VU3DyXUFbANG2fFspYLYAZcylIFd_zoh_j1g2x9udpPrUYGIUo8g7w4jtJVYtWPe_U5JiQtkAkMewt91jreNTexS9puxsemvL2BHmZGU5MJucp2lEEfmWk5el8xLnKY5YMchtD-REhUC_5UqvgSSWkXVS7XcnKu9epLhl7I6jANI9fVUToABQ9dvJdMS_1Acl3gv6VPjrklbSgJBb1Bg7dhB1fyKgyeyH_mByChjHzlGFkQvEBTy1mOWGS_W8FOljftDb5e_PAnYXJd_BDFfJoKk4ELK5jEHtg35hn731zwdGlnBuLEQMiuA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5204b437021541e6b0dc9640947cbcd3&_e=haaq7AILb4lWAuzCpBx6KdGkkmpPPFTf7F9jOWAm1MQCGLMKe629iXxxJH11bXzYciK0rP6-cJlEUA9yLMqLAAn3t7b7O9VU3DyXUFbANG2fFspYLYAZcylIFd_zoh_j1g2x9udpPrUYGIUo8g7w4jtJVYtWPe_U5JiQtkAkMewt91jreNTexS9puxsemvL2BHmZGU5MJucp2lEEfmWk5el8xLnKY5YMchtD-REhUC_5UqvgSSWkXVS7XcnKu9epeIGMa5TsoKAojrqQNyk4lo4xIPCs5Y7v-EjmAoragEq6x_97p_87b2m1wVSlBKnS4WrtX9yctESPNFcz21e_Q3L1S3HrKy7CQbbH82n8KJAQm0aDqAiKUIP7iLgrJK1wXrw5rZu0XN0CoeOLu0RecA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5204b437021541e6b0dc9640947cbcd3&_e=haaq7AILb4lWAuzCpBx6KdGkkmpPPFTf7F9jOWAm1MQCGLMKe629iXxxJH11bXzYciK0rP6-cJlEUA9yLMqLAAn3t7b7O9VU3DyXUFbANG2fFspYLYAZcylIFd_zoh_j1g2x9udpPrUYGIUo8g7w4jtJVYtWPe_U5JiQtkAkMewt91jreNTexS9puxsemvL2BHmZGU5MJucp2lEEfmWk5el8xLnKY5YMchtD-REhUC_5UqvgSSWkXVS7XcnKu9epmGqBvljnPKGIQXIMyWCN8vEsSJirJlDUXneREptjbvKVR1xwg7ChHIzAFhHCiy10qXuFLPOjf_YyJ6JsPAiVB4JxCtDgfgs2vgkKoe6qgRJixMqEgzoMWzqxIatmYaRVZxwmdbLYdBUenwJgOS2XyQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
“If it’s in the Bible, it is right. If the Bible is clear on whatever topic, then we should be clear on it.”
| [ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MWrYrmdrs4LN90GnqwyyhvgW8DFYQL5n5vGFN4nN_cj3hKBbW69sMD-6lZ3njVkX4j05q5y7-N82K43vpK98FW4n_1Zx4fQZlFW88HN9v7T8l1RW7jZN6G3qCwD8W5bL6RL90d1yzW1FbpgJ5_RW1wW8BS5B47rtn8bW8dH1P24mwYMrW8clGWs63nLw6W8-sLLf2Z_sn0W8fRZt-1PpPkZN58XR0p3g-pDW3-HCTN36vtBsW3szqZ223_FY3W51HMy22qKYFNW5_h0b82rjjSZW2z2q-S2Gc3XTW4z4H7r4gCLvJW4CfZvj72Zkr_f50DBfT04)
---
Dear Peter, **Are you boldly living out your faith and standing firm on Biblical truths in the face of societal norms and cultural pressures?** As believers, we are called to boldly proclaim God's truth, even when it challenges societal norms. Silence in the face of moral issues can lead to spiritual decline, both in the church and the nation. The Bible urges us to pursue justice (Deuteronomy 16:20), while standing firm against cultural pressure (Romans 12:2), and staying true to Biblical convictions. Our faith is not just personal—it has the power to influence and transform our communities. In his conversation with Pastor Jentezen Franklin, Charlie dove deep into the call to speak out boldly, our responsibilities within the church, and the vital role of upholding the authority of Scripture. As Pastor Franklin reminded us: **“If it’s in the Bible, it is right. If the Bible is clear on a topic, then we should be clear on it.”**
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MWrYrmdrs4LN90GnqwyyhvgW8DFYQL5n5vGFN4nN_cC3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3lXW2cfCN96DcJ4fW6rfmG-6G_VkqW8qW3rR3jSr3VW8WmRtC1hHv1BN8jRWmjtzZHlN2rhvfbLLymqN90Gv6HpzFCbW1t8Sh_2skC1VW7S80PJ20mj7CW89kHbZ883_F-W3mCp4g7b9NPVW45pJD46KGW8_W64GQF75fPnc7W1dsgcn6j-1dwW609F-P9gvDTHW3xDzjG5LblnmW5zNk6g4NxyqzW6BZtyK8Z0520W8d3ky07TMQGqW8fFPSp2rc5pVW3z-QPf2YJFtpW4bKSx56_x_rdf39k8Sv04)
---

---
## Clear Truth Conference
---
---
---
Over the past month, TPUSA Faith connected with over 300 passionate community leaders, exploring how to make a real difference in the public square. From Pennsylvania to Nevada to Indiana, we brought boots on the ground and heard from truly inspiring voices like Pastor Steven Whitlow, Pastor Rob McCoy, Megan Basham, Michael Foster, Joel Barry, Bob McEwen, and so many more. These leaders are leaving empowered, equipped, and ready to stand strong for truth and make a lasting impact in their communities. The future is bright, and the movement is just beginning!
---
|
---
## Freedom Night In America
---
Charlie Kirk, Founder and CEO of TPUSA Faith, took the stage at Charis Bible College to host Freedom Nights in America. With over 1,800 attendees eager to hear his message, the event was a powerful gathering of individuals hungry for truth and inspired by faith. Charlie challenged the audience to consider why so many pastors shy away from speaking out on urgent matters like the border crisis, the rise of migrant gangs, and the heartbreaking reality of **320,000 missing children** trafficked across our country. These are not just political issues—they are moral and spiritual crises demanding a bold, faith-driven response. The silence of the church in these moments raises a vital question for us all: **If the church won’t speak out, who will?**
---
---
|
---
**Pastor John Amanchukwu’s School Board Tour**
##
At Turning Point USA, we've made incredible strides in exposing radical agendas and empowering the next generation of American patriots. Pastor and TPUSA Faith Contributor John Amanchukwu has been traveling the country and exposing America’s Wokest school boards one by one! ## **Putting Faith Into Action**
---
In Luke 10:29-35, Jesus teaches us through the Parable of the Good Samaritan that true neighborly love transcends boundaries and biases. It’s a call to compassion, urging us to care for those in need, regardless of their background or circumstances. The question, "Who is my neighbor?" challenges us to broaden our understanding of community and responsibility. This lesson takes on renewed meaning in light of recent events. Hurricanes Helene and Milton have left many in dire need. Our hearts and prayers go out to those affected, and we are reminded that now is the time to embody the spirit of the Good Samaritan. Just as the Samaritan extended mercy to the injured man, our Palmetto Regional Manager, Christian Swanger, has been an example of this compassion by organizing a supply drive in North Carolina. This act of kindness is a modern reflection of Jesus' teaching—showing love through action.
---
---
---
This is our opportunity to be the hands and feet of Christ, stepping up to serve those in crisis. Let us be attentive to God's call, ready to act with mercy and love in our communities. How will you answer the call to be a neighbor?
---
|
---
**Support TPUSA Faith Today!** The mission entrusted to the Church is to go and make disciples of all nations and to teach them to obey ALL that God has commanded is an eternal one. This eternal mission is carried out in faithful obedience at any one given time and in any given circumstance. The year that lies ahead demands urgency in carrying this out and putting FAITH INTO ACTION in the public square. We invite you to stand with us in prayer in this fight and consider [starting a faith group](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MWrYrmdrs4LN90GnqwyyhvgW8DFYQL5n5vGFN4nN_cC3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3psW6fD-fk5TTVDPW5q8QZP20rRqBW6S1B_h7yZy7rV31RdZ3MCsvqVjzMMn2XLHJrW6z6fwf7tyty2VH3Ps579BmxWW94S61N89zzt7W3NxPN61BBCdgVJRJ6w6wyB1kW1-_7RX6yRLGGW5tn56v8GWF78W9f1BJ38DmMhFW1nrYJ56SZD3mW7z9W808synK0W89BVZw2wg-sfW6_n6ZT7NQ30vW4c0nZr4NtZ2nW3xcpSz8cQSQtW2l53H019-lB7W6pS3Mj4VPY2qW3JY_nW6nkHfXf1mZ_rv04) in your community. Charlie challenged the audience to consider why so many pastors shy away from speaking out on urgent matters like the border crisis, the rise of migrant gangs, and the heartbreaking reality of 320,000 missing children trafficked across our country. These are not just political issues—they are moral and spiritual crises demanding a bold, faith-driven response. The silence of the church in these moments raises a vital question for us all: If the church won’t speak out, who will? | Pastor John Amanchukwu’s School Board Tour At Turning Point USA, we've made incredible strides in exposing radical agendas and empowering the next generation of American patriots. Pastor and TPUSA Faith Contributor John Amanchukwu has been traveling the country and exposing America’s Wokest school boards one by one! In his latest school district visit, Pastor John put all the on blast as he read aloud a sexually explicit book found in their school library. You can be a part of the movement and help Pastor John Amanchukwu expose the vile ideologies found in far too many public schools by signing up to have him speak at your school board! | | Putting Faith Into Action In Luke 10:29-35, Jesus teaches us through the Parable of the Good Samaritan that true neighborly love transcends boundaries and biases. It’s a call to compassion, urging us to care for those in need, regardless of their background or circumstances. The question, "Who is my neighbor?" challenges us to broaden our understanding of community and responsibility. This lesson takes on renewed meaning in light of recent events. Hurricanes Helene and Milton have left many in dire need. Our hearts and prayers go out to those affected, and we are reminded that now is the time to embody the spirit of the Good Samaritan. Just as the Samaritan extended mercy to the injured man, our Palmetto Regional Manager, Christian Swanger, has been an example of this compassion by organizing a supply drive in North Carolina. This act of kindness is a modern reflection of Jesus' teaching—showing love through action. This is our opportunity to be the hands and feet of Christ, stepping up to serve those in crisis. Let us be attentive to God's call, ready to act with mercy and love in our communities. How will you answer the call to be a neighbor? | Support TPUSA Faith Today! The mission entrusted to the Church is to go and make disciples of all nations and to teach them to obey ALL that God has commanded is an eternal one. This eternal mission is carried out in faithful obedience at any one given time and in any given circumstance. The year that lies ahead demands urgency in carrying this out and putting FAITH INTO ACTION in the public square. We invite you to stand with us in prayer in this fight and consider in your community. By gathering with others to pray for our nation, we can create a powerful network of believers united in seeking God’s guidance and strength. Additionally, we ask you to prayerfully consider financially supporting our mission. | | | | | | | Turning Point USA, 4940 East Beverly Road, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States of America, (844) 872-1776

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Helpful video on the Electoral College
body:
Citizens are free to say what they think. Subjects aren’t.

This sponsored message from Conservative Gives is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b75159a163e44868084d2043675d3cf&_e=u8Q3oB_zJeJY6_1yj9i7eIS9VyX78fh3WRd6wkcTWXZ2r6AalkOKvuqUy4hPD7k2fuxHOjlTrgVHqejYPTFR_qHrFLSCnN7SSLEmUy-cNOmlLnFfJueJVLosCSBPynzdyPtEjo9clPkyUpvI4tEau5IcToqYKwtn3S1QhR-mylc68DCZ1aTZu4D-WUdXTg7Zh7tJ0_k-GVMAcYgEY-e1b6Ry54g-9W6tpq8S2NEfFn56C2RIlpp0p38kfmO0VZmChF1x03f0_gaFJt_rHP8xrXdO51GjYZJEOdX2Y6zfH_we1Ggv-85d-TtSs-OO11Y5tOSKk2S0n9IBsMIS1FADe-7G_MVSG7U6r-xhmdMh_FgmQF4gTEuE2UZNjPNvL3JUCmIQYp3GllCdKs4ldvzMDY_NpQBao3GvLt330Nr1zEE%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Citizens are free to say what they think. Subjects aren't.

Sadly, the question of whether we are citizens or subjects has become politically controversial in our country. A clear sign of this is the attempt to suppress the expression of obvious truths, such as the fact that boys cannot become girls.

Another sign that many of our leaders consider us subjects is their denial of our right to decide who is allowed to enter our country--indeed, they tell us that if we complain about mass illegal immigration, we are racists.

**This is a pivotal time in our nation 's history--a time when we must stand up and forthrightly demand to be treated as citizens, not subjects. Because freedom hangs in the balance.**

A poisonous ideology has infected almost every major American institution. Only a few still stand in defense of freedom and the right of self-government.

One of the most important of these is **Hillsdale College**. And today, my friends at Hillsdale need your partnership and support in their mission to preserve the blessings of civil and religious liberty through education.

For 180 years, Hillsdale has offered its students the kind of education America's founders thought necessary to sustain free government. And in recent decades, Hillsdale has extended its teaching mission nationwide with a vast national outreach effort.

This outreach effort includes its free publication _Imprimis_ , its free online courses, and its tireless work to return excellence--including excellent civics instruction--to American K-12 education.

And Hillsdale College does all of this while refusing to accept one penny of government funding--not even indirectly through federal or state student grants and loans.

That's why I ask you to take the time to view their video **"[The Electoral College Explained](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b75159a163e44868084d2043675d3cf&_e=u8Q3oB_zJeJY6_1yj9i7eIS9VyX78fh3WRd6wkcTWXZ2r6AalkOKvuqUy4hPD7k2fuxHOjlTrgVHqejYPTFR_qHrFLSCnN7SSLEmUy-cNOmlLnFfJueJVLosCSBPynzdyPtEjo9clPkyUpvI4tEau5IcToqYKwtn3S1QhR-mylc68DCZ1aTZu4D-WUdXTg7Zh7tJ0_k-GVMAcYgEY-e1b6Ry54g-9W6tpq8S2NEfFn56C2RIlpp0p38kfmO0VZmCKIXoTCknwJDp1ILY_4G7o6Wv48uE3r03fgowCAiPC0p8xomHLSrxSWqMKPNkrcIowZ6173flxfmFWl-IF8sPhCo0XCMqcpzTf7O4U0yS1fJSuBObyTMh4qnPy_SG66prCgoiagpJszmZH1j1-VbXGYs2-X-dgYWVZEIEWtYrv5A%3D)"** below and join Hillsdale in defending freedom and the American way of life.

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-video](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b75159a163e44868084d2043675d3cf&_e=u8Q3oB_zJeJY6_1yj9i7eIS9VyX78fh3WRd6wkcTWXZ2r6AalkOKvuqUy4hPD7k2fuxHOjlTrgVHqejYPTFR_qHrFLSCnN7SSLEmUy-cNOmlLnFfJueJVLosCSBPynzdyPtEjo9clPkyUpvI4tEau5IcToqYKwtn3S1QhR-mylc68DCZ1aTZu4D-WUdXTg7Zh7tJ0_k-GVMAcYgEY-e1b6Ry54g-9W6tpq8S2NEfFn56C2RIlpp0p38kfmO0VZmCxjlAaHEMG8YGezeTrFMZuwOMAJRNnWoHd-sXiCr7GVCjvrS4mDvNzXAdoxUNakj9NvyFPYmLLhU4YoZ3hdjqJPR6ypJtf5-rr4S4kgYb_Cuk8Jp71xyGUaizoTyvqFX5Csije7e5uPdv--kBi9UmVwK8_ARAb12v-935lYOE9GA%3D)**

Sincerely, [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b75159a163e44868084d2043675d3cf&_e=u8Q3oB_zJeJY6_1yj9i7eIS9VyX78fh3WRd6wkcTWXZ2r6AalkOKvuqUy4hPD7k2fuxHOjlTrgVHqejYPTFR_qHrFLSCnN7SSLEmUy-cNOmlLnFfJueJVLosCSBPynzdyPtEjo9clPkyUpvI4tEau5IcToqYKwtn3S1QhR-mylc68DCZ1aTZu4D-WUdXTg7Zh7tJ0_k-GVMAcYgEY-e1b6Ry54g-9W6tpq8S2NEfFn56C2RIlpp0p38kfmO0VZmC-wb01Z-QRXaDqVSu7oC8hrHYXPiIOglhG7jW4Gx6X3Jj6KrnVPL3PO_j2yiF5rW2lUHmFJHL_G33Uiqj7H-4J6FQoJpPLeAYrphKM8yf4T8Axs3AYXRaguSf43IgR_MfJOU3LbTuhtsMVBTTr0VTdo954D_zhU5IH9TN5tVzl1g%3D)

name: Mark M. Yarbrough
subject: A letter that speaks to our culture
body:
Our culture so closely resembles that of ancient Corinth, it’s as if Paul wrote his epistle of 1 Corinthians directly to us.

| | |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93cd4868713749f394f879c6d21a6619&_e=sKVf6Amc1-tXJclbvySww5s1JyDWPriXM28A8gZZ9m8Wo5hcZUDJJcN9Oc8dVjFvLrWBp1W4Bba8LV4p-COPQ_PUve9kPglFOIJH1DaP0tMnyeKObzB7HPHN0Ldmi9P3TxsyOAHklTF2lbXudZ8ekEz6xtvLgxFfFp6WHYyx6Gg7ZYvzpucrykQuKqdE_WfYvdMXKXLsoWzlm_QhF0zhhKxvoOC7gdMlw-9-1d10oChA721D53Fex5W6ebge-DkQMuxtjkrRjNV3P3y2xGVV0OadO6xPoCap0RP8e3Tt9lrQpsg8R-9-RFsG7Srko6t2Z0vcEMglsToj3Laraw9aZAH804TmHE5S3B_C_xERwRw%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Our culture so closely resembles that of ancient Corinth, it’s as if Paul wrote his epistle of **[1 Corinthians](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93cd4868713749f394f879c6d21a6619&_e=sKVf6Amc1-tXJclbvySww5s1JyDWPriXM28A8gZZ9m8Wo5hcZUDJJcN9Oc8dVjFvLrWBp1W4Bba8LV4p-COPQ_PUve9kPglFOIJH1DaP0tMnyeKObzB7HPHN0Ldmi9P3TxsyOAHklTF2lbXudZ8ekEz6xtvLgxFfFp6WHYyx6Gg7ZYvzpucrykQuKqdE_WfY2aR-RLHcCUj-Sofc0674uMYCxC1NFQhLuKnroqAXa6VrB8FKKXaGH7nLrCq3bKUmC7FbAz1xSOtowjJX2LLj5IOalvyNpsKPOdxOKP0dCv7NIHVHskgd8KhHcJ5V2UhRhkL5Y1nBBYJFhl6J1RfxBr-Jmz28dY5caFfc_w_U8zs%3D)** directly to us. Like the Corinthians of old, we find ourselves in a society that is obsessed with self, indifferent (if not antagonistic) to God, confused about love, in denial of the Resurrection, and riddled with sin. Unfortunately, these sins have influenced the church today, just as they influenced the Corinthian church. How should we respond? Paul gives instructions in 1 Corinthians, and I invite you to study this pivotal book in a **[new Dallas Theological Seminary free online course](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93cd4868713749f394f879c6d21a6619&_e=sKVf6Amc1-tXJclbvySww5s1JyDWPriXM28A8gZZ9m8Wo5hcZUDJJcN9Oc8dVjFvLrWBp1W4Bba8LV4p-COPQ_PUve9kPglFOIJH1DaP0tMnyeKObzB7HPHN0Ldmi9P3TxsyOAHklTF2lbXudZ8ekEz6xtvLgxFfFp6WHYyx6Gg7ZYvzpucrykQuKqdE_WfYlQc5xM4vK_TQIBieKKVQpmjQQufLL4zY_To8epHpavE5LA7GY2s_manZ9FSh7rqroXeGzsPz7jOdXKkwIBtpvI0XSjehYDLUoUbz4MF-CT189glXzmBNwHSckUtrmvODXSgECmugOxGHdSnO_fp2DLlK0TnluoAJPu9xzI1TubQ%3D)** , taught by Dr. Tom Constable. Dr. Constable served as an esteemed professor in the Bible Exposition department at Dallas Theological Seminary. In this seven-session course, you’ll learn about the history and background surrounding Paul’s messages to the church at Corinth. You’ll also explore how to find your identity in Christ instead of culture, delve into the famous love chapter (1 Corinthians 13), and find a renewed desire to use your spiritual gifts to share the gospel of Jesus Christ with the world. I encourage you to get started today. | [**Activate Your Free Course!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93cd4868713749f394f879c6d21a6619&_e=sKVf6Amc1-tXJclbvySww5s1JyDWPriXM28A8gZZ9m8Wo5hcZUDJJcN9Oc8dVjFvLrWBp1W4Bba8LV4p-COPQ_PUve9kPglFOIJH1DaP0tMnyeKObzB7HPHN0Ldmi9P3TxsyOAHklTF2lbXudZ8ekEz6xtvLgxFfFp6WHYyx6Gg7ZYvzpucrykQuKqdE_WfYHyP_eKSMjBsoDpdJJwnO55WbN6heP675eVYbhM9DdiMhSInCCxz99wyyh3f0Upt2u3N49ILH1ikUFjJOm8N1OV27TTBzzoWGaJwoyoBW-8-ezL2seF_LtmqxfcR1plVSxEbZ6vS2KjYjJKOKY5brDhN9PJ7kZQMg5YTPYE13Z4c%3D)
---
Blessings,
Mark M. Yarbrough, Ph.D.
President
Dallas Theological Seminary
| | Dallas Theological Seminary 3909 Swiss Ave Dallas, TX 75204 USA

---

Defend the Constitution

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: School Choice Has the Votes, Trump Flips Starr County, and Ice Age Cat Bones
body:
Gov. Greg Abbott visited a private school in Tyler yesterday to [discuss his plans](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL8Gd1jLGkwoKF7jLq-90oKwDkg4RIYzyd-fcv3VI81I83Vdry7l9Lj_dzvZ9trKioCSC8FBr8Gl_F7VEKyHYMRAVugJjDao5iFaUDMASek34wNtcEEVwqycm_TNBCWHZD8yIUALATip8SKdF9oop4xHicgkUEitHGOL1Ojl6pbf5aRjvJV9yDa29qxs-sdwYbj03se3i6V8KMPlQb0yXPZyEL-VR6XjdC2dxGP5rsR9CVR5p5w5wiRBiUmOse15OGx49pRzqrNmEu67S_m32P5ccFr8CQAA___MA13j) for school choice legislation in next year’s session. He claims that after Tuesday's election, there are now enough votes to pass a plan to provide state funding for private education or homeschooling.

## Abbott: School Choice Has the Votes
Gov. Greg Abbott visited a private school in Tyler yesterday to [discuss his plans](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL8Gd1jLGkwoKF7jLq-90oKwDkg4RIYzyd-fcv3VI81I83Vdry7l9Lj_dzvZ9trKioCSC8FBr8Gl_F7VEKyHYMRAVugJjDao5iFaUDMASek34wNtcEEVwqycm_TNBCWHZD8yIUALATip8SKdF9oop4xHicgkUEitHGOL1Ojl6pbf5aRjvJV9yDa29qxs-sdwYbj03se3i6V8KMPlQb0yXPZyEL-VR6XjdC2dxGP5rsR9CVR5p5w5wiRBiUmOse15OGx49pRzqrNmEu67S_m32P5ccFr8CQAA___MA13j) for school choice legislation in next year’s session. He claims that after Tuesday's election, there are now enough votes to pass a plan to provide state funding for private education or homeschooling. A handful of Republicans in the Texas House thwarted an effort during the previous session to introduce education savings accounts. Abbott spent [over $11 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOrCAQBeCn0W4MsCpLQbHJjd1_21sawEFIUDYwq7tvf-P2fzWTnOTLyfn3M_-YmOK-_jUbanr7PAsmeuAcmJwXE9NnHtpFW7Yo3qLm8saUVGIY26C943IUy8j8qO7o_J0b6xQzjDOpLHNt1BfGOZOcM3EbuntvLJdqMIOyohei6RkukXLpKCDh21SfPvnA0rm8tUkHomdtbo9GTI2YzvPstrpfWSMm3OFVGzHteF7nmVOk6K7XF6wBsvfwJSHkV0U4415hzQesBVcw1mYiqOZTISAEU4ECwpEJK_hcoLqQc4Ijv1zAcrGmwOPB6U_y1Ba9PM-YUqyjbHq2biamb2f6dcRDi_8BAAD__wOydo8) to help elect more members favorable to state-funded alternatives to public schools. While polls show a [majority of Texans support the policy](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGTgyAQhX-NdjiwgoSC4hq7XHulg4Bx5zA4LtHk39-Y1Ffuvve-efN-rsPVYcL77dst0ZbnlAfgIJkQjOshOEyvQdXBjjwYUUcrdMuNNqC6erZ65MqEi_F-6qQI7XSRpp288AG6oHxboz1hQnAtBIdWNRfpRqGNcsqMIAEqyWPAkremzLHEp6MpvfIet8bnpU52LmWlqv2qoK-gP46j-X26-ylW0N_jQRX07xhbc8KCnj7_80yM5nwQWzIV9jHtucSNGD3WNW-FrRvurkRGfs45MXqMhAHjyag3G9YDU0LqdCX5bXGY3qXKvyvtFv4CAAD__7uYbPw), critics say it would take money away from public schools and question how state funding for alternative education is compatible with increasing teacher pay and investing in workforce readiness programs.
## Congressional Election Updates
Erica Lee Carter, daughter of the late Sheila Jackson Lee, was elected to fill the remainder of the longtime Houston Congresswoman’s term, defeating two Republican candidates. Voters elected [former Houston Mayor Sylvester Turner](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb7a412DMwNDFW7p2tIi5iZEIWEBC8vZVInXs_P3o6Pyc1pP1wcfrt72Rqc9LWpGj6AF6rlZnfXitsnPmzJ2GjgyokWulUU7dbqZts8DJ0ewkwaRGoSeaSOvRKZRi7rx5nwFwBcBxlMMs7BmUllbqMwpEJjg5X1Me6k6VnrZcwis9KA9bunXB7LUehY1fDBeGS2tt2Pac4jtluERqheGyp3upKfafPcPF5uq3QAyX8goPKpVyX-85Uu6bj6X_64OelZJyHo796LJxR_Mh-DIpJvj1Zn34QNR_rTwM_gYAAP__OyZlGA) to succeed Carter when her partial term ends on Jan. 3. State Rep. Julie Johnson (D-Farmers Branch) was elected to occupy the seat in the U.S. House of Representatives vacated by [Colin Allred.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuO6yAUAL8Gd1hwDCEUFLdxl9tuaYF9bBPxyAKJnb9fZfvtRzPSfN2mm_XBp-2_jWjaueYJGAjKOWVqWqwP70l2i3Fs0bxDw9XAtNIgL91u7GAdALtIPaxukAKFVFIrvLrZCsFU581HxjlTnDMYZH8V1nGlpZXagQAgguHiWy5927Hhaesa3vmFpZ9z7ILZW3tUMvwjMBIYj-Po13yKhEf9AARGDDg3nxOB8f4MHuk976nmRFdfaqNhc-2bzjltBWulEaPDQteSI6352faumOVx-BB8vSgi2BatD7_t9ueMl4GfAAAA___C8mMl) Johnson will be the first openly gay person elected to Congress from the South. And Henry Cuellar (D-Laredo) was [reelected to an eleventh term](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwzAMhJ9G3mRI9P-goYu3dO1o0BYdC5WlQCLs5O0LF0G3TiTxgXeH-7pNN3Tehfsn7mT4ucYJFNRSa6m6yaLzr6kprJmVHXRBRneVGroBmrbYDKyNbq8Le2XXZWmGuSfs6nlFxLZaC2cuMa1Vp7WCqin7GmfdDQ02www1gKgVWccxlbwR0xPz6l_xoFQucS-82ZgfWVQfAkYB43me5XdGvqCA8YhM8jIQML6HVtdevWHK0gW5xHBPlLOLAb20LnNyC0voJUe5bDFmkjPxSRSkC9YtTPbvaccgY5IBj5c8iClhEDAWydjH6bx3ue1Ere47Ov8bmf_t8DDwEwAA__9IDnRA) despite being indicted on federal bribery and money laundering charges earlier this year. Cuellar’s trial is scheduled for March.
## Republicans Make Gains In Texas House

[Shelley Luther](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO6yAQheGnwR0WM4YQCorbuMttt7QmYYiRiIkMCcnbr5J--6Pv6P85LSdKOW3X_3Rj316xLKhQSwCp7BIo5fdihuDPKjgY2IOdlLMOzWFYfXR8pKghEgaDcQoOwBI5NlofdYhD8h8MQFkAhZMZj5rOYJ0h486oEYVWHFIr-9hWbvyiGvO7PHkfL-U2ZL-2dq9i-idwFjj33sdYXnrjXj8DgTNnvrRUNoFzXTlnfsv8aCvvsqetyi8p1_KoLCtTG3Yf7j3lnOrBCq2uN0r5-9X-jH96_A0AAP__Nuhduw), the former Dallas salon owner who was jailed after reopening her business during the COVID-19 pandemic, was elected after unsuccessful runs for the Texas Senate in 2020 and the Texas House in 2022. Greg Abbott visited a private school in Tyler yesterday to for school choice legislation in next year’s session. He claims that after Tuesday's election, there are now enough votes to pass a plan to provide state funding for private education or homeschooling. A handful of Republicans in the Texas House thwarted an effort during the previous session to introduce education savings accounts. Abbott spent to help elect more members favorable to state-funded alternatives to public schools. While polls show a , critics say it would take money away from public schools and question how state funding for alternative education is compatible with increasing teacher pay and investing in workforce readiness programs. Congressional Election Updates Erica Lee Carter, daughter of the late Sheila Jackson Lee, was elected to fill the remainder of the longtime Houston Congresswoman’s term, defeating two Republican candidates. Voters elected to succeed Carter when her partial term ends on Jan. 3. State Rep. Julie Johnson (D-Farmers Branch) was elected to occupy the seat in the U.S. House of Representatives vacated by Johnson will be the first openly gay person elected to Congress from the South. And Henry Cuellar (D-Laredo) was despite being indicted on federal bribery and money laundering charges earlier this year. Cuellar’s trial is scheduled for March. Republicans Make Gains In Texas House Republicans and are sending a markedly more conservative delegation to Austin next year after several moderates lost in the primaries. defeated Solomon Ortiz to succeed retiring Democrat Abel Herrero in Corpus Christi, while former Uvalde Mayor defeated Democrat Cecilia Castellano to replace outgoing Democrat Tracy King. , the former Dallas salon owner who was jailed after reopening her business during the COVID-19 pandemic, was elected after unsuccessful runs for the Texas Senate in 2020 and the Texas House in 2022. And , Donald Trump’s former campaign spokeswoman, won an uncontested race to represent Rockwall. The upheaval in the Texas House has thrown the race for speaker into doubt, as 48 Republicans have announced their support for David Cook of Mansfield over current speaker Dade Phelan. Morgan LaMantia (D-Palm Valley) lost her reelection bid to Brownsville businessman Adam Hinojosa by a margin of 49% to 48%. The contest was a rematch from two years ago when Hinojosa lost to LaMantia by 659 votes. () ➤ Starr County: Donald Trump defeated Kamala Harris 58% to 42% Tuesday after previously losing the heavily Hispanic county to Hillary Clinton 79% to 19% in 2016. This marks the first time a Republican presidential candidate has won Starr Country since 1892. ## Trump Overperforms with Minority Voters
Women, Latino, black, youth, and white-and-suburban male voters were the [five key demographics](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL-O8yAQxJ8Gd1iA_xAXFPkUucvXXHG6ykLL2t47bBAmQXn7k_MAV-1qRhrN_D7v092Sp335bzc0eQ6TEqrlUnKhp5jCERHyJCtnZkSFTYVG6kYMelC9rlbTDj1oEPLSW9cM2HYOQHdqEA222tpLReYMlFJoKcUg-1q4WXdwAeixP0XWCnSUQ6q_A-15xdm_whNTDWGrvFlzjgdrrkyNTI2llHo79tNjasSdPw6mxh3LeWLwlAnOdw2Fd_wHX9zhFpZk40rAlxQe8eAr-oiO5_TYIi-087wif89Gj5Ap7EyNNvHrVeZbhC_WjAHIseb27wSF5fjAFKtkXCzkPR29Zq1YNkv-XTr_wfFp1G8AAAD__zhAdyM) that led to President-elect Donald Trump’s dominant Election Day victory, according to an AP VoteCast analysis. Trump received [54% of the Latino male vote](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kMHOpCAQhJ8Gb20AR9EDh8luvM1e92gYbUY2CAR6dOft__A_wH_qTlVS9aX-PpaHcd6F1x9zoCYbF8nlDYQArpaUY0m40iKaTVtEiV2DWqiOT2qSg2p23Xersmi3cRyfkxIDGrRjp7Djzx7HcWqcroFCcCUEn8TQ8s2qfh3XdcChiuzGcXMUc_svukA7Wv-JJ-Z2jUfj9U6UCuvuTM5Mztd1tUcJ1WNyxgDvwuQc8KonRe_IrfX1hlyIcBiPcEbCXMCjCUDxMnkDyu8jQW2B3eTsCjw_IDikSlAA_zuCFL0vkPFE45mcTYb7XdCvfvjdZL2ly3nvyqDYjb8O4_w3Lv2w4KnlVwAAAP__hZB2iA), while Vice President Kamala Harris garnered 44%, marking a significant shift from 2020 when Biden led with 59%, representing a major realignment in that demographic. Harris also underperformed with Latino women, winning by a 25-point margin compared to Biden’s 39-point lead in 2020. Overall, according to exit polls, [Trump won](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kDHPnDAMQH9N2IISA8nHkKFLtuvaEYXE3KUNGBEf6P59RdWu3Z4s6_nJPx7TI-SSt-f3sKLjhSZQ0EutpbLTflDdMfKkm-QWRMCuQadtp0Y7grHNy4U-dn0aYdbzgGHQnbHKDMEMAy46LLbJ7hZqrazWatSmVWmxQ_yK0aC5h6JXmDLT0f6kvPELl_KhE4820toU92Leq-i-CfAC_HVd7bsGphQ-94IAX5mOjwC_4VUF-J1K5hxvxIKRM2033xECvNYCvDIC_FxC_CVL4LyRPInxqHImqiwTbaEkycd73eU_hzxz_HvIGvXVdwaUsgJ8c7i0X7mUXI0VvXquIZc_7fyfd54OfgcAAP__Cgt3wg) a majority of white and suburban male voters while securing about 13% of black voters and 45% of Latino voters, a significant increase from 2020, when he won 8% of black voters and 32% of Latino voters.
## Stock Market, Bitcoin Skyrocket After Election
Financial markets surged Wednesday following Donald Trump's election win on Tuesday night. The Dow Jones Industrial Average [jumped 1,508.05 points](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80DFvgzAQBeBfYzYj3wF2PHjo4i1dOyLHPoIbEyO4BuXfV_QHdH1P-p70vq7jNeSSn_fPsJDjqY6osJcAUplx3eq-UuQRmuQmIqSuIQemU9ZY1KaZndbQ3ezFKn3BHjqlkXQa7C1YC0OcsMnuBAGUAVAWdKvSZIZ4iVGTPkPRK0qZ69Z-1_zkmabyri_a2liXpriZed1F9yHQC_THcbTxeYtnKdCftEAPINCrQaDfucaHXML2IJZcU3jLkl8kf9YUmPZ25qU0m0vrkUvJuzaiV_cl5PK3xv8c8HL4GwAA___NZlxu) to a record close of 43,729.93, the biggest single-day leap since November 2022. The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq also closed at record highs. Bitcoin's response [was more immediate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLFuwyAURb_G3oh4DxvMwNAlW7p2tDA8EioMCNNE-fvK_YCO917p6uh83dabjSnm-6fdyfRQVuQ4MQDG1VpbOSq5vsLoTSBCEiMZUIJrpVGq8WG8DDMPQlihlQ5h2TwItcgJZ5BSb9sYzXkIwBUA1yAv3Ac1u8U5SfIsh4mTj720y3eJuT8opHd5Uru4so_JPHqvxyA-BrwOeLU10-s4pzO0Hl2iAa9b7K7EzFx7116YL9kmz3r72SujRK7HkplDQgt20TMui5tJO-4DKgQOaOdtG5vx9RVTiodUw8Tvu43pj6L_I-Zp8DcAAP__TBFlmQ). The cryptocurrency soared even before the election was officially called. It eventually climbed as much as 9%, reaching an all-time high above $75,000. Meanwhile, the dollar also [strengthened 1.65%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8zzFuxCAUBNDTQLcWfAx_XVCkcbdpU1oGPrtE2FgYLcrtI-cA6UYz0pPm67E81pTT_vxcN7ItlgUEjDcpbwKXo5bzIN8WyYONRECKk5WoxIQTGOQve3crOgwOdVRqMjqOoIUL6CRpBSLyZC9QSoFSikmaQYSI2t-9N2Suko2CQmqlDt8l7e1FMf-UN9XBl41n-2rtOJn6YDAzmHvvg3P-2hjMO_WTwbzWlnymK3oDoyHVJ6ULrzYcPeWcToNsFM9tTflPbf8cfVv4DQAA__9aylUZ) against several currencies, including the Japanese yen, the pound, and the euro.
## DOJ Weighs How to Drop Trump Cases
The Justice Department is [assessing how to end](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFuwyAYBOCnwRsWPzhgDwxdvKVrR4vA7-RPMVhAY_XtK-cBut5Jp0_3dV2ujiKl-6fb0LY1L1LIgQNwYZa95Lqjbwt0wa6IElWHFowSk5mkNt3DejnIQQvlRiMFqFEb4wCmoODilNC3juw5CCAMgJhA9yKs5uJH7zXqM2SDwEAtl_6ZKbUHrvE3v7D0Pm9dtI_W9srUB5Mzk_NxHH26-YRHPXsm5z1HauQrk_NbjhF9o5yYnEN-8i2_KN35QSnwVn62nftCGyUXuXcVK2_uGyvP60oeefHJgRknJbpiw35QjFS1YYO4b47im9T-eell5V8AAAD__ygoatY) two federal criminal cases against President-elect Donald Trump to align with its policy that a sitting president cannot be prosecuted, agency sources say. Trump was [indicted last year](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kDGPhSAQhH8NdhhYPdGC4hq7d-2VRmF98oJAYH3m_v2F-wHXbXYyM_nm-7E8VuddeH6tJ2ra4wICei4lF2pJOZaEhhbZWL0jAnYNaqk6MakJBtUcuu8s4C6mdetxg95aCaM1cho3s4_biI3TNVBKoaQUkxxaYXf1YUZjBhzqk_UCraOY21d0gQ7c_U98Y25NPBuvD6JUWPfJYGYw3_fdmq0EvEvVGcz1ZDC_rkLOILeY1kwnBuKUrzPxCuBWz028QkHPKxOai1wM1ddkbdPtvHdlUKwXz3N1_q-a_lnjreE3AAD__86DZkg) in two cases led by Special Counsel Jack Smith: one for alleged mishandling of sensitive government records and another for purportedly attempting to overturn the 2020 election. This development [would allow Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLGO8yAQhJ_G7ojYBUNcUPxNuvztlRZZloQI2whIonv7k-8BrpxvpNHo-7ouV59y2u7__cqux31BiVoACGmXUvdWmPoCY3CRGVmN7MAqOdsZjR0fTpGMFpXls9YmKkKYFPHNzCGiBJ7H5I5BAGkB5AzmJEO0E52JDJsDDlpySH2vp-eetv7gmL_3N9cT7euY3aP30gb1b8DLgBdfNv60ozpC7YkyD3jp9bUW8fSbMOL5aj0Ri8DF177y1gVl31qKiYMIO70O1oQEwjBpsDZYmvUcDXqYjNQe7U2xHKsL5ZNyTs3YQcv76lP-PdX_8PR2-BMAAP__puhqvQ) to enter the White House without the burden of federal criminal prosecutions, which once posed potential felony convictions and prison sentences. Former Attorney General [William Barr has urged](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLFuhDAQRL8GukW24WwoXKShu7QpEWcvsJHBltd3JH8fcR-QdkYavXlf9-k-U6Bj_Zx3tGWJkxKqAylBmCnlyAldmWTt7YKosK3RStOKwQxKm3qzWvVS3NA7cfOLl64d-q515tFr1MtghprsNSilMFKKQepG-MXcXO-cRn2FVSfQU4m5-Y50lA2X8BtfmBsX9zrYrZTEVftRqbFS43mezRJ_Djz56is1phiokONKjQ8KAR5zznCBo3uWmBl4i8_gwUfItG4FykbHCp54J2Yo-bkncDMjQ8b3W0gYU0AGj46Y4lFn69NJIRBrU3Vi3WcKb7zyj7GXVX8BAAD__9n1c4s) prosecutors to drop pending state and federal charges against Trump, advocating for the cases' dismissal before Trump assumes office again.

Click any link in today’s ad to | Trump Overperforms with Minority Voters Women, Latino, black, youth, and white-and-suburban male voters were the that led to President-elect Donald Trump’s dominant Election Day victory, according to an AP VoteCast analysis. Trump received , while Vice President Kamala Harris garnered 44%, marking a significant shift from 2020 when Biden led with 59%, representing a major realignment in that demographic. Harris also underperformed with Latino women, winning by a 25-point margin compared to Biden’s 39-point lead in 2020. Overall, according to exit polls, a majority of white and suburban male voters while securing about 13% of black voters and 45% of Latino voters, a significant increase from 2020, when he won 8% of black voters and 32% of Latino voters. Stock Market, Bitcoin Skyrocket After Election Financial markets surged Wednesday following Donald Trump's election win on Tuesday night. The Dow Jones Industrial Average to a record close of 43,729.93, the biggest single-day leap since November 2022. The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq also closed at record highs. Bitcoin's response . The cryptocurrency soared even before the election was officially called. It eventually climbed as much as 9%, reaching an all-time high above $75,000. Meanwhile, the dollar also against several currencies, including the Japanese yen, the pound, and the euro. DOJ Weighs How to Drop Trump Cases The Justice Department is two federal criminal cases against President-elect Donald Trump to align with its policy that a sitting president cannot be prosecuted, agency sources say. Trump was in two cases led by Special Counsel Jack Smith: one for alleged mishandling of sensitive government records and another for purportedly attempting to overturn the 2020 election. This development to enter the White House without the burden of federal criminal prosecutions, which once posed potential felony convictions and prison sentences. Former Attorney General prosecutors to drop pending state and federal charges against Trump, advocating for the cases' dismissal before Trump assumes office again. name: History Facts
subject: What country used to have 10-hour days?
body:
French Revolutionary Time was a short-lived concept that used a base-10 timekeeping system. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68beoszxh46el91pvwjwblb0x6tm4zudb3m7vtdmnfqnt4uzsc8fdd7j7q47ow1aung62f41cm9asgil83nkcubqbualpdvb5zy9n4q5ktbhg0lwb2zu767ocl2yn1fxutt0uyj7wgjq29zje&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smkxob&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [France had a calendar with 10-hour days during the revolution.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smkxob&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smkxob&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smkxob&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| F rench Revolutionary Time was a short-lived concept that used a base-10 timekeeping system. Otherwise known as “decimal time,” this unprecedented method [included](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smkxob&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) 10-hour days, 100 minutes per hour, and 100 seconds per minute. Each day was divided into 10 equal parts, with “zero” marking the start (what is now midnight) and “five” denoting the midpoint (noon). This meant that every hour was more than twice as long as an hour of standard time. New clocks and watches were even manufactured displaying both decimal time and standard time, to considerable confusion.
---
While France formally adopted this practice on November 24, 1793, the idea was first promoted in 1754. That year, mathematician Jean le Rond d’Alembert drew inspiration from the base-10 numeral system that had existed since ancient times and argued that it would be easier and more convenient to calculate times that were divisible by 10. The concept was revived in 1788 and met with enthusiasm from French revolutionaries seeking to shed their ties to the past. French Revolutionary Time was later adopted by the French Parliament, though it proved to be unpopular among citizens who found the switch confusing. The new system was deemed optional on April 7, 1795, and the country ultimately reverted to the previous timekeeping method.
In addition to changing how the country kept time, revolutionary France also adopted the French Republican calendar. The new formula divided the year into 12 months, each of which contained three 10-day weeks. To bring the total days up to 365, France tacked on five additional days at the end of the year as holidays. Debuted on October 24, 1793, the new calendar was also short-lived, and was abolished by Napoleon Bonaparte on January 1, 1806.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smkxob&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smkxob&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!
---
| [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1wbmisw9fj43g0kpltyu2kjw4zfakkvmsmzmisdlro0hz1cf9wchfqzc7ohy5ztls0hxmrteub5xraomz7br8ovm3lzgukjo3wywblbnr16ilv9e4ake1ksvzn9jnegpteyfq6k088aqkyyl2cluspsq4uqhduueooyauzcjmg34irsr1l6908qnkroazy4prpem2sujvyvdfzre65ryaaucgxh9qyocd4u73v6fbrn6kblx7du9b0rtw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smkxob&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
## By the Numbers
| | Days in the longest recorded year in history (46 BCE)
---
445
| | Year the Gregorian calendar was introduced
---
1582
| Year the Gregorian calendar was introduced
---
1582
| | Months in an alternative calendar proposed by Kodak
---
13
| | Average difference (in seconds) between the Gregorian calendar and solar year
---
26
| Average difference (in seconds) between the Gregorian calendar and solar year
---
26
| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## September 1752 was only 19 days long in Britain.
In 1752, the month of September was only 19 days long throughout the British Empire (including its colonies in America), due to the Calendar (New Style) Act of 1750. That parliamentary move transferred the British from the Julian calendar to the Gregorian calendar, the former having overestimated each year's length by about 11 minutes. Back in 1582, Pope Gregory XIII had declared that all countries under the dominion of the Catholic Church needed to adopt the Gregorian calendar, but many Protestant nations — including England — resisted those demands. When Britain finally converted to the Gregorian calendar in 1752 in an effort to catch up with other nations, the country [jumped](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smkxob&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) straight from September 2 to September 14, skipping the 11 days in between to account for the errors of the old calendar.
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!
---
| [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1wbmisw9fj43g0kpltyu2kjw4zfakkvmsn1mr4694qnt2xcjd6dnxds2sph4ulgbe8tkuz66ozwx8mkvuw5cr202zuv7gsuq2k8pc4nb8jkpsqbytlifpx6jl4gncxa8ae70xgfj6zd07cajlc6b2jvckjxhh52ob794i2trf6sdyvoz4fubhbcuxvmh5fclh5v71g1aikjnq3kvvbk7kgh8wx7vmi2mpn3eg59l5oyxexj3hkkus3rjn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smkxob&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
