clean_body: French Revolutionary Time was a short-lived concept that used a base-10 timekeeping system. | F rench Revolutionary Time was a short-lived concept that used a base-10 timekeeping system. Otherwise known as “decimal time,” this unprecedented method 10-hour days, 100 minutes per hour, and 100 seconds per minute. Each day was divided into 10 equal parts, with “zero” marking the start (what is now midnight) and “five” denoting the midpoint (noon). This meant that every hour was more than twice as long as an hour of standard time. New clocks and watches were even manufactured displaying both decimal time and standard time, to considerable confusion. While France formally adopted this practice on November 24, 1793, the idea was first promoted in 1754. That year, mathematician Jean le Rond d’Alembert drew inspiration from the base-10 numeral system that had existed since ancient times and argued that it would be easier and more convenient to calculate times that were divisible by 10. The concept was revived in 1788 and met with enthusiasm from French revolutionaries seeking to shed their ties to the past. French Revolutionary Time was later adopted by the French Parliament, though it proved to be unpopular among citizens who found the switch confusing. The new system was deemed optional on April 7, 1795, and the country ultimately reverted to the previous timekeeping method. In addition to changing how the country kept time, revolutionary France also adopted the French Republican calendar. The new formula divided the year into 12 months, each of which contained three 10-day weeks. To bring the total days up to 365, France tacked on five additional days at the end of the year as holidays. Debuted on October 24, 1793, the new calendar was also short-lived, and was abolished by Napoleon Bonaparte on January 1, 1806. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Days in the longest recorded year in history (46 BCE) 445 | | Year the Gregorian calendar was introduced 1582 | Year the Gregorian calendar was introduced 1582 | | Months in an alternative calendar proposed by Kodak 13 | | Average difference (in seconds) between the Gregorian calendar and solar year 26 | Average difference (in seconds) between the Gregorian calendar and solar year 26 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- September 1752 was only 19 days long in Britain. In 1752, the month of September was only 19 days long throughout the British Empire (including its colonies in America), due to the Calendar (New Style) Act of 1750. That parliamentary move transferred the British from the Julian calendar to the Gregorian calendar, the former having overestimated each year's length by about 11 minutes. Back in 1582, Pope Gregory XIII had declared that all countries under the dominion of the Catholic Church needed to adopt the Gregorian calendar, but many Protestant nations — including England — resisted those demands. When Britain finally converted to the Gregorian calendar in 1752 in an effort to catch up with other nations, the country straight from September 2 to September 14, skipping the 11 days in between to account for the errors of the old calendar. name: Neil Parrott
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=5a45ee1154&u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=27284bf4b2)
---
|
---
| | Peter,

We expected this election to be close, and it is. Thanks to you and people like you, I am running neck and neck with my opponent.

Right now, only 315 votes out of 320,000 cast separate my opponent from me \- that's only a 0.098% difference.

_Today, the first round of vote-by-mail ballots will be counted in all 5 counties._ We have poll watchers planning to be at each of the counting locations to make sure the votes are counted fairly and accurately.

**I am asking for your prayers today. ****Also, I urgently need your immediate help to make sure every ballot is counted. No more, no less.**
---

| This race can still go either way. It is extremely close. Volunteers and I have been working day in and day out because we CARE ABOUT OUR COUNTRY!

Could you donate right now to help make sure the count is performed accurately?

| | | | | Peter, Here’s what we know: Pennsylvania’s Senate race is not over, and we still have work to do. If we’re going to send Bob Casey back to the Senate and hold the line for our rights and freedoms, we need your immediate support to ensure that every last vote in this PA Senate race is counted. [The job isn’t done until every last vote is counted, so please, split $10 or whatever you can right now between Bob Casey and Blue Amp Action to send Bob back to the Senate and push back against Republicans.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a41cbb4-5309-4402-842a-5831e233b84e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/7/2024
body:
A full rundown of this week's election results in Colorado and nationwide
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Dear Friends,
Victory is here! Last night’s election confirmed what we’ve all been fighting for: a return to American values and leadership with President Trump at the helm. It’s a historic win for the future of this country, and we couldn’t be more thrilled to be on this journey with you.
This edition of our newsletter with **ALL Rocky Mountain Voice original content** is the perfect example to how our newsroom’s election coverage has been invaluable in reaching Coloradans with clear, truthful reporting -- 150,000 subscribers strong. Every story we publish is part of the ongoing effort to shift the tides, to elevate voices that stand for freedom, security, and prosperity. Thanks to supporters like you, we’re able to get this message out to the people who need it most.
The road ahead will demand persistence and unity. We know that with your continued support, we can keep providing the high-quality, fact-driven journalism that is so crucial to winning hearts and minds.
****
**Will you celebrate with us by supporting our nonprofit newsroom today?**
---
[MAKE A DONATION](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Together, we’ll keep the momentum going, illuminate the truth, and help pave the way for future victories. Thank you for being part of this journey. This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, November 7, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[It’s a party in MAGA Country, as Trump’s return to White House signals a mandate for change](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
When Americans awoke Nov. 6, following an Election Night which went into the wee hours of the early morning, they learned Donald J. Trump had been elected as the 47th U.S. President with 286 electoral votes, defeating Kamala Harris.
The broad support of working-class Americans, resulting in Trump’s win, signals a clear call to tackle the nation’s pressing issues.
Trump won important battleground states, including Georgia, North Carolina and Pennsylvania. This secured his victory.
This election also marked the first time since 2004 that a Republican has won the national popular vote, a milestone CNN contributor Scott Jennings described as “a big deal.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Analysis: Harris dominated in seven Front Range Colorado counties, deciding election](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Kamala Harris won Colorado decisively, with a strong 11.5% margin over Donald Trump, driven largely by high support in seven Front Range counties, including Larimer, Boulder, Adams, and Denver.
* Despite solid support for Trump in rural Eastern Colorado, lower population counts in those areas could not offset the higher urban voter turnout that benefited Harris.
* The urban-rural divide in Colorado illustrates how Democrats can focus campaign efforts on populous areas, while Republicans face the challenge of reaching voters across all counties in the state.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[How did Colorado vote? Here’s a quick rundown on 2024 statewide ballot initiatives](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado voters approved several statewide measures, including Amendment 79, which secures a constitutional right to abortion, and Amendment G, which expands property tax exemptions for veterans with certain disabilities.
* Proposition 128, which increases the minimum time for parole eligibility for violent offenses, and Proposition KK, a 6.5% excise tax on firearms to fund mental health and safety initiatives, also passed.
* Not all measures succeeded; Amendment 80, promoting school choice, and Proposition 131, proposing ranked-choice voting, were among those rejected by Colorado voters.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[All eyes remain on 8th District race where Caraveo, Evans are split by 3,817 votes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado’s 8th District congressional race remains highly competitive, with Democrat Yadira Caraveo leading Republican Gabe Evans by a narrow 3,817 votes, or 1.59%, just above the threshold for a mandatory recount.
* The district has a clear geographic divide, with Evans leading in Weld County and Caraveo gaining strong support in Adams County, along with a slight lead in Larimer County.
* Uncounted military and absentee ballots could still affect the outcome, as a win for Evans would give Republicans a net gain in Colorado’s congressional delegation, while a Caraveo victory would secure a Democratic 5-3 advantage.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[With win over Frisch, Jeff Hurd has held Colorado’s 3rd District for Republicans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Republican Jeff Hurd secured Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District seat, defeating Democrat Adam Frisch in a close race marked by contentious claims and high spending.
* Frisch conceded after trailing by 12,413 votes despite raising significantly more campaign funds than Hurd; he also performed better than Kamala Harris in the district.
* Hurd emphasized his commitment to representing local values, focusing on issues like border security, energy independence, and water rights, and praised the spirited nature of the campaign.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Navarro flips 8th District seat on board of education, Democrats grasp on board loosened](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Yazmin Navarro won the 8th District seat on the Colorado State Board of Education, defeating Democrat Rhonda Solis, which loosens the Democratic majority on the board.
* Navarro focused on restoring education as a key to young Coloradans’ success, achieving significant support in Weld and Larimer counties, while Solis led in Adams County.
* This win reflects a broader shift, as Republicans gained multiple seats on the board, indicating a push for education policies aligned with conservative values.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ELECTION MUST-READS 🗳️**
**[Colorado Democrats maintain control of the state legislature, but their path to a supermajority is slim](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **THE COLORADO SUN | STATE | NOVEMBER 6** _Colorado Democrats held on to their large majorities at the statehouse, but their path to a rare legislative supermajority in both the House and Senate was shrinking Wednesday morning, with a handful of races still too close to call._
**[Trump vows to lead ‘golden age of America’ and to ‘fix everything’ in victory speech](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **FOX NEWS | NATIONAL | NOVEMBER 6** _President-elect Donald Trump addressed his supporters in the nation early Wednesday morning after earning more than 270 electoral votes, vowing he will lead the “golden age of America” after launching the “greatest political movement of all time.”_
[**When was the last time the Republican Party won the popular vote?**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **THE HILL | NATIONAL |****NOVEMBER 6** _Former President Donald Trump has won the presidency over Vice President Kamala Harris, winning both the electoral college vote and the popular vote, something that has become very rare for a Republican candidate to do since the turn of the century._
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** Grover Cleveland is renowned for his reformist agenda and opposition to tariffs, foreshadowing the free-trade movement of the 1890s. However, the 22nd and 24th president is perhaps best remembered for being the only president to **serve two non-consecutive terms** —an achievement only recently matched by Donald Trump with his 2024 election victory.
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY**
“Every citizen, I will fight for you, for your family and your future. Every single day, I will be fighting for you. And with every breath in my body, I will not rest until we have delivered the strong, safe and prosperous America that our children deserve and that you deserve. **This will truly be the golden age of America.** ” – Donald J. Trump, 45th and 47th President of the United States of America
|

This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, November 7, 2024. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY JEN SCHUMANN, When Americans awoke Nov. 6, following an Election Night which went into the wee hours of the early morning, they learned Donald J. Trump had been elected as the 47th U.S. President with 286 electoral votes, defeating Kamala Harris. The broad support of working-class Americans, resulting in Trump’s win, signals a clear call to tackle the nation’s pressing issues. Trump won important battleground states, including Georgia, North Carolina and Pennsylvania. This secured his victory. This election also marked the first time since 2004 that a Republican has won the national popular vote, a milestone CNN contributor Scott Jennings described as “a big deal.” | Kamala Harris won Colorado decisively, with a strong 11.5% margin over Donald Trump, driven largely by high support in seven Front Range counties, including Larimer, Boulder, Adams, and Denver. Despite solid support for Trump in rural Eastern Colorado, lower population counts in those areas could not offset the higher urban voter turnout that benefited Harris. The urban-rural divide in Colorado illustrates how Democrats can focus campaign efforts on populous areas, while Republicans face the challenge of reaching voters across all counties in the state. | Colorado voters approved several statewide measures, including Amendment 79, which secures a constitutional right to abortion, and Amendment G, which expands property tax exemptions for veterans with certain disabilities. Proposition 128, which increases the minimum time for parole eligibility for violent offenses, and Proposition KK, a 6.5% excise tax on firearms to fund mental health and safety initiatives, also passed. Not all measures succeeded; Amendment 80, promoting school choice, and Proposition 131, proposing ranked-choice voting, were among those rejected by Colorado voters. | Colorado’s 8th District congressional race remains highly competitive, with Democrat Yadira Caraveo leading Republican Gabe Evans by a narrow 3,817 votes, or 1.59%, just above the threshold for a mandatory recount. The district has a clear geographic divide, with Evans leading in Weld County and Caraveo gaining strong support in Adams County, along with a slight lead in Larimer County. Uncounted military and absentee ballots could still affect the outcome, as a win for Evans would give Republicans a net gain in Colorado’s congressional delegation, while a Caraveo victory would secure a Democratic 5-3 advantage. | Republican Jeff Hurd secured Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District seat, defeating Democrat Adam Frisch in a close race marked by contentious claims and high spending. Frisch conceded after trailing by 12,413 votes despite raising significantly more campaign funds than Hurd; he also performed better than Kamala Harris in the district. Hurd emphasized his commitment to representing local values, focusing on issues like border security, energy independence, and water rights, and praised the spirited nature of the campaign. | Yazmin Navarro won the 8th District seat on the Colorado State Board of Education, defeating Democrat Rhonda Solis, which loosens the Democratic majority on the board. Navarro focused on restoring education as a key to young Coloradans’ success, achieving significant support in Weld and Larimer counties, while Solis led in Adams County. This win reflects a broader shift, as Republicans gained multiple seats on the board, indicating a push for education policies aligned with conservative values. | ELECTION MUST-READS 🗳️ THE COLORADO SUN | STATE | NOVEMBER 6 Colorado Democrats held on to their large majorities at the statehouse, but their path to a rare legislative supermajority in both the House and Senate was shrinking Wednesday morning, with a handful of races still too close to call. FOX NEWS | NATIONAL | NOVEMBER 6 President-elect Donald Trump addressed his supporters in the nation early Wednesday morning after earning more than 270 electoral votes, vowing he will lead the “golden age of America” after launching the “greatest political movement of all time.” THE HILL | NATIONAL |NOVEMBER 6 Former President Donald Trump has won the presidency over Vice President Kamala Harris, winning both the electoral college vote and the popular vote, something that has become very rare for a Republican candidate to do since the turn of the century. Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🤔 DID YOU KNOW? Grover Cleveland is renowned for his reformist agenda and opposition to tariffs, foreshadowing the free-trade movement of the 1890s. However, the 22nd and 24th president is perhaps best remembered for being the only president to serve two non-consecutive terms —an achievement only recently matched by Donald Trump with his 2024 election victory. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY “Every citizen, I will fight for you, for your family and your future. Every single day, I will be fighting for you. And with every breath in my body, I will not rest until we have delivered the strong, safe and prosperous America that our children deserve and that you deserve. This will truly be the golden age of America. ” – Donald J. Trump, 45th and 47th President of the United States of America | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. name: Drew MacEwen
subject: Thank You!
body:
Hello All,

As you know we did not prevail in our race. We did improve the performance for our side in the 6th District, but the real goal was not achieved.

There is much work to be done in WA in order to turn the tide, and I am committed to being part of that effort. I will continue to serve as a state senator and work towards common sense solutions all while embarking on a mission to turn the tide in this state.

From the bottom of my heart I am forever grateful for the support you gave me. Truly, it is humbling. It was an exciting year and met a lot of wonderful people along the way. Thank you!

We will stay in touch!

\--

Kindest Regards,
Senator Drew MacEwen
[www.votedrewmac.com](http://www.votedrewmac.com)

Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zouq4ga8h6o5m4jlcfkv4gs4puqcdv4eo5hsbjm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1g68pb4cdh2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z14tl9o1bsqq5gc1cq3jkils3240055amc44ucg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1g68pb4cdh2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi047nmnhplc7qgaftq93071tequom27f5apsdu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4c1g68pb4cdh2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson

body:

He fought for America when we needed him most.

Americans all over the country woke up this morning with a sigh of relief knowing Trump was coming back to the oval office.
President Trump has been and always will be an American first President and that is exactly what America _**NEEDS RIGHT NOW!**_
_**The country has spoken.**_
Thank President Trump for never giving up on you.

subject: Happy Birthday to the U.S. Marine Corps! (sign our card) 🎂
body:
Happy Birthday, Marine Corps
[](https://www.uso.org)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.)
---

[](https://links.e.uso.)

[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/jbd6CAyN_4cj/Ym9hUWNRMEdPSXF5cmpIQ2hLc3o1a2lnRTBlUlB3dlc1b1ptMTlXVUxwK05KU0k1TVN4UHJ0N2QrNGRwUVZ3UWVoYW84L1lwTE1PaG04TllGZUtQS0JMaHhWOHpEVDlBR0dKRlVVU3MvZmc9S0/YnhTNE9IRnpKUkJHN1hvOEtPUUJDdzFHRklaY1R2a3RoWnhZOWE0ZXRLSHI2MzlzUXU4TWJzK0dpL0NHSDVCTldwamVySzBPQ3VXNmp4SytlRFhGZ2ZLQkZIUUJrWElqS0)
---
USO Supporter,
On November 10, 1775, at the Tun Tavern in Philadelphia, the U. S. Marine Corps was born. And on Sunday, we honor "The Few and The Proud" by celebrating the Marine Corps' 249th birthday.
**[Will you sign the Marine Corps' birthday card now to show your gratitude for our brave Marines through the years?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/XDEAH9E0VPT~/Ym9hUWNRMEdPSXF5cmpIQ2hLc3o1a2lnRTBlUlB3dlc1b1ptMTlXVUxwK05KU0k1TVN4UHJ0N2QrNGRwUVZ3UWVoYW84L1lwTE1PaG04TllGZUtQS0JMaHhWOHpEVDlBR0dKRlVVU3MvZmc9S0/YnhTNE9IRnpKUkJHN1hvOEtPUUJDdzFHRklaY1R2a3RoWnhZOWE0ZXRLSHI2MzlzUXU4TWJzK0dpL0NHSDVCTldwamVySzBPQ3VXNmp4SytlRFhGZ2ZLQkZIUUJrWElqS0)**[ ](https://links.e.uso.)
[SIGN THE MARINE CORPS BIRTHDAY CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
The Marine Corps' birthday is a big deal here at the USO, not only to celebrate the storied history of the Marines but also to honor the sacrifice of thousands of active Marines who stand at the ready and are currently deployed, often far from their loved ones.
**[That's why we set a goal to reach 50,000 signatures via email and text message through Sunday. Please, will you sign the card to wish the USMC a happy 249th birthday and honor service members around the globe? ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/6jKZHVD4~dSP/Ym9hUWNRMEdPSXF5cmpIQ2hLc3o1a2lnRTBlUlB3dlc1b1ptMTlXVUxwK05KU0k1TVN4UHJ0N2QrNGRwUVZ3UWVoYW84L1lwTE1PaG04TllGZUtQS0JMaHhWOHpEVDlBR0dKRlVVU3MvZmc9S0/YnhTNE9IRnpKUkJHN1hvOEtPUUJDdzFHRklaY1R2a3RoWnhZOWE0ZXRLSHI2MzlzUXU4TWJzK0dpL0NHSDVCTldwamVySzBPQ3VXNmp4SytlRFhGZ2ZLQkZIUUJrWElqS0)**
[SIGN THE MARINE CORPS BIRTHDAY CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for supporting our military, and Semper Fi!
--The USO

body:
| | | [](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=bbbfa31764e14f808f6ef8fefb81fbc5&_e=IBGnNz0bUobU5TeiXfuJTR_nVPVvc7xz1ojoFM8VLCijMBfuliRvIUoYb3cp3eTBtKgCP1oRxonILNHLD1rTKmKmgb9d6XRFJgNQ1BZGTguN8ajpySfgKz9KVSuRZf8zgXsav_p5bHT95KTW8bUw64NFYbGhuCFE9EEGRSJI3CV7gHHqii2SeFMku9l_zk2K6saNyrFHig2DCL7IOfO1JbfJnLnfxkdxp9mQSaMPZVia0eOCKl8xnTJGhNdORIzmdAvOtRAm2Q87Xhx9tS8U2ZVWpcMAv31goqqq_TI6wpoT6vnmUztoyrSGKR9BmYK3yR9poN-tnNw4OskNi3MCVw66SxncOvpQDOMYwy6GMC_et9arBZo3SNqreAEQCDMeWUIOpi_PHxx0--1yq2sEHfl0V2-gxPN0xzxu--vFI-yYbHDf7aZ7SDMLnOtYq37q) Are you awake, Peter? I’m sorry for the early morning email – but I have important election news out of Nevada, and I have nowhere else to turn. Our U.S. Senate race here in Nevada is still too close to call, meaning this race will come down to just a handful of votes. My campaign is hard at work phone banking and canvassing to help with ballot curing and to ensure every last vote is properly counted. But we spent all of our resources to get through Election Day, and now we need emergency funds to keep this work going until the race is officially called. **My senior advisors and I just met, and they told me we need to raise another $136,299 to keep this work going.** **[Will you chip in a split donation to my campaign and Defeat Boebert PAC now to help get us across the finish line?](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=bbbfa31764e14f808f6ef8fefb81fbc5&_e=IBGnNz0bUobU5TeiXfuJTR_nVPVvc7xz1ojoFM8VLCijMBfuliRvIUoYb3cp3eTBtKgCP1oRxonILNHLD1rTKmKmgb9d6XRFJgNQ1BZGTguN8ajpySfgKz9KVSuRZf8zgXsav_p5bHT95KTW8bUw64NFYbGhuCFE9EEGRSJI3CV7gHHqii2SeFMku9l_zk2K6saNyrFHig2DCL7IOfO1JbfJnLnfxkdxp9mQSaMPZVia0eOCKl8xnTJGhNdORIzmdAvOtRAm2Q87Xhx9tS8U2ZVWpcMAv31goqqq_TI6wpr1iRiiu3DMRWP_VCy3spjDrJOUXtMYSqjxIewUHKMPLP2KmKrn_vi5K2GL6sgejb4nuJf4CebJVWDhJBXUnCSCjk3SK6R3Urkd9f36hKie8Oxxfcg-YWGZfqNfZsv90rTQ9AITGlusQm-HoJxnpoc1)** **[**RUSH MY DONATION**](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=bbbfa31764e14f808f6ef8fefb81fbc5&_e=IBGnNz0bUobU5TeiXfuJTR_nVPVvc7xz1ojoFM8VLCijMBfuliRvIUoYb3cp3eTBtKgCP1oRxonILNHLD1rTKmKmgb9d6XRFJgNQ1BZGTguN8ajpySfgKz9KVSuRZf8zgXsav_p5bHT95KTW8bUw64NFYbGhuCFE9EEGRSJI3CV7gHHqii2SeFMku9l_zk2K6saNyrFHig2DCL7IOfO1JbfJnLnfxkdxp9mQSaMPZVia0eOCKl8xnTJGhNdORIzmnBixdFtPO7RKr6_rToussBUPYP4qNzWJgY9lHE3eCe8KmtKuvOZ8r5i7vezfQXi_ddVjQ82n1NqE_m5BkTYFhYqPX_sqhjckxjsIJrLhSmi-HEiKblbUI8rjITTUZZ7htRVD_Yb6XDZ1V2cTT2tOOUyMzEB8ltsHIJlJdjbDUrE%3D)** You can bet Republicans are going to put up a fight. But you and I know what hard work looks like – and I’m confident that we have what it takes to win in Nevada again if we can make it through this final step. | | | | | | | This may be the **#1 best way to conceal a handgun in your car.**
It's the **new and extremely popular GunMagnet.com magnetic mount --**[**which is 75% OFF right now on this page here**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19032/6374453/251596a83c626b975e7ade426652d5884b41d3a2/60d697630ee054f9745ccc07d7c82060c6a68000).
People have been _**going nuts**_ for it.
And not only is it perfect for the car...
It easily mounts just about anywhere and lets you chamber a round, draw, and fire in **under 1.5 seconds.**
---
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19032/6374453/251596a83c626b975e7ade426652d5884b41d3a2/60d697630ee054f9745ccc07d7c82060c6a68000)
---
| | | It's truly one of the _**best places to keep your gun**_ whenever it isn't either locked up or on your person.
But that's not the only reason people love it:

* **Easily Mounts In Your Car, At Home, and Anywhere In-Betwee**
* ****Works With 99% of All Modern Flat-Top Handguns****
* **Will NEVER Scratch Your Guns**
* **Mounts Anywhere In Minutes (No Drilling Needed)**
* **Accommodates a Wide Range of Weapon-Mounted Sights and Accessories**

And like we said...
**Right now, you can get 75% OFF.**
The first shipment of these sold out in a matter of days.
The second one did as well...
We're on our third shipment, and there are **no promises** on how long it'll be before they're gone again.
[**So grab one NOW while you still can!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19032/6374453/251596a83c626b975e7ade426652d5884b41d3a2/60d697630ee054f9745ccc07d7c82060c6a68000)

Dear Peter, United Sovereign American’s litigation strategy successfully prevented the injection of 20 million votes! This success is a total endorsement of our superior research and strategy! Even though Election Day is behind us, USA volunteers are not resting. We are already preparing to leverage the upper hand and keep applying pressure. In fact, we are in possession of reams of data that haven’t yet been used in court, and it will be. USA’s success is possible because of our amazing volunteers and generous donors! Our effort will not stop. We will continue restoring our republic using our proven litigation and war-gaming strategy that secured a valid 2024 Presidential Election. We have 18 months until the 2026 Congressional Primaries. USA will be working day and night to ensure that every candidate on a federal ballot is accountable to We The People! Please stay tuned for updates on how you can help us continue this amazing effort, for which we are immensely grateful! In the meantime, if you or anyone you know had trouble voting, please report a complaint [here](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VWDY2b74J923N8L1D49R601GW89-nNw5n5J-nN1vWRr-3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3kzW18Plh_1gMjcWW4nsQ_z57sJTBW9khzjx3ZFp43W5GgW2t5Vn9R9W4nfD3m4CCYZhW5-8Blq8FGm3mW1JG5Wk3p4WCvW2JPxJz7114fXW21SCNZ8n9sQYW4q498b6DKz_-W1wPhzd52FR7yW3dzptc4mDd4pW2XBcT64yqWg6W4rzCf-1zhsyYW5zygRG7PP1ywW2T_nGq7vfNBkW5TQbDm30cGD4W5k_bKf7s2PX-VcjMJJ2m29LjVlNpb03XRLRtW7gPYdG5xrm3HW2YsssM1ztFvwf4Td_Cd04).

clean_body: United Sovereign American’s litigation strategy successfully prevented the injection of 20 million votes! | | Dear Peter, United Sovereign American’s litigation strategy successfully prevented the injection of 20 million votes! No other effort combined forensic evidence with a wave of , putting election officials back on their heels out of concern for accountability. This success is a total endorsement of our superior research and strategy! Even though Election Day is behind us, USA volunteers are not resting. We are already preparing to leverage the upper hand and keep applying pressure. In fact, we are in possession of reams of data that haven’t yet been used in court, and it will be. USA’s success is possible because of our amazing volunteers and generous donors! Our effort will not stop. We will continue restoring our republic using our proven litigation and war-gaming strategy that secured a valid 2024 Presidential Election. We have 18 months until the 2026 Congressional Primaries. USA will be working day and night to ensure that every candidate on a federal ballot is accountable to We The People! Please stay tuned for updates on how you can help us continue this amazing effort, for which we are immensely grateful! In the meantime, if you or anyone you know had trouble voting, please report a complaint . Thank you taking action to enforce valid elections! With Gratitude, Marly Hornik CEO, United Sovereign Americans | United Sovereign Americans, Inc., a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization, Suite 194, 167 LAMP & LANTERN VILLAGE, CHESTERFIELD, MO 63017

name: Kelly Morrison
subject: Thank you, Peter
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
There is a lot for all of us to process today, and we will in the days ahead, but I would like to say thank you . While the national results are not what we were hoping for or expecting, I am so grateful that the people of Minnesota’s 3rd district put their trust in me and elected the first and only pro-choice OB-GYN to Congress. It is my honor to serve MN-03 in Washington, and now more than ever, I am ready to get to work.
Photo of Kelly with the words ''Victory MN-03'' in the background and the headlines ''Congresswoman Elect kelly Morrison'' ''Thank you!'' [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/graphics/congresswoman-kelly-morrison.jpg]
Peter, I love this community, and this team. You all have shown up for me and for each other, time and time again, and I know this time won’t be any different. I am ready to take my experience as a doctor and a legislator who has always worked across the aisle to listen to people, to get meaningful legislation passed, and to continue to be a voice for the issues that mean so much to so many of us.
I hope you get some rest this week, and then join me in getting back to work for everyone in MN-03, and across America. Thank you, again, for your confidence in this campaign.
With so much gratitude,
Kelly Morrison
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]
Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date on the campaign.
If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=5yNHfsSLaBgdCfLuqcPN43VzUOtLJVTzNq41t7Svv9Tl2NTtIXcgAGbt89NRm%2BaiWQKctJjOPi1HYyZn9dWkhXQ2AC%2F5hpZgYfb4tU6E6yIAP0RefVNbkGFuiFmfhJjGyOZbDR2HcXpR60mfh6SzuiBSSNLFNVCqztvo%2BOEiY62lzlebSsA1NLVxXfGUzAbaWv4mdPWriDhBqDgSwyjNbwaKJ5Xhz5d%2Fxib2z29mkrzg8231fkeUkFGtS76rntf6Xt2DzGvhQA%2FcURAjnruxvhOSx%2FkvbCWqCAl%2BNpVEFwc4kUnjhjU2FyJ6Qm0F55DJg24bn5p%2BbQpg9D4%2BmwRwHNf3U2LBdrSITEi50ZANgBlk5s8LMOircAF%2BPw1gOniLNWr%2BnbsMtEsaIsdpC%2BfIHw7F221AzWoXFar3yn4bOHgPRv%2Bri9Iq2QNqix4URd4v] .
Morrison for Congress

Wayzata, MN 55391

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: thank you for all your hard work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Team,

The results Tuesday night were shocking. So many of us woke up with a pit in our stomach, worried about our children, our country, and our future. There is so much at stake. The issues we fight for and the values that guide us are more important than ever.

I just want to take a moment to thank you for everything you did for me and for northern Jersey the past two years, helping to send me back to DC for my fifth term. Whether you attended an event, knocked on a door, made a phone call, sent a text, or put up a sign, every little bit made a huge difference and helped us secure a big victory.

Together, we will continue to fight against far-right extremists and protect our democracy. I am fiercely determined to stand up for our Jersey Values, defend our cherished rights, and help families get ahead. I’ll never back down. Side by side with you, I know we will prevail, for our country and for our state.

Thank you again for your support.

Yours,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: The road ahead is tough, but we must walk it. Together.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1386%2E791427%2E0HAhq3)

Dear friend — I want to talk to you candidly today.
Donald Trump has won the presidency. Again. For those of us in this progressive movement and those who care deeply for our democracy, the last 48 hours have been completely devastating and demoralizing.
And I won’t sugarcoat it. A majority of the American people turned their back on the Democratic Party’s vision of the future on Tuesday and embraced an increasingly extremist far-right movement led by Donald Trump.
We have a lot to learn about how we fell so far short, especially with working class voters of all backgrounds. And while we do that soul-searching, we face down another four years with Trump in the White House.
But I want you to hear this from me: **The road ahead is tough, but we must walk it. Together.**
With so much on the line under a second Trump administration, we don’t have the privilege to give up, to go home, and to stop paying attention.
Immigrant communities face threats of mass deportations. A national abortion ban could be put before Congress. The clock could get turned back on the progress we’ve made on climate change. Israel will no doubt be emboldened to continue to its genocide in Palestine with Trump’s support.
**It’s going to be up to us — grassroots progressive organizers and the movement we’ve built together — to stand against the coming Trump agenda.** And I will continue to do everything I can as a member of Congress to oppose that agenda wherever and whenever I can.
Don’t forget, after all, that despite a Republican trifecta in 2017 and 2018, we were able to protect the Affordable Care Act, protect our undocumented neighbors, and eventually take back the House.
Like I said friend, I won’t sugarcoat it. The next four years are going to be tough. We have so much work to do to rebuild trust with working class voters, voters of color, and young voters.
And in that work we have an opportunity to shape the future of the Democratic party, to turn it towards a truly inspiring vision for prosperity and justice for all that regular folks can believe in.
If you’re ready to get started, **[make a contribution of any amount to my campaign today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov24.Rlm1iX&refcode=em241107-1-90&t=2&akid=1386%2E791427%2E0HAhq3)** Today is Day 1 of our fight against the Trump agenda.
I will always be on the side of justice, even as our democracy itself is under threat. I hope you’re with me.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[DONATE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov24.Rlm1iX&refcode=em241107-1-90&t=3&akid=1386%2E791427%2E0HAhq3)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=1386%2E791427%2E0HAhq3)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=1386%2E791427%2E0HAhq3)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=1386%2E791427%2E0HAhq3)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1386_791427_0HAhq3&akid=1386%2E791427%2E0HAhq3)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: This isn’t what we wanted
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We understand the emotions you may be feeling: sadness, anger, confusion, frustration, disappointment.
#

It’s been a difficult few days, and we want to encourage you to take some time to care for yourself. We understand the emotions you may be feeling: sadness, anger, confusion, frustration, disappointment.
These feelings are all incredibly valid, and all of us here at GIFFORDS—including Gabby—are experiencing those feelings right along with you.
But we’re also gearing up to take on the challenges that the new administration will bring. Because that work starts right now.
[**If you’re ready to turn anger into action, and to turn sadness into hope for a better future, we’re asking you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC to aid us in our work to stand up to Donald Trump in 2025 and beyond.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241107-1-30&t=1&akid=9390%2E3935704%2EAzCjGv)
We won’t pretend that the work ahead is going to be easy. Donald Trump bragged during his campaign that his first administration “did nothing” on guns. We are going to have to fight harder than ever to make sure that doesn’t happen again in his second term.
Our gun violence prevention movement has made undeniable progress since GIFFORDS was founded. In 2022, we helped pass the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ —the most significant gun safety legislation in nearly 30 years. Now, we are going to have to work hard to defend the protections and progress that this legislation has provided.
[**Are you with us? Please, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us prepare for the road ahead.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241107-1-30&t=2&akid=9390%2E3935704%2EAzCjGv)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

body:

name: Annie & Renee
subject: what comes next
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC
body:
| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9v_zDMKsOhIsGaYsSQAIlT46RJ1cLFi0RbsWsZWZVQtXmgyDsn337uID04JUXAsI6orsUbi_w-ZL2hmMGJwRhHGAYOVvEF1qit_Kf2TtONH10e4PsklkmHGU1gf9dS4TzRZuP1mDLZkYQ2hSk0KUNPsxOOpi3gpfHNTppTQevPf5hcigRPSsme3syflQBLdR1ZwEmxNfH45wmd0-Mf9ElirBB4pOVLg9K5j1SPBGKR9DCClTopqmaEaoTx9DQHKLx4VOj5VerHtNc8A0FYE8cs6ISD7KZSR3OmYpXj6GB5hkAlvJHReEVfX6MTRaxIAFIxgAs0nYiQaTb35CI4AtjKyYMSYpErIJrb-AfmNu7yx6K4KYy1jlDRxdhEFwe-hWr/4b9/SdFCjxcQQMeFHtixSEyteg/h0/h001.Lm_9YXKiud2uk-iQpc4qUzcrRjDK6ZPGIxOlWPYfd3M) | |
---
Tuesday night was hard to watch and the ultimate outcome of the presidential race the next morning was even harder to see.

First, we want to send a heartfelt **_THANK YOU_** to everyone who fought so hard this cycle to make a true difference in the lives of our kids and our country. That work doesn’t go unnoticed and it really does make a difference: From volunteering your time to making generous contributions, you’ve helped move us closer to a future that puts kids and families first.

While we’re still awaiting the final results from a handful of races, so many of our Kids First Candidates made real progress last night. From California to Illinois to Ohio, we saw major wins for Reps. Eric Swalwell, Greg Landsman, and Lauren Underwood, candidates that we KNOW are returning to Washington to fight for our kids.

And in the coming days we’re going to continue to support Rep. Yadira Caraveo, Rep. Kim Schrier, and Tony Vargas as we wait for every vote to be counted.

Second, we want to thank Vice President Kamala Harris for her historic run. She took on a near-impossible challenge to run a ground-breaking campaign, driven by hope and projecting strength when we needed it most — **_and she defied expectations at every turn_**.

She inspired us and she inspired Annie's kids and that matters.

The next four years will not be easy. We’re going to need to double down on our efforts to pass a Kids First agenda in Congress — all while dealing with and defending our children from the chaos and danger of another Trump administration.

For now, please know that every bit of progress we made this cycle was possible because of supporters like you, and our work doesn’t stop here.

Thank you for believing in a future that prioritizes the next generation.

In hope and gratitude and, of course, until the kids are alright,

Annie & Renee
* * *

| | | | | | | Untitled Document | |
Peter,

Wow - we won the Election!

I couldn't be more thrilled and honored to continue serving as Congressman for the Iowa Third Congressional District.

The past two years were a whirlwind of hard work and dedication, and I'm grateful that faithful grassroots supporters like you were on my team. Together, we knocked on hundreds of doors, rallied supporters, made phone calls, and spread our message far and wide.

We absolutely crushed it on the campaign trail this year, and it's all because of you. Thank you, Peter.

Now, I'm ready to get back to work fighting for America by putting our community first, defending your individual liberties, restoring fiscal discipline, and cutting the red tape in Washington.
_**I 'm honored to continue my mission. | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=151328130&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMzI4MTMwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzA5OTM1MzcsImV4cCI6MTczMzU4NTUzNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.K_Ej3AQQ762OSdoc6FwwT9zNZYnw3GdDGE6A2o97woE)
---
| | [](https://substack..EAwTFagsPc2vtKB5eypFnEk1DSAdkuIgs3wXDvs3bqc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/president-biden-pardon-reality-winner?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
As President Biden looks toward his final months in office, he has an opportunity to pardon an American whistleblower and hero, Reality Winner.
Winner was convicted and sentenced six years ago under the Espionage Act of 1917. She was given the longest prison sentence in American history under that statute - 63 months.
Winner has served her time and is nearing the end of her probationary period.
Winner's ability to move forward as a convicted felon has been unjustly hindered. I started getting to know Winner -- an extremely intelligent young woman -- earlier this year.
She served her country in the military. She could and should be able to use her knowledge and intelligence to get a college degree, participate in our democracy, and contribute to creating a better America.
As a fellow whistleblower, I can sympathize with what she did while recognizing the illegality.
Winner did not intend to cause harm. She did not act with malice or at the behest of foreign actors. She wanted people to know the truth. An important truth we all had a right to know.
She has already served the longest prison sentence in our nation's history for leaking a document proving Russian interference in the 2016 election. Her conviction should not prevent her from seeking employment, voting, or having the rights and privileges of every American citizen.
Winner is serving a quasi-life sentence for committing truth telling.
Please, I implore you to grant this incredible, brave woman a pardon.

(President Trump with the Network's Wyoming State Director, Jessica Rubino)
Friends,
Tuesday's landslide victory for Trump - and I do believe it was a landslide - was a huge mandate for states to implement a "Freedom Caucus" agenda.
**This is our shot and we must seize it.**
Thankfully, two of our states - Wyoming and Louisiana - are very well-positioned to do so. **Wyoming Freedom Caucus** member, State Rep. Chip Nieman, will likely be the next Wyoming House speaker. This is **revolutionary** because up until now, Democrats and liberal Republicans were fully in charge of that state. But because of the WY Freedom Caucus's strong and vocal advocacy for family, faith, and freedom, the voters rewarded conservatives with a majority in the state house. The WY Freedom Caucus's proposed 2025 agenda includes passing strong property tax relief, wiping woke DEI programs completely out of the state, and getting real school choice across the finish line.
The **Louisiana Freedom Caucus** said "hold my beer" before Trump even won earlier this week. With the help of conservative Governor Jeff Landry, they sponsored and passed dozens of conservative priorities earlier this year - like cutting the state budget in real terms, banning sanctuary cities, and enacting constitutional carry. The LA Freedom Caucus is wasting no time to carry that momentum into the future. They will be in a special session **before 2024 is even over** so that they can pass strong pro-growth tax reforms and cap spending even further.
The rest of the states in our Network are still meeting resistance from liberal Republicans and Democrats who are ignoring Trump's massive victory. The Swamps in these states are still clinging to the outdated idea of moving money - your money - to favored special interest groups and ignoring everyday Americans who just want the government out of the way.
These Swamps are going to meet significant headwinds because the freedom caucuses in these states will vocally fight them every step of the way. And we have so much support on our side. The voters, the grassroots, and YOU, are collectively the Army of Freedom who will help us win back these states.
But it's not enough to just fight these important battles in the 12 states that we are already in. The Network must expand into new states where the eventual goal - THE GOAL - is to be in all 50 states.
This is why we need to meet our current **$500,000 match** before November 30th so that we can be in the best financial position for expansion and fighting in our current states.
Right now, we have raised **$181,644.17** towards that goal. Please consider a one-time gift, or even a recurring gift, so that we're ready to rock the states in 2025.
Our State Freedom Caucuses need your help. Can we count on your support? Please donate today so we can double your investment! The match opportunity ends on **November 30** \- less than a month away.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/e5e1d251-835e-435d-a810-96b3436232c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If you don't want to donate online by clicking the button above, you can send us a check to the following:
* **State Freedom Caucus Network** (not tax deductible)
* **State Freedom Caucus Foundation** (tax deductive)

The mailing address is: 300 Independence Ave, SE, Washington, DC 20003.
We also accept stock gifts and IRA distributions. Please reach out to Dana Parish (dana@statefreedomcaucus.org) or Sara Prinzi (sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org) for more information.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider [a contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/e5e1d251-835e-435d-a810-96b3436232c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
You're currently a free subscriber to [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/redirect/f6eaaa36-3cad-40a9-8389-779ef2c15461?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.PIV2n5ocxkSATQHIYyz4gxxTdmGIkCPDtsfEGokt16g?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.PIV2n5ocxkSATQHIYyz4gxxTdmGIkCPDtsfEGokt16g?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Lila Rose
subject: No one else is coming
body:
Today, thousands of preborn children will lose their lives in brutal abortions.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=b51660b174164f92a91fbdfb6e511c1d&_t=_p3EZYanVw9mE5n5fc7UVVT9K2iLhq4X-dwRxHT3KuW3Hbg7ZQSdirx7hYhHkMlO42t5gUxDfIQTIhM2REut8UnaQdxrw1tAvxE3cXlyoEnJGRR6FWDgQR2d1v_JRZfm)_

[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b51660b174164f92a91fbdfb6e511c1d&_e=cDDg5rTfryj6fNCLaZJ7XgsX_vX0jd5gW174zQh4fMZ2--7fr4Vf1m7q7BgnixDOoGsQhd_NIeX04UQCEbJYlOT4A4f0H4cO816ZjVPXRvJjfsWtjHVu_9z8VR2naPvysFdROxqb1ct5uMfPxdfqpnZipLSaFuc8_lGAIE_XwTWskQjDdLr3HsVK_agoVC8x7KdArRTzT2UeWHl-BRLrgjPFELYv09WPcpP9Avs3l6iwXEcELhziBgdQYIvwILevMymhfs52BxHPZ9ldVejBDfVQ7dlaUjtw_40nFrzy56616qr543btC9YG2y-LX60dkAPWDbS9mLsxekkePBcT7EFv391mGaGcBTlv5FEzCVoebGbUr5-0RNwjQbWWzbtGcDVsS-PBlIHV4-TuijSpuA%3D%3D)
#
Friend of Life, it's Lila Rose - Founder and President of Live Action. I have an urgent request.

Today, thousands of preborn children will lose their lives in brutal abortions.

As a pro-life person, I know this breaks your heart. You've probably wondered when the killing would end and have even prayed for abortion to go away. But it isn't going away, at least not on its own.

The Supreme Court didn't end abortion, neither political party has shown the willingness and conviction to end abortion, and many states are now doubling down to protect abortion.

We can't keep waiting on the sidelines for someone else to act. We must get involved if we want to stop the killing, save lives, and create a culture that protects life.

Live Action is partnering with pro-life pregnancy resource centers to provide diapers to moms with urgent needs.

clean_body: Today, thousands of preborn children will lose their lives in brutal abortions. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Friend of Life, it's Lila Rose - Founder and President of Live Action. I have an urgent request. Today, thousands of preborn children will lose their lives in brutal abortions. As a pro-life person, I know this breaks your heart. You've probably wondered when the killing would end and have even prayed for abortion to go away. But it isn't going away, at least not on its own. The Supreme Court didn't end abortion, neither political party has shown the willingness and conviction to end abortion, and many states are now doubling down to protect abortion. We can't keep waiting on the sidelines for someone else to act. We must get involved if we want to stop the killing, save lives, and create a culture that protects life. Live Action is partnering with pro-life pregnancy resource centers to provide diapers to moms with urgent needs. This isn't another opportunity to donate to a cause, this is the opportunity for you to tangibly give to help a single mother, a teenage girl, a hurting couple, just days away from a life-ending abortion choose life. Specifically, can you give $50 right now to provide six packs of diapers to a local pregnancy center and support our work to change minds about abortion? Our goal is to provide 34 boxes to each state. Click now to make your gift, give diapers, and save lives. For Life, Lila Rose President and Founder 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 .

| Your Guide to Attending the 60th Presidential Inauguration
---
---
| The MassGOP has received numerous inquiries about attending the 60th Presidential Inauguration following the historic election of Donald Trump to serve as our 47th President of the United States.
The Inauguration is scheduled for January 20, 2025, and the swearing-in ceremony will take place on the west front of the United States Capitol. Tickets for the Inaugural Ceremony are distributed to Members of the Congress. We encourage anyone interested to submit their request directly to their respective Member of Congress.
Some Members of the Massachusetts Congressional Delegation already have a request form available on their websites, and we've provided the links below. For Members who have not yet posted a form, we recommend reaching out to their office directly using the contact details provided. Please be aware that tickets are typically standing room only and are not guaranteed.

* Rep. Richard Neal (D-1): Office Number: 413-785-0325
* Rep. Jim McGovern (D-2): [Ticket Request Form](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruIBc_aBGAClcGTD-cNNOFV7-H50UN4m8wdhtUYjwrnVJ-mnTSrtCoEz_HMawX0QLQbqmPoe6GzZoFfV6DUBJR9uYIg8JPXp9iApVSLc18ibVFRBpoG9aO_eCbztR-IyhfXdgJUQUM9yIoX1ANhxz4zgLkGMxZbYC1vjWzKIweH_MM1GxRcDNPgpIVyIOcxyny0S0sTv6NPMwNtdbgPkVA==&c=cj3CJa5lINIso4PvF_Pd-3h6Ppcj3U4goOgAPCiy7QgPRTbWS2YkUQ==&ch=7RrkSzkzh6STyI6Mu8FcvSbvzxLMqKk1w32dQQe2dhM1lK7urW4Mfw==)
* Rep. Lori Trahan (D-3): [Ticket Request Form](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruIBc_aBGAClcGTD-cNNOFV7-H50UN4m8wdhtUYjwrnVJ-mnTSrtCoEz_HMawX0QKJKQfWLUTM3ZS4RUfpiHfxCQqcg8PGSnxGXgehzpn4wRxavmENlhsfCKCEaoPFpwF_rHWNs1l13XNFxSm8ansisNIEipLGZW3-_qgfCvTte5KPwrB6zVkQ==&c=cj3CJa5lINIso4PvF_Pd-3h6Ppcj3U4goOgAPCiy7QgPRTbWS2YkUQ==&ch=7RrkSzkzh6STyI6Mu8FcvSbvzxLMqKk1w32dQQe2dhM1lK7urW4Mfw==)
* Rep. Jake Auchincloss (D-4): [Ticket Request Form](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruIBc_aBGAClcGTD-cNNOFV7-H50UN4m8wdhtUYjwrnVJ-mnTSrtCoEz_HMawX0Q03feuGD1J_2nFsy1MiOKZgGn-FvPjVvB5d40lqTaSCRL4jP1XwZtQhlNpmdb9V258T8g29Wo47HjwJHW3bTHZswyHSoH2rlPlbfh1ByXwZgve_8bpUodD_vySWQd9sGKyVmysw24W3heWMrh9Zi1JQ==&c=cj3CJa5lINIso4PvF_Pd-3h6Ppcj3U4goOgAPCiy7QgPRTbWS2YkUQ==&ch=7RrkSzkzh6STyI6Mu8FcvSbvzxLMqKk1w32dQQe2dhM1lK7urW4Mfw==)
* Rep. Katherine Clark (D-5): DC Office: (202) 225-2836 / District Office: (617) 354-0292
* Rep. Seth Moulton (D-6): [Ticket Request Form](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruIBc_aBGAClcGTD-cNNOFV7-H50UN4m8wdhtUYjwrnVJ-mnTSrtCoEz_HMawX0QfGfi284WKx7RS2pxYgXjqd4oG_TNP78W5jLU3evNhiB28e3xzHmbfCRquoKdWNaLymg7bL6xuCRStaS14tLDuUL7-e-mSGbnLhbwU_SvR_A_kEoZW_eMMVAUlYyxXn6u294mPxoVlzwXc-EyF_SCeQ==&c=cj3CJa5lINIso4PvF_Pd-3h6Ppcj3U4goOgAPCiy7QgPRTbWS2YkUQ==&ch=7RrkSzkzh6STyI6Mu8FcvSbvzxLMqKk1w32dQQe2dhM1lK7urW4Mfw==)
* Rep. Ayanna Pressley (D-7): DC Office: (202) 225-5111 / District Office: (617) 850-0040
* Rep. Stephen Lynch (D-8): (202) 225-8273
* Senator Elizabeth Warren: [Ticket Request Form](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruIBc_aBGAClcGTD-cNNOFV7-H50UN4m8wdhtUYjwrnVJ-mnTSrtCoEz_HMawX0Q-5Nc4i_Gy13tEC5HNtmQ00Y-jGkRh9NlbOav8lLvQ3pfEE6nkI7lhpPlXkJcNBmar6QVgq67WGOeTEPkIk2TbEFpTfVJCjCn2sbSiQToZdQJLcZwzyAZzSXYtUK8VhF1&c=cj3CJa5lINIso4PvF_Pd-3h6Ppcj3U4goOgAPCiy7QgPRTbWS2YkUQ==&ch=7RrkSzkzh6STyI6Mu8FcvSbvzxLMqKk1w32dQQe2dhM1lK7urW4Mfw==)
* Senator Ed Markey: Office: 617-565-8519 / Website coming soon: [CAPITOL_tours@markey.senate.gov](mailto:CAPITOL_tours@markey.senate.gov)

There will also be opportunities for supporters to attend the parade and inaugural balls. The Presidential Inaugural Committee (PIC) manages parade seating and Inaugural ball tickets. We will provide more information in the coming days about how to access tickets to these events.
We look forward to celebrating a safer and more prosperous 2025 with many of you!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Your Guide to Attending the 60th Presidential Inauguration | The MassGOP has received numerous inquiries about attending the 60th Presidential Inauguration following the historic election of Donald Trump to serve as our 47th President of the United States. The Inauguration is scheduled for January 20, 2025, and the swearing-in ceremony will take place on the west front of the United States Capitol. Tickets for the Inaugural Ceremony are distributed to Members of the Congress. We encourage anyone interested to submit their request directly to their respective Member of Congress. Some Members of the Massachusetts Congressional Delegation already have a request form available on their websites, and we've provided the links below. For Members who have not yet posted a form, we recommend reaching out to their office directly using the contact details provided. Please be aware that tickets are typically standing room only and are not guaranteed. Rep. Richard Neal (D-1): Office Number: 413-785-0325 Rep. Jim McGovern (D-2): == Rep. Lori Trahan (D-3): == Rep. Jake Auchincloss (D-4): == Rep. Katherine Clark (D-5): DC Office: (202) 225-2836 / District Office: (617) 354-0292 Rep. Seth Moulton (D-6): == Rep. Ayanna Pressley (D-7): DC Office: (202) 225-5111 / District Office: (617) 850-0040 Rep. Stephen Lynch (D-8): (202) 225-8273 Senator Elizabeth Warren: == Senator Ed Markey: Office: 617-565-8519 / Website coming soon: mailto:CAPITOLtours@markey.senate.gov There will also be opportunities for supporters to attend the parade and inaugural balls. The Presidential Inaugural Committee (PIC) manages parade seating and Inaugural ball tickets. We will provide more information in the coming days about how to access tickets to these events. We look forward to celebrating a safer and more prosperous 2025 with many of you! | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | |

Dear Friend,
---
New Year's Eve is a Let Us Worship staple. We've closed out the year in worship for each of the past few years, and we're doing it again this year. Why? Because there is nothing better than closing out one year with praise and worship, and ringing a new one in the very same way!

On Tuesday, December 31st, Let Us Worship will take over Clover Park in Port St. Lucie, Florida! We want to see thousands of Believers descend on the stadium and pack the stands for Him!!! Worship will start at 9 PM and go all through the night and into the new year! Check out details below!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=2d3121d8d46e48409f5d2b8b12b09490&_e=ZEfU_HLutik2Mh6ah7MKYQrwv2LbHoQusTkaDJGvcL8H6VnT2SvGt7A10XbTHnlBHWrbwUleVIpTJBEVNZHL5Z1a-p5MXcEGNYZL6srP4SRp1dUeAv8Y-V5mfTG6tzVU1OH4xsa38-q_IGlGtP44YEoX0rMyRlvnt8lnKj-EqMhn72llvP9c5dWnEC7ysSExEgRjazEapRwoiGQP-kuNyJyzq1T6-7PkD87hqekcO8t1R4VibnYVF3pzyxJ5upuaClvJt7MFJPVfdnEWCP_cHjd_srgTYt1gvXbOkoOttSCfArkTOw9sDrpRjXYHkXw9)
---
This is our last revival of the year, and we are looking for Believers to help partner with us to make it possible. We've seen what happens when Believers rose up and met our immediate financial needs in the lead up to our D.C. "One Nation Under God" Revival—**[God moved powerfully and blessed the masses](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=2d3121d8d46e48409f5d2b8b12b09490&_e=ZEfU_HLutik2Mh6ah7MKYQrwv2LbHoQusTkaDJGvcL-XarHT2A-wqxTyTusE2jjGk3h95sfFOmfkFU9t7OI0qTR2rVAUk1ktHWE4i_nmB47kfRcX1qDvHAoDqrohzvGQOqyaSAuRrHQ1_QFd3CyRm-N0SW6mPuyg8du-nu6SkcvQtdbTebPAr3RHwdjxs6xG0DVxyPfz2GHbah_YtnTBZ8jfWSM03C_VFDw5sUP3cDHWvse9EdAqKLJ00YT8I4aDxgQZ9Wq5DLfNaINlX4epscX97CC52Py_vqt1eVQRkY9LVkuY-YyXWK4uOOXXa3ge)**!! If you feel led, please help sponsor this critical end-of-the-year revival!!!
---

name: Joe Pereles
subject: Thank you for everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pereles for Missouri, Rhonda West, Treasurer
body:
https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
Peter,
While Tuesday’s results did not turn out the way we had hoped for, I would like to take a minute to tell you something uplifting, something that cannot be negated by anyone or anything: We stood up for Good; We were Honest; We were Positive, and all of our communications were based on the Truth.
You all were a reflection of that spirit. That's why I am, and will forever be, in awe of your dedication, and so incredibly thankful for your unwavering support.
And most of all, I am inspired by your courage and fortitude.
This is my first time participating in an election where my name was on the ballot. Before the opportunity to run for this seat came up last year, I had never given serious thought to running for elected office.
And now that the campaign is officially over, I can say with absolute certainty: you, the supporters who show up, who roll their sleeves up and do the work, who contribute hard-earned money—YOU are the driving force behind a campaign like ours.
Do not ever forget the role you play, and absolutely still must continue to play, in promoting our values of protecting democratic power, respect for the rule of law, and a genuine American freedom afforded to everyone— not just those who agree with us or support us.
These values will now be tested in ways we have never seen before. And the only way we will endure this is by remembering who and what we fight for: Our children. Our families. Our neighbors. In short, each other.
Thank you for everything you have done. Please stay in the fight.
Yours in Service,
Joe Pereles
Paid for by Pereles for Missouri, Rhonda West, Treasurer
Please mail checks to:
Pereles For Missouri
PO Box 6641
Chesterfield, MO 63006
United States

**Here is the Official Schedule for the 2024 Annual Advance in Charlottesville!**
**Join Us December 6-8 to Celebrate Our Historic Republican Victories!**
We are excited to invite you to the **2024 Annual Advance in Charlottesville** , where we will come together to celebrate the tremendous Republican wins we’ve achieved this year. This has been a historic moment for our party, and we want YOU to be a part of it!

clean_body: | | | | Annual Advance in Charlottesville! Friend, Here is the Official Schedule for the 2024 Annual Advance in Charlottesville! Join Us December 6-8 to Celebrate Our Historic Republican Victories! We are excited to invite you to the 2024 Annual Advance in Charlottesville , where we will come together to celebrate the tremendous Republican wins we’ve achieved this year. This has been a historic moment for our party, and we want YOU to be a part of it! Mark your calendars, and don’t miss this chance to connect, strategize, and energize for the future. | Our hotel room block at the Forum Hotel by Kimpton is sold out, and we only have a few rooms remaining at our other locations! Click one below to book today, and make sure you buy your tickets at the same time! You need to have a ticket purchased to ensure your hotel booking is secure! | | Thank you for your continued support, and we hope to see you in December! The Republican Party of Virginia PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=110724_1&amount=25]
Friends, There’s a lot of uncertainty ahead – for our country, our democracy, and our rights. We know that's bringing a lot of us down, and you're not wrong to feel down.
But here’s something we know for sure – we must immediately prepare to push back against Trump's anti-democracy Project 2025 agenda:
*
Criminalizing
voters:
cracking
down
on
simple
voting
mistakes
using
a
so-called
“Election
Crimes
Branch”
–
which
has
never
been
done
by
any
president
from
any
political
party.

*
Installing
partisan
loyalists:
Immediately
firing
thousands
of
qualified
civil
servants
at
every
level
of
the
federal
government
and
replacing
them
with
ideologues
willing
to
push
an
extreme
political
agenda.

*
Stripping
away
our
rights:
Deploying
the
National
Guard
to
crack
down
on
protests,
robbing
us
of
fair
representation
by
rigging
the
U.S.
Census,
and
dramatically
increasing
the
President’s
power
to
act
without
Congressional
oversight.
Send letters to Congress and your state legislators now: We must resist this anti-democracy agenda >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Project 2025 is a 1,000-page agenda handcrafted by the Heritage Foundation for a Trump presidency – and we have every reason to believe Trump will try to follow through on it.
Just look at his first term as president – where he enacted nearly two-thirds of the extreme policies the Heritage Foundation laid out for him.
And now in his second term, our system of checks and balances is going to be more important than ever – to limit Trump’s authoritarian ambitions and defend the bedrock values of our democracy: the rule of law, the right to vote, and the freedom to protest.
We can’t stand by in silence as our democracy is dismantled. Add your name if you agree: Congress, the Judiciary, and state leaders must reject Trump and Heritage's dangerous Project 2025 agenda >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=110724_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=110724_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=110724_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=110724_1&amount=25]

name: Michelle at United We Dream Action
subject: Immigrants will be the first target of the new administration.
body:
Our work has never been more important | | | Peter: We’re facing another four years of Trump’s racism, cruelty, and violence toward immigrants, which means **our work has never been more important.** I know you’re probably scared, angry, and feeling betrayed by your country. I am too. Trump ran on a hateful platform of mass deportations — _and won_. **Immigrants will be the first target of the new administration.** Now is the time for all of us — immigrants and women and people of color and LGBTQ+ folks and allies — to stand together and protect each other from the danger ahead. UWDA will lead the charge in defending immigrant rights over the next four years. We’ll be fighting back against any and all anti-immigrant policies, empowering our community with know-your-rights campaigns, training allies on actions to protect immigrants, and building spaces for immigrants to come together and process. I’m not going to lie, it’s going to be hard. We must unapologetically oppose Trump at every turn. But we’re not giving up. _Home is here, and we’re here to stay._ **[Today, we’re asking for a donation to fuel the fights ahead. There will be many. We’re going to keep doing the work — and we hope you’re with us.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr-B85eW5KR2i85l1zhyntpaPWhvSNKc7zMqSF25YK1AQRcWMgwG0zdK1z0KLU8J9gINn2ovDL_F6wgdKxTbVQTZQZRm8_gaacfYMRml0PNuybZZkZRNtdxonBuSrsgjP21xtrEwdrTxJLAlqN019R7wf-nJMYJGBZ3jnyZh0C2HqwALUtqJfyI8C80-oj8TzVjgntwRBhQk0StA96_xt2deZ9B9d9LsMsxPh_yrputJ8couyVU0UfZilnKyxcTC7z3ar_Gn8rdcTsAs3GcmDGzXV7Qo4uptavzSGMSBWQDsKsqwIlUW8HjH_xiwKHPOAt7EbX2kmv02_siIQOMLyZcrZgbp_f06JSNqybzJj63mRbucFx9Dy-F9aLECg54wBG/4b9/xA57yYhKROmM2ycqa1Mx-A/h0/h001.6p1j_FCfnTHkYQEuMYuhAesTqb8OS2od_UEKVAigiBw)** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr-B85eW5KR2i85l1zhyntpaPWhvSNKc7zMqSF25YK1AQRcWMgwG0zdK1z0KLU8J9gINn2ovDL_F6wgdKxTbVQTfU41tFL0lI4pEO-zec4_sUQ7_Au4bJUeK75AYSb1glEftHKh_lT-I0hHnUywb9Lneaxqv5vLhs17FmjfhV_mH4Es-d91w2s_boe2J7pdFZcHY_vqHfKe_QzK9CzUTp9HEYyqASLM4FkeOl6eH-JzRAWTF6Mek0OzwApz7AFxulyvXBXdwouMxM4AxmufCT0CYPAKOaeRKJazL1GoLvRDN-wdphYZC7N05Byvm7vsH_7D0_VU06u8mg2XZZZcKJW5XA8HVTF-YT101udE5xuvkXe5RWJlXQ2D6PukUxsodyz/4b9/xA57yYhKROmM2ycqa1Mx-A/h1/h001.N31JAPwT1BfYqb1IIMrpqKccJ-B0h-R4k81l1XA8jrg)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr-B85eW5KR2i85l1zhyntpaPWhvSNKc7zMqSF25YK1AQRcWMgwG0zdK1z0KLU8J9gGvXh-ps7EzT7dZVFSIXbA3c6s0CIn8pq9311yKTYFz6SJSO7cNy0i5CAFG-RdJInDxrXUjvrzx5CIyE5Gc9az1eQNercomhuwx8nL6gPyDsY3QW5oad5T0Q_jVbGsB8orMGBjzKv7mWBbhHrMh_Vf4V2x7cZOcb6M357d4FpKS5BUUBES-rE2kHqdLe-M6JuRlC1Ie13aJVsZcbMRMc_DqYqiQTJLrsh1EiBBeRX5gOsIYJPOz7N35ZGHnfOIVf7mmsOp0otGPA6K4IKmqa22R8rY9oAKj63nfKY2At2-SeGAVF1JVfd8QlxjKsEwuIEqJh17W6WTmf_yipHMaO3WdZ-gHZniYk-jIsYmJAuhOk/4b9/xA57yYhKROmM2ycqa1Mx-A/h2/h001.9YzpWer2mGn2KuobbLkt1pa869cqxlaeTz9yFxAi5hI)

UWDA will lead the charge in defending immigrant rights over the next four years. We’ll be fighting back against any and all anti-immigrant policies, empowering our community with know-your-rights campaigns, training allies on actions to protect immigrants, and building spaces for immigrants to come together and process. I’m not going to lie, it’s going to be hard. We must unapologetically oppose Trump at every turn. But we’re not giving up. Home is here, and we’re here to stay. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, Michelle, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today: | |

name: URGENT (via Left Action)
subject: Don’t let Trump take office with full immunity from prosecution. Tell Congress to pass the No Kings Act
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Demand Congress pass the No Kings Act to strip Trump of immunity before he takes office](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tccae2f9a-600f-45dd-92e6-dca6a9fcbba6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a821c0d-46cb-4cda-a803-1b87e815ed51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | There's no sugarcoating it – Trump will once again be in the White House, and who knows what damage he will inflict over the next four years. Before he takes office, we need to do everything we can to ensure he doesn't have unlimited power to do whatever he wants. Congress must pass the No Kings Act IMMEDIATELY – this bill will reverse the disastrous decision from the extremist Supreme Court that granted Trump immunity, and declare that presidents are NOT immune from criminal law. Trump is already on a path to the dictatorship he craves. We can't let him take the helm with full immunity from prosecution. [**Sign your name to demand Congress pass the No Kings Act to strip Trump of immunity before he takes office >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a474a4b-45e8-4363-9cdc-285657a3dc10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
