name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Nevada’s Senate race is not over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mb4jr2?refcode=X_110724_BennetRosen_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mb4jr2?refcode=X_110724_BennetRosen_act]
Here's where things stand, friend: Nevada’s Senate race is not over – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.
We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban.
Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: Please, will you split $20 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and Michael Bennet to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mb4jr2?refcode=X_110724_BennetRosen_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mb4jr2?refcode=X_110724_BennetRosen_act]
We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country.
Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But now, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win.
So please, friend, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment: Split $20 or more right now to help my campaign get across the finish line. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mb4jr2?refcode=X_110724_BennetRosen_act]

name: Texans for Vaccine Choice
subject: Our Future Looks Healthy!
body:
| |
---
It's Time to MAHA! | [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjA4MzEzOTYxNTAxNjk0NDcyJmM9cTJ1MyZlPTAmYj0xMzgyNTg3NzcxJmQ9bDdzOGY0bw==.5uJYrcheRY6iaTeUs_gCfIE0twgwuUHHVtR1-t2KP4E)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| | | Peter,
Are you still pinching yourself? I am! It is hard to believe that after all the rhetoric over the past few months telling us that this would be the closest race of our lifetime, Donald Trump handily wins the Electoral College and the popular vote! This reminds me of a recent event in our nation’s history in which the media fabricated facts and exaggerated data. Hmm... I wonder what that could be... But I digress. Today, we are looking optimistically ahead to a future with leaders who value medical liberty. America voted for freedom and a return to a society where individual rights matter and against the past four years of mandates and medical tyranny! Along with President Trump’s policies, the people have embraced those who endorsed him, most notably former candidate RFK Jr. Thanks to him and the MAHA movement, Americans are waking up about big pharma that has no interest in promoting a healthy America, and they have had enough. In our great state of Texas, **39**** TFVC-recommended candidates won their Texas House and Senate races**. We are poised to promote and pass significant pro-medical liberty legislation in the 89th Session that begins in January! The government's slow but steady encroachment into our most private vaccination matters has reached the tipping point, and thanks to your help, TFVC has been able to amplify our message and achieve real change.

---
| |
---
| | [Let's MAHA!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjA4MzEzOTYxNTAxNjk0NDcyJmM9cTJ1MyZlPTAmYj0xMzgyNTg3NzgxJmQ9dDllN2w4eQ==.B66feFPkW3HXEKTstf10Kses_vb7-igo7t7kmpLxdWY)
---
---
| |
---
| With your support, we will keep winning! A gift of [$25, $47, $76, or even $100](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjA4MzEzOTYxNTAxNjk0NDcyJmM9cTJ1MyZlPTAmYj0xMzgyNTg3Nzg1JmQ9djRtNGk5cA==.CEaQmyzR1fzghI_JxCMm43tcRz1OS8Rx_7MU31O8rx8) empowers us to march into January with the resolve and resources we need to pass our legislative goals and create a healthier future for Texas! Thank you for standing with Texans for Vaccine Choice. Together, we will Make America Healthy Again!
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Gratefully,
---
| Rebecca Hardy
---
---
President, TFVC
---
| |
---
| PS. Help us celebrate with a lucky $47 donation today!
---
| |
---
| | [Chip in $47!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjA4MzEzOTYxNTAxNjk0NDcyJmM9cTJ1MyZlPTAmYj0xMzgyNTg3NzkzJmQ9YTlyN3Uzcg==.84dDuB_jfS42_mmT6FKD5pEpQXsxUP9cBTARwwBkzMc)

(Shutterstock)

By Illinois Review

The 2024 General Election results are out, and it’s a bleak landscape for Republicans across Illinois. Despite a marked surge in conservative voter enthusiasm and strong support for Donald Trump, Illinois GOP leadership—specifically the Illinois Senate Republican Organization (SRO), Illinois House Republican Majority Organization (HRO) and the IL GOP itself – has overseen yet another election cycle marked by crushing losses and baffling strategic blunders. From a slate of uncontested races to weak, establishment candidates, the results underscore a long-standing problem within the party’s leadership structure and knowing how to win.

While Donald Trump gained an additional 4.5 percentage points in Illinois compared to 2020, Republican candidates across the state were unable to translate this into success in local races. The GOP also lost ground in critical areas, especially in Cook County, Will County and other collar counties where Republicans could – and should – be winning more support. This repeated failure can be traced directly to the ineffective consultants and backward-looking strategies endorsed by the IL GOP, SRO and HRO.

https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f53193ba2e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f53193ba2e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
For Illinois Republicans, the results in House and Senate races are a brutal reflection of systemic mismanagement. Out of 118 state House races, Republicans managed only 38 victories while Democrats took 38 seats uncontested. In the state Senate, out of 24 races, Republicans captured just four seats while Democrats went unchallenged in seven districts. These are numbers that expose not just a bad night for Republicans but a trend of negligence that’s gone unchecked.

In congressional races, the story was similarly grim. Out of 17 races, Republicans only won three – a paltry showing for a state with strong conservative pockets. Republican candidates in the state Senate and House are frustrated with many feeling that the party’s strategy directly hampered their efforts.

In traditionally strong Republican areas, voter turnout was high, yet the candidates couldn’t convert that energy into victories. Why? The blame lies squarely with leadership’s failure to support grassroots candidates, opting instead to prop up establishment figures with a record of consistent failure.

https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f53193ba2e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f53193ba2e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
One thing is clear: the IL GOP’s consultants have done nothing to earn their keep and organizations like COR Strategies, Strive Strategies and Arenna LLC have taken hundreds of thousands of dollars in consulting fees without delivering any noticeable success.

Incredibly, the party continues to hire these groups, relying on their advice year after year despite results that show a clear trend of decline for Illinois Republicans. The party’s entrenched reliance on these consultants has become a problem that cannot be ignored if Republicans ever hope to regain even a foothold in the state again.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Nevada’s Senate race is still up in the air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We can’t afford to lose this seat
| | | Here's where things stand, friend: **Nevada’s Senate race is up in the air – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.**

We cannot afford to lose this seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban.

Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: [**Please, will you split $5 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and the DSCC to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue and fight for the Senate?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/20538?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20241107-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20241107-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=18866%2E9716520%2EGDGFFK)
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/20538?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20241107-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20241107-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=18866%2E9716520%2EGDGFFK)

Your donation will be split between Jacky Rosen for Senate’s recount account and the DSCC to fight for the Senate.
We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country.

Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But today, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win.

**So please, friend, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment:[Split $5 or more right now to help us get across the finish line and fight for the Senate.](https://go.dscc.org/go/20538?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20241107-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20241107-JackyRosen-RosenTCTCTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=18866%2E9716520%2EGDGFFK)**

name: Hilary Barrett
subject: 5 days left to count every vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
We’ve spun up a Ballot Cure fund with a goal of raising $15,000. | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTJlt19Y7PjKZrieRTJx1PBaZ4VzY_KRrJ4JX-x_nBitM9p0Agl7NgRLZPBwDe6O87AzuZjFkwHsGho1teHyeJeKTlloXA7OzpM2XXo7M00LrhT5oXoirEUhQwQ7lX73B2cCs6Tfw86sMjWTlGs2pmCfo22xeMw4o2rGt8ucm1dTHe725gvI1cSE3QZ95hoi-TG3xxTCsW8vhKRooRpA5NoDaaESTihzmQa6QndD7WlouVglI5LShHfodwQ5Vq5rq36farjxjotQTjXYaVdh5k-GC3KABuHBcSNQvoTAX1YLKhLoBu81Q2BOtS9g1j4_-P4fxUerTY8L9mjl_FFFar_UTHrK9RZEGCtY_zLKjefaE/4b9/ErDQmqI7QwqmA_eTVdbsOA/h0/h001.qH8g7BDx1KBBX0XLN3-lVWFy-lbWEQbDjE_RWFYVmCI)
---
Hey team,
I know things are scary right now.
I held my breath watching Kamala’s concession speech but just like she said: when we fight, we win. Sometimes that fight takes a while, but _we will win._
We’ve got good news:
* Nevadans voted in favor of abortion rights making us one step closer to enshrining reproductive freedom in our state constitution.
* Dina Titus and Steven Horsford will be back in Washington to fight for Nevada families.
* Susie Lee has the lead so far for re-election, helping Democrats in the battle for the House of Representatives.
* Jacky Rosen is pulling ahead after counting the latest mail-in ballots overnight, but it’s still too close to call.

We’re still fighting here in Nevada and we could use your help, friend.
**Tens of thousands of ballot signatures must be “cured” by 5pm on Tuesday, November 12 to be counted.**
[Chip in to our Ballot Cure Fund](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTJlt19Y7PjKZrieRTJx1PBaZ4VzY_KRrJ4JX-x_nBitMYrIcw5Uy0w7hRxZGp7vlts2a7g3L4XdhINo-FSLodG5up8ib6fRzXeIpaoCjDZPcaMvEfV-uVNhKed-jdr2cIaDtskfucX0_xeRfxAH0rO9t1x8oC8CvUqLhOZaOO5lC4CNZnisVxgZP0NfDJbrUmLwupBR0HJtBqVOe7zIEQF5sFV94KYmWWMQ2kjgwG0lgTWenW8SSuBDpSkkKjjz6TaC0nRbtCWQZ7R--pXIqYjO6FzUA4IWDxRGzFMIEAdENGaus4fbmogj_bT-Btq7NmqtaXfn6RI8-aOEgYSLa6YHfD3b6BPguMpN4DqF9njYY/4b9/ErDQmqI7QwqmA_eTVdbsOA/h1/h001.wE7YFxw0JC2g1a0J-10YWmrqZo_Mz7E-Wj11H11Q1wI)

[Volunteer to Cure Ballots](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SNYHID0cgDJeR88MOfSMuacPkJdyhjn55853NjP8edjnLEJutJwmekb5lOWlCS1tVu7GfBjviPs7RuFcAeabEpfIlrAXLjdtbNmNjhCx5KB3OslnT4zVh5nBw4uUcBAn0JD2Ta8xwdAQP0mwTyz2ukhRScK5MHlZEUDYZRR1iETdUMUKnGDkzvm92UgvQbxDjf6tZJTpUYCLRcHgdh1tPrZ7bvtkg2DaIhXHQ3VqFBcyb5QtbPMoZts3CtV9Y2H_EnRTUda0Vcw4qP7-VQco0g/4b9/ErDQmqI7QwqmA_eTVdbsOA/h2/h001.MMUMK2hdpfq3Gi6u9S-PT9CZOjVSyhBpR3f_jqz80iw)

It’s not over and just like Kamala, we will _never_ give up on the fight for freedom, opportunity, fairness and dignity of all people.
Today and over the next five days, we are hitting the pavement, making phone calls, and doing everything we can to make sure Nevadans' votes are counted.
Then, we roll up our sleeves and keep fighting for Nevada families for however long it takes.
NV Dems will be here, battle born and battle ready.
LFG,
Hilary

If you or someone you know needs to cure their ballot head to **[_Cure.NV.gov_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.7uA29XU_k5jPzbc93oiy6NvyjEP9MD1EmYheWD7nkOcelJZ_Wkt8iJH6s3Chk4yIonXZezviq6lYk95xnx1ldMzbb2OtXRWR0UFrYgWq43mtsOkX0aS7Z5vuY9BGaZKh2zhXRKKtnYohaMMksJR0xB3IJXYEvnWZs5PMIJ05MTBfvW2w5Z-Zi-SMkD1JtKeoY6NuIkv1qF3tvAtOMKdVUGRslo9tMiN0jtg74ax1Cgx6MaZZUFxwm26o_MVetksz/4b9/ErDQmqI7QwqmA_eTVdbsOA/h3/h001.GN3Z41Ijh_tfseNose7tNkpwH5X-SPG7RfUTNr7J7hk)** to complete the signature curing process.

clean_body: We’ve spun up a Ballot Cure fund with a goal of raising $15,000. | | | | Hey team, I know things are scary right now. I held my breath watching Kamala’s concession speech but just like she said: when we fight, we win. Sometimes that fight takes a while, but we will win. We’ve got good news: Nevadans voted in favor of abortion rights making us one step closer to enshrining reproductive freedom in our state constitution. Dina Titus and Steven Horsford will be back in Washington to fight for Nevada families. Susie Lee has the lead so far for re-election, helping Democrats in the battle for the House of Representatives. Jacky Rosen is pulling ahead after counting the latest mail-in ballots overnight, but it’s still too close to call. We’re still fighting here in Nevada and we could use your help, friend. Tens of thousands of ballot signatures must be “cured” by 5pm on Tuesday, November 12 to be counted. It’s not over and just like Kamala, we will never give up on the fight for freedom, opportunity, fairness and dignity of all people. Today and over the next five days, we are hitting the pavement, making phone calls, and doing everything we can to make sure Nevadans' votes are counted. Then, we roll up our sleeves and keep fighting for Nevada families for however long it takes. NV Dems will be here, battle born and battle ready. LFG, Hilary P.S. If you or someone you know needs to cure their ballot head to to complete the signature curing process. The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | | | | When it comes to everyday carry (EDC), there’s no room for compromise.

You need a blade that’s quick, reliable, and built to handle whatever life throws at you. Introducing the ****[****Yellow Jacket OTF Knife****](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19004/6374453/ff2106af3fc2457823b16ad47b8c58de3b9ffa3c/2e2c819e2002ee317dfa5cf6ebfc49c023f72115)************ —the ultimate tool for anyone serious about their gear.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19004/6374453/ff2106af3fc2457823b16ad47b8c58de3b9ffa3c/2e2c819e2002ee317dfa5cf6ebfc49c023f72115)
| | | Here’s Why You Need This Knife in Your Arsenal: ****
**> Lightning-Fast Deployment**: With the Out-The-Front (OTF) mechanism, this knife is ready to go in an instant. Perfect for when every second counts. ****
**> Superior Blade Quality**: Crafted with high-quality steel, this blade is sharp, durable, and designed to maintain its edge, making it a reliable companion in any situation. ****
**> Rugged, Tactical Design**: [Built to withstand the toughest conditions, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19004/6374453/ff2106af3fc2457823b16ad47b8c58de3b9ffa3c/2e2c819e2002ee317dfa5cf6ebfc49c023f72115) is as tough as you are. It’s not just a knife; it’s a statement. ****
**> Compact & Concealable**: Designed to be discreet yet always within reach, it’s the perfect size to fit comfortably in your pocket or clip onto your gear. ****
**Limited Stock Alert:**
These knives are in high demand, and we’ve got a limited quantity available. Don’t miss out on owning one of the most versatile and dependable OTF knives on the market. ****
**Special Offer Just for You:**
For a limited time, we’re offering an **exclusive discount** to our loyal subscribers. Don’t wait—this deal won’t last forever.******_**_******_**__**_******_**_**********
[**Claim Your Yellow Jacket OTF Knife Here!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19004/6374453/ff2106af3fc2457823b16ad47b8c58de3b9ffa3c/2e2c819e2002ee317dfa5cf6ebfc49c023f72115)

This is more than just a knife—it’s a piece of gear you’ll be proud to carry every day. Whether you’re in the field, on the job, or just out and about, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife is the edge you need.

Stay sharp, stay prepared.

_~John G._ _Gunner Gear_
__
P.S. **Don’t wait!** Our stock is limited, and once these knives are gone, they’re gone. [Grab yours now before they sell out!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19004/6374453/ff2106af3fc2457823b16ad47b8c58de3b9ffa3c/2e2c819e2002ee317dfa5cf6ebfc49c023f72115)

name: Defeat Boebert PAC
subject: We will not bow down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC
body:
| | | Peter, This election did not go the way we planned. Donald Trump won, Republicans have taken control of the Senate and look well-positioned to retain the House, and Lauren Boebert won her election in Colorado’s 4th District. While this is an incredibly difficult pill to swallow, we wanted to reach out to let you know that this is not the end. And if we are to take our country back, it must, in fact, be the beginning. There are changes that must be made and we must look inwards ourselves as Democrats to understand what we must do better, but we know that the last thing we can afford to do is give up and back out of the fight. Lauren Boebert won, but she severely underperformed what polling projected and what her campaign had hoped for in a district she believed would be much easier to win in than her old seat. **She is very much vulnerable in 2026 and we are here to tell you that we’re not going anywhere.** We will continue to work to unseat her and we will work do even more in 2026 to fight back against the Trump Administration and the Republican Party. We need you with us, Peter. And we hope that we can count on your future support. For now, take a rest and recharge. And when the time is right for you, jump back into the fight. We will still send communications your way on what we’re working on, but you can expect significantly fewer emails from us through the rest of this year. We’re grateful to have you on our team, now and always. Best,
The Team at Defeat Boebert PAC P.S. We know you’ve supported us so much this year, so we’re not asking for donations right now. But we will need to build an even stronger movement over the next year. So if you do wish to help us financially support our organization, **[you can give a donation here.](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=dfb3acdb9345423ea7546cadc95c65a6&_e=C8MKLkjep0tWQ1l-uMaWOjE0jJFDFsz8HZ8_Ijwv5Vv7chp3mDs1TMP8C1xAi_XIyGOO3uD7nhB3VW19Mrc48AbzL0B_WisTlcASSbBIvfQ9G53NX41UPFwzdXIEM9ET8E4vmZ2uu2ArfO7-kDyzQD9L89fACgTXYIk8gS-3v_ZUhWAaWToUkAMS2q7yadNVisKbj_TgkJHcdxQQLfM6WqplRm4Dt6BjuUCH2-O8XwoSc0ImKgNJ7IiM960ARUpvx_Tll8cSfYjhV5SY3QQM-hYH--Wwdser4z8zX_MOCTOheW48q464Sjy24IU-hf-CkguA4HxB7zbbtP9CCUrHKsKluckVucoc7Z1nGKCt74qbZOWmBahIRjKmF064EXBrySzeRjaUk4nZV6xkHXcfyNO-QFHlp9ud4JebQzywy-XbUYy0DLEkZ9f-YpgmhFox)** **[**DONATE MONTHLY**](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=dfb3acdb9345423ea7546cadc95c65a6&_e=C8MKLkjep0tWQ1l-uMaWOjE0jJFDFsz8HZ8_Ijwv5Vv7chp3mDs1TMP8C1xAi_XIyGOO3uD7nhB3VW19Mrc48AbzL0B_WisTlcASSbBIvfQ9G53NX41UPFwzdXIEM9ET8E4vmZ2uu2ArfO7-kDyzQD9L89fACgTXYIk8gS-3v_ZUhWAaWToUkAMS2q7yadNVisKbj_TgkJHcdxQQLfM6WqplRm4Dt6BjuUCH2-O8XwoSc0ImKgNJ7IiM960ARUpvcpy9-lmWuVqodoGK6f4h3IrqlJa9eVaXkjRBwzpTapWLGEJmaaBrHQUu-JSTY2Si7PwNW9VKFqffQCBPYKX9GIT8XRTLZo3VVzh4jWa-bQB8EgOgv7Cg3VAIChX-lYS-ZnnvTIBJeC_USy6YliU86NynkR3kiRcX7wrwxhs6ab3yRUTm5LhoTz3ry3XdT0DSmGfqq7W-A57jEcQBZ286x1NTEJA27pTzUCJhmaQwBJI%3D)** Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC

Defeat Boebert PAC,
clean_body: | | | Peter, This election did not go the way we planned. Donald Trump won, Republicans have taken control of the Senate and look well-positioned to retain the House, and Lauren Boebert won her election in Colorado’s 4th District. While this is an incredibly difficult pill to swallow, we wanted to reach out to let you know that this is not the end. And if we are to take our country back, it must, in fact, be the beginning. There are changes that must be made and we must look inwards ourselves as Democrats to understand what we must do better, but we know that the last thing we can afford to do is give up and back out of the fight. Lauren Boebert won, but she severely underperformed what polling projected and what her campaign had hoped for in a district she believed would be much easier to win in than her old seat. She is very much vulnerable in 2026 and we are here to tell you that we’re not going anywhere. We will continue to work to unseat her and we will work do even more in 2026 to fight back against the Trump Administration and the Republican Party. We need you with us, Peter. And we hope that we can count on your future support. For now, take a rest and recharge. And when the time is right for you, jump back into the fight. We will still send communications your way on what we’re working on, but you can expect significantly fewer emails from us through the rest of this year. We’re grateful to have you on our team, now and always. Best, The Team at Defeat Boebert PAC P.S. We know you’ve supported us so much this year, so we’re not asking for donations right now. But we will need to build an even stronger movement over the next year. So if you do wish to help us financially support our organization, Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC

name: Hillary Holley | Care in Action
subject: Making sense of what happened and what’s next
body:
We will continue fighting for an equitable care economy where families and workers thrive.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96752285/511065754/664783965?ms=110724_postelection&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDk1NTY2NS00NDlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnZeBCej97HnG6TOEMsrvvCXA2rR8ap5D4tsRhXzSAg=&emci=5eb80b3e-359d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=84955665-449d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=864787)
Dear Peter,
Yesterday, voters woke up to the news that Donald Trump won the 2024 election, an outcome that will have profound consequences for care workers and families who rely on affordable child care, home care, and families who need access to access to paid leave. Care in Action is ready to continue fighting for an equitable care economy where families and workers thrive.
[**_Join us in community on the Make Meaning of the Moment Post-Election Mass Call tonight, November 7th from 8‐9pm ET_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96752287/511065755/-595369733?utm_source=CIA&ms=110724_postelection&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDk1NTY2NS00NDlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnZeBCej97HnG6TOEMsrvvCXA2rR8ap5D4tsRhXzSAg=&emci=5eb80b3e-359d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=84955665-449d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=864787) with members of over 200 organizations fighting for change — because there's so much that's worth fighting for.
[RSVP NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96752288/511065756/-595369733?utm_source=CIA&ms=110724_postelection&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDk1NTY2NS00NDlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnZeBCej97HnG6TOEMsrvvCXA2rR8ap5D4tsRhXzSAg=&emci=5eb80b3e-359d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=84955665-449d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=864787)
**What We’re Fighting For**
This outcome is disappointing, but our commitment to building a path forward is unwavering. Care is a unifying issue, and people across the political spectrum understand that a strong care infrastructure is essential. An overwhelming [**_bipartisan majority_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96752289/511065757/-1496431705?ms=110724_postelection&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDk1NTY2NS00NDlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnZeBCej97HnG6TOEMsrvvCXA2rR8ap5D4tsRhXzSAg=&emci=5eb80b3e-359d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=84955665-449d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=864787) **of voters** want action to invest in making the care options families need affordable and accessible. A staggering [**_88% of voters_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96752290/511065758/798191941?ms=110724_postelection&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDk1NTY2NS00NDlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnZeBCej97HnG6TOEMsrvvCXA2rR8ap5D4tsRhXzSAg=&emci=5eb80b3e-359d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=84955665-449d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=864787) **support expanding Medicare to cover in‐home care** , including 91% of Democrats, 84% of Independents, and 86% of Republicans. Similarly, [**_85% of voters_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96752291/511065760/895242841?ms=110724_postelection&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDk1NTY2NS00NDlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnZeBCej97HnG6TOEMsrvvCXA2rR8ap5D4tsRhXzSAg=&emci=5eb80b3e-359d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=84955665-449d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=864787) support paid parental, family, and medical leave, including 96% of Democrats, 82% of Independents, and 76% of Republicans.
Care in Action will continue building alliances and pushing for policies that genuinely support working families and invest in care. The labor movement—led by care and domestic workers—has been at the forefront, and will continue to push forward to make care valued, accessible, and central to our national priorities, no matter the obstacles.
**Take Action**

clean_body: We will continue fighting for an equitable care economy where families and workers thrive. Dear Peter, Yesterday, voters woke up to the news that Donald Trump won the 2024 election, an outcome that will have profound consequences for care workers and families who rely on affordable child care, home care, and families who need access to access to paid leave. Care in Action is ready to continue fighting for an equitable care economy where families and workers thrive. with members of over 200 organizations fighting for change — because there's so much that's worth fighting for. What We’re Fighting For This outcome is disappointing, but our commitment to building a path forward is unwavering. Care is a unifying issue, and people across the political spectrum understand that a strong care infrastructure is essential. An overwhelming of voters want action to invest in making the care options families need affordable and accessible. A staggering support expanding Medicare to cover in‐home care , including 91% of Democrats, 84% of Independents, and 86% of Republicans. Similarly, support paid parental, family, and medical leave, including 96% of Democrats, 82% of Independents, and 76% of Republicans. Care in Action will continue building alliances and pushing for policies that genuinely support working families and invest in care. The labor movement—led by care and domestic workers—has been at the forefront, and will continue to push forward to make care valued, accessible, and central to our national priorities, no matter the obstacles. Take Action We’re in this together. Hillary Holley Executive Director | Care in Action

name: Katie Porter
subject: The states must be ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39275%2E3422442%2EQfC4g5)
Derek,
With Trump heading to the White House, states like California just became pivotal in the fights for reproductive freedom, climate justice, and more.
We haven’t forgotten Trump’s first term. Elected officials at the state and local levels need to be ready _from Day One_ to respond if and when Trump follows through on his threats against our families.
You can expect that...
→ State leaders will be a check on the president, calling out his extreme behavior and challenging his administration’s extremism in the courts.
→ As the federal government fails to defend our freedoms, state and local legislatures will step up to codify protections for abortion, LGBTQ+ rights, and more.
→ While there are distractions and dysfunction in Washington, blue states will show Americans an alternative where the government focuses on solving families’ biggest challenges, especially the cost of living and housing.
Part of turning our anger into action right now means looking away from Washington. Yes, we need to keep an eye on the nonsense that comes out of the Oval Office. But, we’ve also got to build up our state and local benches, in California and elsewhere, to form our strongest defense against Trump.
**[Truth to Power is working to elect leaders who will fight for our future, and that’s never been more important than it is today. Can we count on you to invest $5 or more right now in strengthening our state and local leadership?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241107?refcode=em20241107-39275&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39275_3422442_QfC4g5&akid=39275%2E3422442%2EQfC4g5)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241107?refcode=em20241107-39275&refcode2=39275_3422442_QfC4g5&akid=39275%2E3422442%2EQfC4g5)
State and local races may not always garner national attention, but these elected officials can improve folks’ day-to-day lives and empower our communities--especially now, when they will act as bulwarks against an extreme presidency.
Thanks,
Katie Porter

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241107-39275&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39275_3422442_QfC4g5&akid=39275%2E3422442%2EQfC4g5)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39275%2E3422442%2EQfC4g5).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Where do we go from here?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I know that many of you are sad and even angry about this week's election results. I get it. I am too.

Hey there.
I know that many of you are sad and even angry about this week's election results. I get it. I am too.
I also know that many of you are wondering what happens next. What can we do to make sure people are supported and protected from Donald Trump and his incoming administration's Project 2025 plans?
Fair questions.
Tomorrow night I am hosting a Zoom call to talk about all of this, including what we plan to do in California to stand with states across our nation to defend our Constitution and uphold the rule of law. And to hear from YOU — what’s on your mind, what are you concerned about?
I’ve held a few of these before — maybe you’ve joined one.
This event starts tomorrow at 4pm PST | 7pm EST, and I hope you can make it.
[**Use this link to say you're interested and we'll send you an email and a text message shortly before the event begins with a link to join.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/event/organizing-events/87?source=em241107-1-&akid=2280%2E4767699%2EDXaKcs)
[RSVP TO JOIN](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/event/organizing-events/87?source=em241107-1-&akid=2280%2E4767699%2EDXaKcs)
I know this is not the outcome we wanted, but our fight for freedom and opportunity must endure.
Gavin Newsom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=2280%2E4767699%2EDXaKcs).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

Our goal is to improve Oregon’s way of life by helping elect common-sense Republican leaders who will fight for YOU. | | | | | | | | The Democrats have had control of Oregon for far too long, it’s time for a change - but we can’t do it without you. Help us make a better tomorrow here in Oregon for you and your family by getting involved below: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Make sure you’re following us on socials to stay up to date on all things Oregon GOP!** ⬇ CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK ⬇Oregon Republican PartyPO Box 1586Lake Oswego, OR 97035 | | | | |

subject: Thank you for everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullen For Secretary of State
body:
Although we didn’t secure the victory we had hoped for yesterday, I want to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude for every ounce of support you gave to this campaign. | | | [](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=2fdf652aaa7e4aed8c4b154609b5fecc&_e=qpoH9Vm72OMLruBeEGRY5BZEDfp04GV99MkaGPAowaMqGNRjQ0jUrtOVpMpnolM7-1K9U6XIg65R7_xdANz9byjIR9UBMrrt1oDT3dNmNnG9MrNvAHX02iwEAP5Nm1xUk7p233TbmimZ4ttahwFzk2GaKWvSLjoqNrOzKqvt_ylkwZfL6P7TFvCACUc80Bj9jNHa2M3Y4-_cjLypBJxt6A%3D%3D) Friend, Although we didn’t secure the victory we had hoped for yesterday, I want to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude for every ounce of support you gave to this campaign. Your time, passion, and dedication have meant the world to me, and together, we made a difference by standing up for the values we believe in. Our mission to protect fair elections and ensure every voice is heard remains as important as ever. We’ve laid the groundwork for a better future, and I’m proud of what we’ve achieved together, from engaging new voters to strengthening community connections across Montana. Thank you, sincerely, for standing by me and believing in the possibility of a fairer, more just Montana. Our work is far from over, and I hope you’ll join me in continuing to fight for a future where democracy thrives. Thank you for everything,
Jesse James Mullen Paid for by Mullen For Secretary of State

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Things are heavy, but we have good news for Oregon
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96753223/511069280/-1918275715?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3OTFiMDdkLTQ4OWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k4Uwqx7dmgLU9K_ZsNp7fDhBnynDDEiRNgkvYjHRKIM=&emci=b167ab01-6a9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=5791b07d-489d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, Just like you, I’ve been feeling the weight of the devastation after the results from the presidential election. We were here once before, but now we truly know what’s at stake. When Donald Trump steps into office, we must be prepared to defend our climate, people, and places. This time we know what we will be fighting, and OLCV is committed to fighting like hell (albeit peacefully) against threats to our climate, our clean air and water, and the environment we all depend on. It’s hard not to worry about the future of our country. However, the presidential race reminds us of the importance of electing the right candidates here in Oregon. Our hard work this election cycle is not diminished by the presidential results, but is perhaps made more essential. As the federal government will backtrack on our progress and do damage to our climate and bedrock environmental protections, it’s up to states like Oregon to step up. While we are taking time to recover from and comprehend these results \- and I hope you all do the same - we turn to look at the good news that is happening right here in Oregon. The results will not be final until all the ballots are counted, but here’s what we know:
* **We elected a new supermajority to the Oregon State Senate,** and elected two new climate champions to the chamber with Senators-elect Khanh Pham and Anthony Broadman.

* We elected **3 pro-climate candidates statewide** to join us in this fight. We elected Dan Rayfield, one of our strongest climate champions, as our next attorney general. We will need his leadership to defend against environmental rollbacks and protect Oregonians against corporate polluters. We also elected Tobias Read as our next Secretary of State. He is committed to safeguarding our election processes and ensuring access to free and fair elections for all Oregon voters.

* It’s still too early to call some House races, but we know that we will **maintain at least a 35 seat majority in the Oregon House.** This strong majority with our senate supermajority, gives Democrats a mandate to lead on climate.

I want to thank our entire team that made these state wins a possibility; that includes our staff, volunteers, donors, and supporters. Thank you to everyone who showed up to vote in this election. We wouldn’t be here celebrating these wins if it wasn’t for you. I’m grateful to be living in a state that prioritizes climate, safety, and progress, regardless of what happens at the federal level. Thank you for your continued support, and for joining this fight with us. Together we can and will continue to make progress here in our beloved state of Oregon. It’s our time to step up, [and we hope you will join us.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96753224/511069282/-1869592716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3OTFiMDdkLTQ4OWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k4Uwqx7dmgLU9K_ZsNp7fDhBnynDDEiRNgkvYjHRKIM=&emci=b167ab01-6a9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=5791b07d-489d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=2107230) Take care of yourself. Don’t give up.
Sincerely,
Lindsey Scholten
OLCV Executive Director P.S. There are other ways to support and join our fight. [Check out other ways to get involved here!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96753225/511069283/966953210?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3OTFiMDdkLTQ4OWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k4Uwqx7dmgLU9K_ZsNp7fDhBnynDDEiRNgkvYjHRKIM=&emci=b167ab01-6a9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=5791b07d-489d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=2107230) |

name: Reed Olson
subject: Thank you for standing with me
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Vote Reed Olson Campaign committee PO Box 1943 Bemidji, MN 56619 [Click here to unsubscribe](https://votereedolson
body:
Our work doesn’t end here
---
| Reed Olson
---
| [ ](https://votereedolson.us/l/kk7Ls6w3P7cx)
---
|
---
Hey everybody, Unfortunately, we came up short on Tuesday. Thank you for standing with me in this fight. We fought for the issues that matter here in the Northwoods and ran an honest, transparent, and respectful campaign. I believe the future of our region is bright, and I will continue to fight to improve our community. I am beyond grateful to everyone who gave their time, money, and passion in support of my campaign. I couldn’t have made it as far as I did without your support, and I’m enormously proud of the work we did. **Thank you.** I know the news here in Minnesota and from across the country is disheartening—but if I’ve learned anything on the campaign trail, it’s the strength and resiliency of Minnesotans. In the days, weeks, and years to come, we will need to strengthen the ties that hold our community together and continue to lift one another up through difficult times. I have no doubt that we can and will continue to thrive as a community, if we work together. I hope you’ll stay in touch as my work continues. Feel free to keep in touch on [Facebook](https://votereedolson.us/l/7g3b4ObuA9dM) or [Instagram](https://votereedolson.us/l/yQwdW2ybnz3U). Thank you again for all your support during this campaign—it means the world to me.
---
\- Reed Olson
---
| [ ](https://votereedolson.us/l/J1KVq4O2rEZ5 "Facebook")
---
[ ](https://votereedolson.us/l/i1XhGDZMVqsk "Instagram")
---

---

name: Letter to Trump
subject: Thank you, President Trump. From: Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kX7_hm16PC7B4OltJbMOCg~~/AARclAA~ "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**
**THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP**
---
| | | [SIGN THE THANK YOU NOTE](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kX7_hm16PC7B4OltJbMOCg~~/AARclAA~ "Generic Button")
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kX7_hm16PC7B4OltJbMOCg~~/AARclAA~)
---

Thank God Trump won. It feels like "morning in America!". At sunrise, Wednesday morning, I waved at cars to thank voters in Lynchburg, Virginia. This morning I waved at cars to thank voters on the other side of the district in Goochland county, Virginia.
We have Trump in the White House, a Republican majority in the Senate and it looks like we will maintain a majority in the House. This is an amazing opportunity to help America.
I can't wait to get to work for you, We the People! Thank you for your prayers and your vote. It is an honor to be the Congressman-Elect for Virginia's 5th Congressional District. I look forward to seeing you soon!

_**Trump won the Presidency.**_
Now, the Supreme Court is set in the Radical Left’s sights.

And among them, Justice Clarence Thomas has been singled out.

Because in the last four years, he has delivered some of the _**BIGGEST WINS**_ for Conservatives in _**HISTORY.**_

_**He _PROTECTED_ your right to bear arms.**_

_**He _PROTECTED_ the unborn.**_

But most importantly...

He _**PROTECTED**_ President Trump from the **_DISGUSTING WITCH-HUNT_** that Joe Biden and the Radical Left attempted to carry out.

And the Radical Left is now doing _**ANYTHING**_ they can to _**REMOVE HIM**_ from the Supreme Court.

_**Their petition to _FORCE HIS RETIREMENT_ from the Supreme Court is now sitting at over _1.5 MILLION_ signatures... **_
And that number is _**SKYROCKETING!**_

clean_body: Now, the Supreme Court is set in the Radical Left’s sights. | | | | Trump won the Presidency. Now, the Supreme Court is set in the Radical Left’s sights. And among them, Justice Clarence Thomas has been singled out. Because in the last four years, he has delivered some of the BIGGEST WINS for Conservatives in HISTORY. He PROTECTED your right to bear arms. He PROTECTED the unborn. But most importantly... He PROTECTED President Trump from the DISGUSTING WITCH-HUNT that Joe Biden and the Radical Left attempted to carry out. And the Radical Left is now doing ANYTHING they can to REMOVE HIM from the Supreme Court. Their petition to FORCE HIS RETIREMENT from the Supreme Court is now sitting at over 1.5 MILLION signatures... And that number is SKYROCKETING! Please, please, please: WE CANNOT LET CLARENCE THOMAS BE REMOVED FROM THE COURT! | | | | PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING | Republican Majority PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Thank you, California
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8167%2E5257348%2EEUCwD7)
Derek —
I am deeply honored and humbled to be elected as California’s next United States Senator.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em.7WX_lH&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_NOA_RES_AC90_20241107_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=8167%2E5257348%2EEUCwD7)
I will spend every day trying to honor the trust that you have placed in me by serving this Golden State and our nation with all of my heart and soul.
California will continue to be at the forefront of progress and the fights ahead.
The bulwark of democracy.
The champion of innovation.
And the protector of our rights and freedom.
Our challenges and struggles are not insurmountable if we face them together.
__And my promise is that I’m going to deliver. Day one. Week one. Year one. And keep delivering.__
We do not stop, we do not rest, until all our citizens have a safe place to live, clean water to drink, clean air to breathe, safe neighborhoods to raise their families, good hospitals, clinics, and health care, and the best public schools in the world.
In the Senate, I will be a champion and a voice for all Californians. Whether you voted for me or not. Whether you’re in a big city or a small county. Whether you grew up here or came to America searching for a better life.
I will have a lot to say about the results of the Presidential election in the days ahead, but for now, I just wanted to express my sincere appreciation for the enormous trust you have placed in me.
With enormous gratitude,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/4932?refcode=AU_ABS_CL_NOA_RES_AC90_20241107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8167%2E5257348%2EEUCwD7)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Will you help us ensure every last vote is counted in Nevada?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
I have nowhere else to turn
| | |
---
Sorry to email you again friend – but I have important election news out of Nevada, and I have nowhere else to turn.
We are on the verge of winning our U.S. Senate race here in Nevada, but this race will come down to just a handful of votes. My campaign is hard at work phone banking and canvassing to help with ballot curing and to ensure _every_ _last vote_ is properly counted.
But we spent all of our resources to get through Election Day, and now we need emergency funds to keep this work going until the race is officially called. **My senior advisors and I just met, and they told me we need to raise another $136,299 to keep this work going.[_Will you chip in now to help get us across the finish line?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96754774/511074844/173338096?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5323-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjBjNzJlZC00YjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzlbTiM0DJBn0Odyf2pBMQh5LLUeQckthXlrE1m2RGM=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96754775/511074845/-107723448?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5323-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjBjNzJlZC00YjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzlbTiM0DJBn0Odyf2pBMQh5LLUeQckthXlrE1m2RGM=)
---
You can bet Republicans are going to put up a fight. But you and I know what hard work looks like – and I’m confident that we have what it takes to win in Nevada again if we can make it through this final step.
Thank you for sticking with me.

– Jacky
|
* * *

I’m glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fcab94c2130e476893cb8664804ad93c&_e=aHSf1Z3jZo8kcJ0bbhl5ITwbWpNJNiLuaTg51Pe5ipZ0OuvRo_frfLWMMtm-qraItvIngrk-ACuu7j1ik_9RN2ZPd15clKlJyC5dfg-lbacxos7bLR87JF7MHTGIkcuG9-OGwCsXPc5davARUTTIIGXsJp5sqJ_p7rs3nWx1ha5O9joNnKEGBo3s2vApnilAYEfDRmFWTpGdhvDI2bFPm7HrC_JKqJb-IxvFv7dV4Wp96bcms21ISflYDO5paaUyqZPIe3c6d7ThpDDyfEkoSj0aVpmPvo3ZRJaCHKn-zr5Z9eekWA3M0xoRWAoNX0ccOlPVnLvdGgFR6TGJNd7vKOxafZfGcfxqqGQABhsZ2qmMXzG8r1GQe2ed3EfVJhxd)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans’ concerns about CRT’s influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you’ll help us gather important insights to defend America’s founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fcab94c2130e476893cb8664804ad93c&_e=aHSf1Z3jZo8kcJ0bbhl5ITwbWpNJNiLuaTg51Pe5ipZ0OuvRo_frfLWMMtm-qraItvIngrk-ACuu7j1ik_9RN2ZPd15clKlJyC5dfg-lbacxos7bLR87JF7MHTGIkcuG9-OGwCsXPc5davARUTTIIGXsJp5sqJ_p7rs3nWx1ha5O9joNnKEGBo3s2vApnilAYEfDRmFWTpGdhvDI2bFPm7HrC_JKqJb-IxvFv7dV4WrQ5g0SPQHG7z1sKvR7Jr-bAt_SYBAx5CjFFTE55AY56YiAtWMTORCdnq2txSWd23zCQofcL4NRI4FuOsqCaDtckBcrmeGOpmIp8sbiSU9HQEHxgFSl26J2-RgXa6lZLo8GHOEH0exRi6-LsuY5izOy)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you’ll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=fcab94c2130e476893cb8664804ad93c&_t=kkH-QpnES9gZNtA1fzZEhm4J3DmGYEnLsGzXS-kl4Cuq6v2HCHftwzVE8i6pi_Y22OgTEe_UsKL4TLpDijUpnN7I5M2dimgaNvLikPBm85z9vvW4Yt9OaWHw0hjS_lXO)

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

Team — Like many of you, I’m still wrapping my mind around Tuesday’s results. But I want to make it clear: **it’s not over here in Arizona.** As we speak, our volunteers are out across counties statewide, curing ballots, matching signatures, and making sure that every last vote is counted. We still have quite a few races up and down the ballot that are too close to call, so we have to make sure that every ballot cast is counted in the results. But we only have until **Sunday at 5 p.m. to get it done**. **[I know we’ve asked a lot of you so far, but we really need your help to finish this job and protect democracy in Arizona. clean_body: | = Team — Like many of you, I’m still wrapping my mind around Tuesday’s results. But I want to make it clear: it’s not over here in Arizona. As we speak, our volunteers are out across counties statewide, curing ballots, matching signatures, and making sure that every last vote is counted. We still have quite a few races up and down the ballot that are too close to call, so we have to make sure that every ballot cast is counted in the results. But we only have until Sunday at 5 p.m. to get it done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Your support is vital at this moment and we can’t do this without you on our side. Thanks for everything, team. — Yolanda Bejarano, Chair Arizona Democratic Party = Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. RICK MCGUIRE, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG

abandoned them...While the Democratic Party leadership defends the status

If the Democratic Party leaned into the economic priorities of the working
class, it could’ve blunted Trump’s ability to increase his support amongst
working class Latinos in 2020 AND 2024. If these trends continue, and the
DNC ignores them, it could be an electoral checkmate. It’s a big reason
why Bernie is not happy with what Democrats did during this campaign.

Bernie said, “Will the big money interests and well-paid consultants who
control the Democratic Party learn any real lessons from this disastrous
campaign? Will they understand the pain and political alienation that tens
of millions of Americans are experiencing? Do they have any ideas as to
how we can take on the increasingly powerful Oligarchy which has so much
economic and political power? Probably not.”

It’s a scary prospect, but, as Bernie said, it could be our future if we

Bernie went directly after the failures of the Democratic Party: “It should come as no great surprise that a Democratic Party which has abandoned working class people would find that the working class has abandoned them...While the Democratic Party leadership defends the status quo, the American people are angry and want change.” [ ][IMG] Our post-election survey shows our supporters are feeling the way Bernie does. 76% of our survey respondents believe the Democratic Party has lost its way, and even more of our supporters feel Democrats neglected the working class. We will be working with our movement and progressive champions like Bernie to chart our path to resist the right-wing extremism of the next Trump term AND fundamentally change the Democratic Party. body:
I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96755334/511077139/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20241107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmEwMTEwYi00ZjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vmx7X6pQYGQ4ZXR_pSJOiQowMauCz2WU1U6uwooCXqE=)
---
Peter — When I first launched my campaign to be Arizona's next Senator, I never would’ve dreamed that so many people would have my back. It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we built together. Here’s where we’re at in my race against Kari Lake: I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down. Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it. (I know many of you have already given, but I’ve got to ask you one more time, Peter.) **[If you’re looking for some way to have an impact and help us fight back against Kari Lake as we work to ensure the votes are counted, please make a split donation to my campaign and Wiley Nickel:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96755335/511077140/-2067814555?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20241107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmEwMTEwYi00ZjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vmx7X6pQYGQ4ZXR_pSJOiQowMauCz2WU1U6uwooCXqE=)** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ruben Gallego and Wiley Nickel will process immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96755336/511077141/-2067814555?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20241107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmEwMTEwYi00ZjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vmx7X6pQYGQ4ZXR_pSJOiQowMauCz2WU1U6uwooCXqE=)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. #
Peter,
I want to say **thank you.** It was incredible to see Democrats of all backgrounds unite themselves behind Kamala Harris and her promise of a brighter, more hopeful way forward for our nation.
While I join the tens of millions of Americans who are disappointed that Vice President Harris’s vision for America will not come to fruition, I am inspired by the joy and support I saw her campaign receive.
Though Tuesday’s results were not what we hoped they’d be, there are still signs of America’s commitment to progress and change. **Angela Alsobrooks** and **Lisa Blunt Rochester** became the fourth and fifth Black women to ever serve in the Senate. And this will mark the first time two Black women will serve in the Senate together.
New Jersey’s **Andy Kim** will be the first Korean-American Senator. And **Sarah McBride** is now the first openly transgender person to serve in Congress. I hope that even in the midst of our concern for this new administration, we can take time to celebrate what we did accomplish.
My belief in our country will never waiver, no matter who is in office. As a United States Senator, I remain committed to ensuring liberty and equality for all Americans, and that our democracy is protected. I hope you will remain committed to that fight with me too.
Sincerely,
Sen. Dick Durbin

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: I am deeply honored.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Thanks to your incredible support, I'm deeply honored to be returning to Congress to continue fighting for the Eighth District. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96755950/511079173/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY3MDM0OC01MDlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UwkIh48wTWnFE0OHgQ8hgTppY8EVp1EpYj3jIQQoOs0=&emci=864829f9-729c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=d1670348-509d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Thank you.

The results are in, and thanks to your incredible support, **I'm deeply honored to be returning to Congress to continue fighting for Washington's Eighth District.** I have so much gratitude to share with each and every one of you.

First, thank you to the voters of the Eighth District who once again placed their trust in me to represent you in Congress and participated in the most essential part of our democracy. Second, thank you to all the Team Schrier volunteers who knocked doors, called voters, wrote postcards, and spoke to their neighbors.

I know we didn't get all the results we were hoping for Tuesday night. These will be challenging years, but I remain hopeful about the resilience of this country.

Now, more than ever, we must continue the work of fighting to bring down costs, taking every step to protect women's healthcare, and bringing federal dollars back to our communities. My focus has always been to serve each individual person and community in our district, and they know that they can count on me.

Throughout my time in Congress, I've worked with presidents from both parties to pass legislation that benefits Washington's Eighth Congressional District and that's exactly what I plan to continue to do. Whether in the majority or the minority, I am committed to continuing the fight for the people of our district.

**It's the honor of my life to serve Washington's Eighth District.** I know our work is far from over, and I'm grateful to have the chance to continue fighting for you as your representative. _I look forward to listening, learning, and delivering for every one of you._

Thank you again, Peter.

– Kim [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96755951/511079174/689297826?refcode=em24_241107_reslts_enask_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241107_reslts_enask_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d1670348-509d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTY3MDM0OC01MDlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UwkIh48wTWnFE0OHgQ8hgTppY8EVp1EpYj3jIQQoOs0=) Rep. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What's next
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
If the things we fought for in this election still matter to us, then we
must continue the fight.

That’s all I know for sure.

How we can be more effective in this fight, what we can learn from our
mistakes and our opponents’ successes, how we can better connect to the
deepest needs and aspirations of the people we seek to serve – that is
what we must focus our efforts on answering. We should do this by
listening to our neighbors, our fellow Texans and Americans. And as the
data becomes available (typically we get full election numbers sometime in
the first quarter of the following year) we should pay attention to what
it tells us.

But I think it’s critical that we begin by listening, with humility and a
deep desire to understand, to the people who voted for Trump, to the
people who voted for Harris and to the people who didn’t vote at all. We
must be open to hard truths and be willing to challenge our assumptions
and those things that have become comfortable and convenient for us.

We must also resist any temptation to abandon the fight. To do so would
cede the country completely to Trump, someone who will continue to exploit
our badly broken democracy to amass even greater power and control. We
know that because of what he’s done before and what he tells us he will do
in the future. Unchecked, that will lead to an America no longer governed
by rule of law, a tyranny whose government is no longer of, by and for the
people.

Though we are tempted to despair, we must remember that action is the
antidote. There is no amount of worrying or finger-pointing, no quantity
of Twitter or cable television, that can get us where we want to be. For
me, action means moving my body (running, hiking, walking, biking, etc.),
being with friends and family, meeting up with neighbors (especially those
with whom we disagree) and staying in motion. It means committing myself
to the work ahead, continuing to register voters, to work on campaigns
(there is mayoral run-off in El Paso, lots of doors to knock here), and
finding ways to help and volunteer in my community.

To all of our Powered by People volunteers and donors: while we will have
a more complete picture after we are given access to the full voter data
that will be released sometime in the first quarter of 2025, it is clear
that the work we pursued this year shows promise.

After spending the better part of 2024 registering and confirming the
registration of young voters across Texas and then staying in touch with
them on a peer-to-peer basis (versus impersonal mass emails or texts) to
help them to vote, we have some preliminary indicators through early
voting (minus Election Day – that’s in the data coming in Q1 2025).

Overall, the voters in our network turned out at a rate nearly 7% higher
than the statewide average. And perhaps more importantly, the young voters
(18 to 29 years old) in our network turned out at a rate 22% greater than
the statewide average for young voters. This was the result of thousands
of hours spent meeting new voters on college campuses and other public
spaces and thousands more spent staying in touch with these voters all the
way through 7pm on election day. Our volunteers texted 285,421 times with
the voters in our network – reminders on early voting, sharing poll
location and voter ID information, answering questions and encouraging
first time voters to help them overcome the voter suppression and
intimidation measures for which Texas is infamous.

My deepest gratitude to all who made this work possible, whether by
volunteering your time or devoting your resources. I will share more
findings from our work as they become available. Those findings, and the
feedback I get from volunteers and voters, will inform the work that we
pursue in 2025 and beyond.

It’s a tough time. I hope we can rise to the challenge before us, keep the
faith in one another and in this great country, and find a way to win
without compromising our core beliefs and values.

I’m grateful to be in this fight with you.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=239893%2E444211%2EHJhZHz

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

clean_body: There is still important work we need to finish. | | | Last night, Vice President Harris stood before a crowd in Washington, D.C. to concede the presidential race and thank you all for your inspiring efforts in this election. She also promised to never give up the fight for our future. Today, I am asking you to do the same thing. There are very important Senate races where ballots are still being counted in Arizona, Nevada, and Pennsylvania.****These candidates may be our only chance at checking Donald Trump's power, and they need our help to get across the finish line. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I think we’re all feeling a little bit of sadness right now. Perhaps, because we remember all of the chaos and confusion that Donald Trump and his allies pulled four years ago. That is exactly why I am asking you to stay in this fight. We can’t sit on the sidelines, folks. ** Thank you for being with us every step of the way. Tim Tim Walz Governor, Minnesota | | | |

# [Legal immigration is good. ---
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8241ad6f-6423-4104-b855-9ad0997d7d16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### Liberal patriotism
One of my favorite things about Obama is that he deported millions of illegal immigrants.1 That took real courage as a Democrat. He didn't do it because he's a fascist or a sadist; he did so -- as humanely as he could -- because he's a _patriot_.
Barack recognized that this blessed American story only endures if all Americans feel a strong sense of _agency_ in co-_authoring_ it.
Illegal immigration strikes at the core of that sacred right to self-determination. It takes agency away from citizens; strips self-authorship from our communities; and corrupts our national character -- not racially, but morally -- by rewarding cheating and punishing integrity.
It is _bad_.
I am actually bored by the economic debate: whether illegal immigrants depress working class wages2, reduce inflation3, pay more in taxes than they get in services4, or drive up the cost of housing.5
Instead, I'm driven by a deeper, cultural truth:
_**The United States is not an economic opportunity zone.** **We 're a nation. And nations enforce barriers to entry and set standards for membership, period. When we don't, we become more divided, less generous, and less secure.**_
That's why the Biden-Harris administration's treasonous disrespect of American borders and American security didn't just alienate white Republicans.
It also _enraged_ naturalized citizens and liberal patriots like me.
### **Political failure, illegal excess**
We absolutely need migrants for essential labor in agriculture, services, hospitality, and construction -- and I _hate it_ when the media calls these workers "unskilled."6
Congress must create guest worker programs and _legal_ visas, with _legal_ pathways to citizenship. And if we fail, whether it's Biden's fault or Trump's, well, let's live with the consequences.7
_**Political failure is not an excuse for presidential lawlessness and illegality.**_
Biden didn't run on a platform of mass illegal immigration to the tune of _10 million_ encounters since he took office.8 If he had, he would have lost in 2020 -- bigly.
It's undemocratic for the president to sanction all this illegal migration: Congress didn't authorize it, and I sure as hell never voted for it.
### **It 's also the border, stupid?**
[I predicted on Sept. 25 that Trump will win because "it's the economy, stupid." ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0fd7b7fd-bd1a-4e20-9dd5-a0d6d004b625?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I didn't expect him to crush Harris and also win the popular vote.
What turned a comfortable W into a historic rout was the reality captured in these [WaPo](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e9ae4390-0739-4798-9208-63d3d903faa5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) charts below.9 They don't show the full picture, because around 40% of illegal immigrants are visa overstays.10 Still, it tells the story of this election more vividly than almost anything else:
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/58372384-d56a-47a1-89fe-b094f727172e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/41986845-7400-4f1d-b59f-f291ad26aabe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7386bbbb-3069-4de7-b514-a29350b259ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/168d7126-d12f-4f15-be53-2d0d223c757b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e9794d15-7068-41aa-b51a-77cdc365c4c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2c1c7b30-9d72-403e-8491-b1cd42de5624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
1
['Obama Has Deported More People Than Any Other President,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8e54c19f-706f-46a3-8133-787a25c841fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _ABC News_ , Aug. 29, 2016.
2

3
['Economists Say Increasing Immigration Will Reduce Inflation,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/08727b9d-8577-4005-84fb-707ee60ebfeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Stuart Andersen, _Forbes_ , May 4, 2023.
4
['The Fiscal Burden of Illegal Immigration on United States Taxpayers | 2023 Cost Study,' ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2c1143f8-7247-4bf0-97f5-7ef992549f57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_Federation for American Immigration Reform (FAIR)_ , March 8, 2023.
5
['The Consequences of Illegal Immigration for Housing Affordability, Government Budgets, and American Workers,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/83a670e6-9c0e-4eb9-8971-af2f0fda2547?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Steven A. Camarota, _Prepared Testimony to the U.S. House Oversight and Accountability Committee, Subcommittee on National Security, the Border, and Foreign Affairs_ , Sept. 25, 2024
6
['Industries of unauthorized immigrant workers,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/aac20d44-329d-4009-b30c-74ea88d7869e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _Pew Research Center,_ Nov. 3, 2016.
7
'Biden blames Trump for bringing border deal to verge of collapse,' _ABC News_ , Feb. 6, 2024.
8
['How many migrants have crossed the US border illegally?](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b9f9a0b9-0f39-4f92-b5a2-4b6bf69b36c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),'_BBC Verify,_ Sept. 29, 2024 _._
9
['Trump vs. Biden on immigration: 12 charts comparing U.S. border security,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e9ae4390-0739-4798-9208-63d3d903faa5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _The Washington Post_ , Feb. 11, 2024.
10
['Visa overstays; the immigration problem that no one is talking about,'](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1f57f393-abe5-4f32-bc43-0811367eb7be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _ABC-15, Arizona_ , Dec 20, 2023.
