clean_body: If Democrats wanna win next time, we better start shouting it from the port of Ellis Island to the halls of Congress. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more If Democrats wanna win next time, we better start shouting it from the port of Ellis Island to the halls of Congress. | | | Nov 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | Liberal patriotism One of my favorite things about Obama is that he deported millions of illegal immigrants.1 That took real courage as a Democrat. He didn't do it because he's a fascist or a sadist; he did so -- as humanely as he could -- because he's a patriot. Barack recognized that this blessed American story only endures if all Americans feel a strong sense of agency in co-authoring it. Illegal immigration strikes at the core of that sacred right to self-determination. It takes agency away from citizens; strips self-authorship from our communities; and corrupts our national character -- not racially, but morally -- by rewarding cheating and punishing integrity. It is bad. I am actually bored by the economic debate: whether illegal immigrants depress working class wages2, reduce inflation3, pay more in taxes than they get in services4, or drive up the cost of housing.5 Instead, I'm driven by a deeper, cultural truth: The United States is not an economic opportunity zone. We 're a nation. And nations enforce barriers to entry and set standards for membership, period. When we don't, we become more divided, less generous, and less secure. That's why the Biden-Harris administration's treasonous disrespect of American borders and American security didn't just alienate white Republicans. It also enraged naturalized citizens and liberal patriots like me. Political failure, illegal excess We absolutely need migrants for essential labor in agriculture, services, hospitality, and construction -- and I hate it when the media calls these workers "unskilled."6 Congress must create guest worker programs and legal visas, with legal pathways to citizenship. And if we fail, whether it's Biden's fault or Trump's, well, let's live with the consequences.7 Political failure is not an excuse for presidential lawlessness and illegality. Biden didn't run on a platform of mass illegal immigration to the tune of 10 million encounters since he took office.8 If he had, he would have lost in 2020 -- bigly. It's undemocratic for the president to sanction all this illegal migration: Congress didn't authorize it, and I sure as hell never voted for it. It 's also the border, stupid? I didn't expect him to crush Harris and also win the popular vote. What turned a comfortable W into a historic rout was the reality captured in these charts below.9 They don't show the full picture, because around 40% of illegal immigrants are visa overstays.10 Still, it tells the story of this election more vividly than almost anything else: 1 ABC News , Aug. 29, 2016. 2 George J. Borjas, Politico Magazine, Sept./Oct. 2016. 3 Stuart Andersen, Forbes , May 4, 2023. 4 for American Immigration Reform (FAIR) , March 8, 2023. 5 Steven A. Camarota, Prepared Testimony to the U.S. House Oversight and Accountability Committee, Subcommittee on National Security, the Border, and Foreign Affairs , Sept. 25, 2024 6 Pew Research Center, Nov. 3, 2016. 7 'Biden blames Trump for bringing border deal to verge of collapse,' ABC News , Feb. 6, 2024. 8 Verify, Sept. 29, 2024 . 9 The Washington Post , Feb. 11, 2024. 10 ABC-15, Arizona , Dec 20, 2023. We can’t afford to lose another Senate seat
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96756317/511080584/95474053?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1733-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjFjNjU3ZC01MjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IwxWllHuuLalX4rmD1otBUKKcVcI5E9eWTnBrROPClM=)
Here's where things stand, Peter: **Nevada’s Senate race is not over – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.******

We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban.

Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: [Please, will you split $5 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and Letitia James' to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96756318/511080585/95474053?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1733-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjFjNjU3ZC01MjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IwxWllHuuLalX4rmD1otBUKKcVcI5E9eWTnBrROPClM=)

We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and keep Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country.

Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But now, we’re starting from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win.

So please, Peter, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment: [Split $5 or more right now to help my campaign get across the finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96756320/511080587/95474053?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1733-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjFjNjU3ZC01MjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IwxWllHuuLalX4rmD1otBUKKcVcI5E9eWTnBrROPClM=)

| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/the-sleeper-issues-in-the-trump-tsunami?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
November 7, 2024
Donald Trump is the President Elect winning 312 electoral votes and the popular vote. His coattails may allow Republicans to hold the House and has given them majority control of the Senate with at least 52 seats and a chance of 53 to 54.
Pundits, professors and political junkies will be dissecting the causes of this unexpected blow out for decades. Was it an economy characterized by high inflation? Were the voters frustrated with illegal immigration? Did the outbreak of wars in Ukraine and Israel cause nuclear anxiety? Maybe cultural wars on abortion, gun control, political correctness, DEI (Diversity, Equity and Inclusion) mandates and transgender rights tipped the scale.
Or was it because Kamala Harris was a weak candidate, or the country was not ready for a Black woman president. Maybe the Democrats would have been better off hiding Biden in the basement and winning as they did in 2020. Or maybe the Democrats should have nominated popular governors such as Shapiro, Newsom or Whitmer.
But one factor is rarely mentioned: Many Americans were repulsed by the vicious prosecutorial attacks on President Trump, starting with Mueller's Russian hoax and endless legal harassment after he lost reelection.
When President Trump decided to run again, polls indicated that Republicans were willing to look elsewhere. There was a time when Florida Governor Ron DeSantis was leading Trump in the New Hampshire primary.
But then the Biden/Harris administration in cahoots with New York and Georgia prosecutors along with special council Jack Smith (appointed by Attorney General Merrick Garland) went for Trump's jugular. And with each attack, President Trump ticked up in the polls until by the time the Iowa caucuses had arrived, the Republican base was outraged, The other candidates were toast.
New York Attorney General Leticia James accused Trump of inflating real estate assets to obtain bank loans. There was only one problem. All the banks who lent Trump money were paid back to the penny, a fact that James conceded. But that didn't stop Judge Engoron, with his snarky liberal grin, from ordering President Trump to pay $500,000,000 in fines. This was a direct violation of the Eighth Amendment which states "Excessive bail shall not be required, nor excessive fines imposed." Yet the corporate media cheered this travesty, and the ACLU was nowhere to be found.
But this was just the beginning. If an underling told a District Attorney that he wanted to charge a 78-year-old man with 34 felony counts for having a tryst with porn star 20 years ago and then using tricky bookkeeping to cover it up, the prosecutor would have gone into fits of uncontrollable laughter. Unless the 78-year-old man was Donald Trump. Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg did just that, securing a conviction against Trump and a theoretical sentence of 136 years in prison!
And on it goes. Ms. E. Jean Carroll accused Trump of sexually harassing her thirty years ago but could not produce a scintilla of evidence the event occurred. She posed on the cover of New York Magazine in the Donna Karan jacket she was wearing during the alleged assault. The problem was that the jacket was debuted at least three years after she claimed alleged event occurred. The Trump-hating judge threatened to jail Trump's lawyer if she presented this exculpatory evidence to the jury.
And then there was the Georgia incident, where Trump was arrested and had his mug shot taken to further humiliate him. His crime, asking the Secretary of the State to find more votes. The prosecutor Fani Willis used taxpayer money to hire her lover to help with the case even though he had no expertise in cases of this nature. He then used this money for each of them to go on lavish trips. When Willis was questioned under oath about this, she perjured herself. Of course nothing happened to her.
But the worst incident was when the Biden/Harris administration sent twenty-nine government agents, some armed with automatic weapons with orders "to use deadly force if necessary" into Trump's house over a silly argument about classified documents.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5fd53098-3e3b-4909-b70f-5ead50da2c20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Trump's Mug Shot after he was arrested in Georgia
During the final weeks of the campaign, Harris, Biden and uber wealthy celebrities were calling Trump a Nazi and a Fascist. But Trump never sent storm troopers into a political opponent's house. Trump never unleashed the justice department to investigate a political opponent's sex life or conger up bogus charges that resulted in a half a billion-dollar judgment. And to add insult to injury, corrupt legal boards had Trump's lawyers Rudy Giuliani and John Eastman disbarred! It was the Biden/Harris administration that acted like Nazis and Fascists.
American just dodged a bullet. Had Harris won, her pleasant smile and disarming laugh would have become an icy stare. And this former ruthless prosecutor would have unleashed the judicial system to harass, bankrupt and imprison political opponents. Hopefully Trump with have the courage and ability to dismantle this corrupt system.

name: Callie Barr
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
While the outcome was not what I had hoped for, know that I believe in who we are and in who we might still be.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96756608/511081875/1201310784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjdmNjljYTEtNTM5ZC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jVSqJ5iqx24FGqhuJHV-DOxKcgTsNcB5KmlsVr_JTUM=&emci=1cc990bc-249d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=67f69ca1-539d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=9697413)
---
| Peter,

Thank you.

Our campaign would not have been possible without your support, encouragement, and belief in the meaningfulness of the work we did here. It matters. And it will continue to matter.

As a born and raised Northern Michigander, I ran for office with a unifying message of showing up for this district and working together to move us forward.

While the outcome was not what I had hoped for, know that I believe in who we are and in who we might still be.

This campaign was always about something bigger than just one election–it was about bringing our communities together and fighting for a future that reflects the values of Upper and Northern Michigan.

I encourage Rep. Jack Bergman to work to unite us, not divide us. I hope he will stand up for our democracy and show up for our communities because we deserve nothing less.

Thank you to each and every one of you who supported this campaign, who showed up, believed, and gave it your all. I am profoundly grateful to you. What we’ve done here has ripple effects beyond us - our investment in each other, in this district, is not lost.

Keep the faith; I know I will.

Callie Barr
---

* * *

name: Mark Warner
subject: This isn’t the result we wanted.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
But we will not give up.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96757065/511083270/1512030565?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_ElectionResults_241107_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU1MThlYS01MzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oOBk3cp13_PgT_Li5v9jGq5HdvNC5GUGPQ7LlvMzR1Q=) Derek,

I know we’re all likely reeling from the election results. While Virginians voted to reelect Senator Tim Kaine and for Kamala Harris as our next President, across the country we saw a different story. There’s no way to sugarcoat that this isn’t the outcome we wanted.

I wanted to take a moment to say thank you for joining me in this fight. While it didn’t turn out like we’d hoped, we can’t dwell on this loss. This is when we have to commit to standing up and fighting for our freedoms.

The next four years won’t be easy, but I promise you that my fellow Democrats – including Tim, thanks in no small part to your support – and I will do everything we possibly can to withstand Trump’s dangerous agenda. We will be united against the forces of chaos in the White House.

The fact of the matter is, regardless of who is president, I pledge to always look for opportunities to get things done for Virginians and our country. I will push past the division and partisanship that tears our country apart.

In the years to come, we must band together and recommit to our mission of electing Democrats up and down the ballot who will focus on real results, not division and partisan gain.

**That work begins now.**

I can’t wait to continue working with Tim in the Senate to deliver for Virginians, and frankly, we all know we have some big fights ahead.

[_**In 2026, we have the opportunity to reclaim the Senate, and my name will be on the ballot. If you are able, I’m personally asking if you can chip in $5 right now to my campaign so we can take back the Senate.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96757066/511083271/1512030565?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_ElectionResults_241107_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU1MThlYS01MzlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oOBk3cp13_PgT_Li5v9jGq5HdvNC5GUGPQ7LlvMzR1Q=)

We will get through this together.

Mark Warner

That work begins now. I can’t wait to continue working with Tim in the Senate to deliver for Virginians, and frankly, we all know we have some big fights ahead. = We will get through this together. Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Greetings

As a reminder, the Young Democrats of America will gather for an exciting Winter Meeting from **December 6-8** in **Boston, Massachusetts**. This in-person event will bring together young leaders from across the nation for discussions and reflections on the 2024 election results, hands-on training sessions, important organizational business, and much more. You can find all the information in this email on our website at **[yda.org/ydabos](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mqfLav433QGxwS8LKF02-tc5qhDhhJOtrktTf5HsODWGqpi6BqSfjRTkmNZLSbLOLPPQwEZlenmw5HYbtqMmmD3WvNIZjWolLJ3CJ_MTt-khy2XMdyag1TNiRo2dKXQQeYHUmQZn9Nl3O1ArwEhqw6rZXz2EisOu_Rpo6d-regcYIxnveVvdc3qneYlmfxvxwVHgu4Xk7bX5UMnHsmt9vzVO0C36lEt7w-Iao6KTfjLGMhkSZX6lO-767pMdHIBAzSwMduVI1VlmsnHWoM88c48/4b9/yKp9IUCcRbCVpzelIL7VNQ/h1/h001.p81Rl7S0Ck2kYbRKNo8E2L13Y9z2fRnxELWUGl7vXuU)

******
* * *
**Registration
****
[Click here to register](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39ispmPgnyBeLzstfRs0GcNMmQ8i0Uu7JlJXUCxxrJCmVayzfdYy_WXbK15jiZ-HUDJl6k-hcG4ep2YipgWacCeEOjPqdkA7aH9CqFZFDV-oafLPhuJbh2Sg0JtH8evmyMH8JycRiZdvqukVakxf3HQCuB1B23OyUFa3urLNNtNFdyB8oT_FYIpUXu_0hdsQWxnIb3SqX9m4zYA9UHj796zmbwMsDe5HkzEmDMgKHSCdP31KG-_5qAl-t-OkX90nNX4Vi5t92H8XcJAlsfQp792-C6TYC84VjKOz2QcEUuopb2BswAvu_AoAl7m9UqHGRCi0qmz8WRH5aPzNalY2SUM/4b9/yKp9IUCcRbCVpzelIL7VNQ/h2/h001.y-eJVs8hW9tI_TSxxOvudUeMFL_6YEWBlnNh7_rg7rA) **at the early bird rate of **$60.00**. The early bird registration rate is valid until**November****10, 2024**.
****
* * *
**Reserving a Hotel Room
**
Lodging will be available at the Hyatt Place Boston Seaport (295 Northern Ave, Boston, MA). name: Jonathan Nez
subject: Help us cure ballots to know the final result!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter, Ballots are still being counted and tabulated, and I’m still very much in the running to win this race. In a race this close, the winner could be determined by “cured” ballots — ballots that had some sort of error or mistake and must be corrected to count. [**That’s why I’m launching a new fund to raise money for our critical work to ensure that every ballot is fairly counted. Can I count on you to stand with me by chipping in?**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/2ukYBVxEdjSUb9Xhc7Bdpg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpD8K1P0TcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL25lejExMjQ_YW1vdW50PTEwJnJlZmNvZGUzPUVNX05CSV9ORVpfMjAyNDAxMTA3X0JhbGxvdEN1cmVfM01PX05lel9OQV9OQV8xXzEmY2RtYz0yb1hRQ0pzTzQxMkhzb3dYa1lJRUpxcE1UZ0cmcmVmY29kZTI9Mm9YUUNKc080MTJIc293WGtZSUVKcXBNVGdHJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJvWFFDSnNPNDEySHNvd1hrWUlFSnFwTVRnR1cDc3BjQgpnK7U9LWeLtz-DUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAABdg~~) We know it’s been a long, tough election season, but our team has exhausted our existing resources on advertising in the final stretch to ensure our message reached as many voters as possible. That’s why I’m asking again for your support. I’m so grateful to all of you who made this people-powered campaign possible. This congressional race wasn’t considered close when I first launched this campaign, but thanks to people like you, we may still prevail once all votes are counted. [**Please chip in here to ensure every vote is counted.**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/2ukYBVxEdjSUb9Xhc7Bdpg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpD8K1P0TcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL25lejExMjQ_YW1vdW50PTEwJnJlZmNvZGUzPUVNX05CSV9ORVpfMjAyNDAxMTA3X0JhbGxvdEN1cmVfM01PX05lel9OQV9OQV8xXzEmY2RtYz0yb1hRQ0pzTzQxMkhzb3dYa1lJRUpxcE1UZ0cmcmVmY29kZTI9Mm9YUUNKc080MTJIc293WGtZSUVKcXBNVGdHJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJvWFFDSnNPNDEySHNvd1hrWUlFSnFwTVRnR1cDc3BjQgpnK7U9LWeLtz-DUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAABdg~~) Thanks so much, Jonathan Nez

clean_body: | Hi Peter, Ballots are still being counted and tabulated, and I’m still very much in the running to win this race. In a race this close, the winner could be determined by “cured” ballots — ballots that had some sort of error or mistake and must be corrected to count. ~~ We know it’s been a long, tough election season, but our team has exhausted our existing resources on advertising in the final stretch to ensure our message reached as many voters as possible. That’s why I’m asking again for your support. I’m so grateful to all of you who made this people-powered campaign possible. name: Jude for Congress
subject: ✴️​ A Heartfelt Thank You to an Amazing Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tad Jude for Congress
body:
| | [](http://email.mg.tadjude.com/c/eJxMz7Fy4zAMBNCvEZsMPQAJAWChIo1_IwMSlKMbKfZETO73b-zqyp3d4q39-Na_Wv_YfBFFCu3-NayNZ8YGdXaaYyvSI2mfo3nniNWEpYqvLQVfWLLN4KEvKBkBNXMJn0tV611KdnNUTCUDiiBTBcnEcwnbkiARIkhKiUEvarlKbggt87wqTATH7TLM__x4v7T7Efblc4zHOeX3KV2ndP2vm9I1HP087fb6Ar1rwVJjViqRpGk05RKB2bg2Wteu4f59e24Tq6RsLZIXibTOECvWGpFMyto5gXD4Xvzxd9v37WSZCG6HbfvLNBbEj_T23sb2u53jfEth9OOx23hB8ooOjB6lOEfyrtFyzVEqCFVCUqXwu6R_AQAA__-vLHFD)
---
Dear Team,

As we wrap up this campaign, I want to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude to each of you who volunteered and supported this mission. While we didn’t achieve the outcome we worked so hard for, I am incredibly proud of the race we ran together. Flipping Minnesota’s 3rd District red was never going to be easy, but your determination made it possible to share our message with so many people.

To everyone who donated, door-knocked, dropped literature, installed signs, and texted until your fingers were numb—thank you. You poured your heart into this campaign, and I am deeply grateful for all your efforts. This was an incredible team.

Throughout the campaign, we advocated for a vision of a more affordable Minnesota, secure borders, and safer communities, all rooted in the core values of faith, family, freedom, and love of country. These values are bigger than any election, and I know we will continue to live them out in our lives and champion them in our communities.

You generously gave your time and talents over the last few months. While I may not have won this race, through our collective efforts, we achieved something important: we planted seeds for a brighter future in Minnesota’s Third District. When that future is realized, we’ll know that our efforts helped pave the way.

Jackie and I are incredibly grateful for your hard work and friendship throughout this campaign. We are blessed not only to have met so many great people but to call you friends. This may be the end of this chapter, but I know we will all continue our work to restore the promise of Minnesota in the days ahead.

With heartfelt appreciation,

---
---
Paid for by Tad Jude for Congress

PO Box 1881, Maple Grove, MN 55311

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: a moment to reflect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
While I am deeply disappointed by the result of the presidential election, I am proud to live in a country where we have free and fair elections and our voices are heard at the ballot box.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96757836/511086271/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-11-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmJiNTg0M2UtNTg5ZC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9NHQurzN4PsLmseelJQ5vqXQNoQyvIH3e8h4H48ZvnM=)
---
| Peter,

In her concession speech, Vice President Harris spoke of her belief in and hope for our United States, and she made clear her commitment to something essentially American — the peaceful transfer of power. Through her words, she set an example of leadership for both those who voted for her and those who did not.

While I am deeply disappointed by the result of the presidential election, I am proud to live in a country where we have free and fair elections and our voices are heard at the ballot box. I know that every vote matters, and that is especially true in choosing our representatives in the halls of Congress. As we wait for the results in Congressional races across the country, I remain hopeful that we will have a vibrant House Democratic Caucus that will stand up for the people they represent, the values we hold dear, and the institutions that have transformed the idea of America into an extraordinary nation.

There are still so many reasons to be hopeful for our country and the future we can build together. Just this week, the people of Virginia’s 7th District – the district I have proudly represented for three terms — elected a new Member of Congress who fled the Soviet Union as a child, arrived in America as a refugee, went on to serve our country in the U.S. Army, and will now represent an expansive and diverse community in Congress.

Eugene Vindman’s win shows that ours is still a land of incredible promise, though we may feel our divisions acutely at this moment. There’s much hard work ahead, and I am ready to look towards and work towards that future. I hope you will join me.

In my campaign to serve as the next Governor of Virginia, I’ll continue to engage Virginians across our Commonwealth on the issues that matter most — stronger schools, safer communities, and lower costs for Virginia families.

All Virginians, particularly our children, deserve leadership that brings people together around the values that unite us.

[_**That’s why I hope you’ll consider contributing to our campaign today. Every contribution shows that we are motivated and ready to do what it takes to win next year.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96757837/511086272/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-11-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmJiNTg0M2UtNTg5ZC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9NHQurzN4PsLmseelJQ5vqXQNoQyvIH3e8h4H48ZvnM=)

body:

name: Evan Low
subject: Heartfelt thanks for every step we took together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Evan Low for Congress
body:
Though we didn’t reach the finish line as we’d hoped, I’m incredibly proud of everything we accomplished together. Our campaign brought important issues to the forefront and highlighted the power of a people-driven movement.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96758007/511086794/-366088911?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk4NTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzRmMTRiMzAtNTk5ZC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Yp8qCDSoxyYrqEKCbAaZu3hJXYc7hOMZnNfmsXUqICE=&emci=2db4342a-599d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=c4f14b30-599d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=6835538)
---
| Hey team,

I want to express my deepest gratitude for every moment, conversation, and contribution that fueled this campaign. We poured ourselves into this race—advocating for inclusivity, standing up for our shared values, and working to make progress.

**Though we didn’t reach the finish line as we’d hoped, I’m incredibly proud of everything we accomplished together.** Our campaign brought important issues to the forefront and highlighted the power of a people-driven movement.

**To Sam Liccardo, I extend my congratulations.** Representing our district is an honor, and I wish him success in serving and addressing the challenges we face.

**As we close down this campaign, know this:** our work isn’t over. I will continue advocating for what we believe in—whether on the streets of our district or from any platform I can.

Thank you, truly, for believing in this vision and for standing by me every step of the way. I am grateful beyond words.

Best,
Evan Low
---

* * *
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96758008/511086795/-366088911?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk4NTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzRmMTRiMzAtNTk5ZC1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Yp8qCDSoxyYrqEKCbAaZu3hJXYc7hOMZnNfmsXUqICE=&emci=2db4342a-599d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=c4f14b30-599d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=6835538)

---
Paid for by Evan Low for Congress
Evan Low for Congress
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
United States

| | **Throughout his time in public service, Evan has defended our most vulnerable and built coalitions to deliver solutions. Now, he's running for Congress at an inflection point for Silicon Valley and the nation.

Our region needs a representative who will lead on maintaining our global competitiveness, combat hate, stand up for the vulnerable, protect reproductive freedom, reduce crime in our communities, and ensure the middle class can once again afford to buy a house and raise a family where they work.

Together, we will usher in a new era of courageous leadership for Silicon Valley.**
---

name: Letter to Trump
subject: Thank you, President Trump. From: Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=71aab25f782e429986372f9e5a0ae4ce&_e=pFf8nit0soH4lmXp3MBFwO7GMuw9JiVL9imLCBLN7JrrvKCcFdKS1ryLC1KjPcqYlJ27nf4A_TuEvTDkhpph-_UgoAsyybYTo23oBk6ze-DH8uKY5_lCQzwNift6_rw1DTg-S7rTUNBc7gxQ2JmnbKZVKpI6AzDl4Ji9efiXw9Ziv1gSNcoFHsIXRXNdqVExIrZmT295X1xIzb5r5grH9qQNRcnqqecuwearYep3DLGUOA_2RFo9Q67AIFoQZ1zduGztAlvvbKUh1flJIySQQmgohkPzSEIVejm6IwwxINxAN1GmpXy8nqpzovQO6OrsHx9EcorW1GBZJ8eiH9_zalX_F1TCRa7Ugpnye_1dhDz-jVf9vzIVyE2ZHqmq9Z_4wpOLOdjRB_SuvdHil_d3xJhK8Af-BycI7-q7t1k7eP4%3D "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**

subject: CA-27 is still too close to call

"Democrats are particularly hopeful that late ballots could help lift Democratic challengers Adam Gray and George Whitesides over their respective GOP opponents"
| ****[Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96758124/511087373/-613562098?refcode=em-11.7.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTQwYmUwOC01YTlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eleNFcX1dntcPaQP43-i0bmuP9fMqilTRXpIRg3Cglg=)****

Peter,

CA-27 is among just a few California House races that WILL decide control of the House. Winning the House is Democrats’ last stand against MAGA extremism.

That’s why we’re fighting for every last vote to be counted in this race. This district was only won by a few hundred votes in the past, so we can’t let up when so much is on the line.

**As it stands, we’re less than 5,000 votes behind Mike Garcia with about 30% of the vote left to count. This race is still too close to call.**

This is going down to the wire. Our campaign account is completely dry, and we’re starting from square one to ensure a fair and accurate recount.

**[Please chip in $3 or any amount to move us closer to our $20,000 fundraising goal to prepare for a likely recount in this critical race for House control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96758125/511087374/-613562098?refcode=em-11.7.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTQwYmUwOC01YTlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eleNFcX1dntcPaQP43-i0bmuP9fMqilTRXpIRg3Cglg=)**

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: I Have Something Exciting To Share With YOU!
body:
What's Next? A little over 2 years ago, we launched Pastors For Trump with the mission and purpose of helping mobilize the largest voting bloc in Ame
| |
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9329.1.7e6439794dd212bf9e709dd0d5e8841f) |
---
## What's Next?
---
A little over 2 years ago, we launched **Pastors For Trump** with the mission and purpose of _helping mobilize_ the largest voting bloc in America. **Mission Accomplished**.
**Pastors For Trump** has served its' purpose. The question now is **"what's next?"** I want encourage you to continue to _speak boldly_ about your Biblical Values and _educate_ your congregations, ministries and networks. I am excited to share that I will be joining the team of the [National Faith Advisory Board](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9330.1.206e93df20e3ffaaedeb17e7253a0b5d) (NFAB), America's Faith Coalition, run by former **White House Senior Officials** and **Pastor Paula White-Cain** , a dear friend of mine. [NFAB](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9331.1.a66d6cb93d8604b87d9ada1b802920ce) _educates_ , _equips_ and _mobilizes_ pastors and faith leaders on the most important issues affecting our faith and churches. The core principles are as follows: **1) Protect Religious Freedom**
**2) Promote a Strong America**
**3) Defend Life at all Stages**
**4) Honor Family Values** The [NFAB](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9332.1.58b5727e02b6c29865ea3f248c28c501) holds monthly prayer calls, sends weekly emails and hosts amazing events like their **National Faith Summit** in Georgia just a couple weeks ago with **President Donald Trump**. [Check it out here](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9333.1.240986cf1b5cc0632cc23abe8aa0c5fb) I want to encourage you to join [NFAB](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9334.1.6ba763d2e49f43c6efef160966e4976b) by signing up here: [www.nationalfaithadvisoryboard.org](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9335.1.408b4ff6e21b74c527953d086a718095) You will be part of a national faith organization that gives us a meaningful voice in America’s faith policy. You **DO NOT** have to be a Pastor/Faith Leader to join [NFAB](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9336.1.5c1131d839cca6549393b9a12e0d5c72) and participate in the prayer calls or to receive updates that impact the Faith Community. If you are a Pastor/Faith Leader please consider joining the [NFAB Association of Churches](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9337.1.961e432668e7583e1e736056ea520557). The church that I pastor, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9338.1.f87a83f07a1d609352a5f34367ede5f7), has joined and you are invited to as well. We are much stronger together! Join the [NFAB Association of Churches](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9339.1.4ca7b0e852248d59c531e2dcb833b5e2) here: [https://nationalfaithadvisoryboard.org/association-of-churches/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9340.1.f357f9596e8fb8fe08713b1314ad3cc2) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Click Here To Join The National Faith Advisory Board ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9341.1.735b32705eaacf82e821e9a544e939fc)
---
---
## Eric Trump + Alina Habba
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9342.1.f29e9f5268629805016ff4fa88ad2dc2)
---
It was a _BLAST_ with [Eric Trump + Alina Habba](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9343.1.4eb75ef5f4795192b64cc828cc36cb89) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9344.1.203d500b74577880c2fc670a9ade87a3) in Tulsa, OK! We talked about EVERYTHING... literally EVERYTHING. ICYMI: watch it here - [https://youtube.com/live/7cZneWLgSe8?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9345.1.a0a2bd95993927c843fc96cc47581841) You will enjoy it! **God Bless America** Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Watch: Eric Trump + Alina Habba ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9346.1.027d28acf3d84e700059c369c843cadc)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9347.1.b32c77e309805c4e16d9ce8f5f780a3e)
---
I was a BLAST with [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9348.1.b0bfdee05b4c9e6be39c2a948872826e) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9349.1.55075946921a73f7d39bd1012d1f3466) in Tulsa, OK! We discussed everything from _assassination attempts_ on **President Trump** to different _conspiracy theories_ and everything in-between. You can watch last night's event with [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9350.1.e1f9263c7e20b7c5bd50c49f3f4bd36b) here: [https://youtube.com/live/wTh5UGzIQsY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9351.1.3dcb6f91209a3fdcf44732a923cbd46b)
---
| | [ WATCH: Donald Trump Jr @Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17040828.9352.1.5352fe26b58a2a12e06fc95945831408)
---

body:
This email will be on the longer side, but I hope you’ll take the time to read it.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241107-4499-footer&t=1&akid=4499%2E420207%2E5t__ow)
Peter,
After a devastating result in Tuesday’s presidential election, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you for all your hard work and reflect on what just happened. This email will be on the longer side, but I hope you’ll take the time to read it, because it’s important to where we go from here.
**First of all, thank you for leaving nothing on the table.** Because of you, we raised millions of dollars for Democrats in tough races and our organizing on the ground. We made more than 83,000 calls, and knocked thousands of doors. And despite a devastating loss at the top of the ticket, that work will continue to make a difference for years to come.
Here in Washington state, we became even more blue. I’m honored to have been re-elected with 85% of the votes to continue serving the Seventh Congressional District in the House, and I’m so proud that Democrats in general won just about everything that was on our ballot.
But despite our wins in Washington, this is a tough, tough, time in our country. Particularly for our friends and family who now fear for their safety, whether they are immigrants, trans, or a member of so many other marginalized communities who are relentlessly targeted by Donald Trump.
**What we know right now is this: the Democratic Party was not able to articulate to enough voters what we would do to make their lives materially better.**
It’s also clear that beating Trump won’t be as easy as saying we’ll build a diverse coalition of Black, Brown, Indigenous, young people to overcome him — because we are losing too many of that coalition too.
So part of what the Democratic Party has to decide is what do we stand for? What are our principles and how do we fight for them? How do we respond to the urgency of people’s economic concerns? What contrast do we offer to the Republican Party?
For decades, Americans have felt that the system is not working for them — both because Republicans have defunded and attacked government and because Democrats haven’t always used our power when we had it to lift them up. Many saw Donald Trump as someone who is willing to buck the system that doesn’t serve them instead of keeping it in place.
And in several Trump states, voters simultaneously went around their state governments to vote for ballot initiatives that raised the minimum wage, implemented paid sick leave, and protected abortion access.
So while I imagine we share a lot of theories about what led us here, I believe strongly that we should resist playing the blame game for now. We need to test our theories with clear data in front of us after some deep introspection and analysis. That’s the only way we can start to rebuild what has been for years an incredibly fragile coalition into something more sustainable and lasting.
**For now, as we start to look ahead, we still don’t know what will happen in the House.** We have a slim path to the majority, but if we lose it, we’ll be in full throated defensive mode. In either case, we still need to do the work to rebuild and call people back in to our coalition — and for that, we will need the movement desperately.
You will be absolutely essential to the work we need to do in the streets, in the courts, in people’s homes, and in Congress as we completely rebuild from the bottom up.
**So whatever you feel today,_don’t_ let anyone tell you that we are powerless. And don’t forget that we _know_ how to do this work.** We have experienced victory against Trump before and we will again.
Remember that it was our inside-outside movement that won against Trump in his first term — together, we forced him to stop the horrific family separations, prevented him from abolishing healthcare, and yes, pushed him out in 2020. We can do it again.
I’ll have more to say soon, but for now, take the time you need. And then come back and take your rightful place in this incredible movement filled with generous, loving, strategic, brilliant, caring people building sustained power for the poor and working class.
**You belong here, Peter. While the months and years ahead may look dark, we have the power to bring back the light together.**
In solidarity always,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241107-4499-footer&t=2&refcode2=4499_420207_5t__ow&akid=4499%2E420207%2E5t__ow)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4499%2E420207%2E5t__ow)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4499%2E420207%2E5t__ow)

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: I’m not sad. I’m not sorry. I’m pissed.
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
This isn’t the result we hoped for—not in our race, and not in the presidency.
I’m not sad. I’m not sorry. I’m pissed.
I’m fired up and ready to fight. Are you? I understand if you’re not there yet. I’ll give you a minute...but just a minute.
They want to wear us down. They want us to give up. Well, I’ll be damned if I’m going to just give up my country to a bunch of racist sexist abusers. Oh hell no!
Sorry, I do want to say, my heart is full of gratitude. I had 123,693 people vote for me. That is awesome! It wasn’t enough to win and I freakin’ hate losing more than anyone you know, trust me, that’s one reason I don’t play sports. LOL
But, that’s still a lot of people who want change. We gained 40,000 voters since the last election.
I want to thank each and every one of you who believed in me and this movement. You guys kept me going every single day. It was never about me. I have been fighting for you, the people in my district, and all of America.
We are a movement, a community bound by a shared vision for a brighter, fairer future and our work is far from over, especially now.
I have already drafted a new game plan and put it into works. I’ve already made phone calls to Democratic leaders. I am not one to sit back and wait. I know what needs to be done and I will make them listen to me. My team and I are putting things together and I’d like to hear some insights from each of you.
We made a short survey to learn how you are processing the results and how you would like to be involved going forward. These insights are so helpful in framing our future work. Will you please take 2 minutes to share your thoughts?
Here’s the first question:
How are you feeling right now?
Fired up, ready to fight [https://s.surveyplanet.com/2qmmcdmf]
Worried, need community [https://s.surveyplanet.com/2qmmcdmf]
Discouraged, ready to give up [https://s.surveyplanet.com/2qmmcdmf]
We poured our hearts into this campaign, and while the outcome wasn’t what we wanted, the strength and passion of this team have been nothing short of extraordinary.
Our fight for justice is just beginning.
Together, we’re going to take the next step toward building a movement that lasts. Please make a contribution today to help us retire our campaign, so I can focus on laying the foundation for what comes next. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241107_road_ahead_survey_link]
Thank you again, from the bottom of my heart, for your dedication, your passion, and your belief in what we can accomplish together.
Let’s take our grief, our hope, and our strength—and turn it into a force for lasting change.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

I have been fighting for you, the people in my district, and all of America. We are a movement, a community bound by a shared vision for a brighter, fairer future and our work is far from over, especially now. I have already drafted a new game plan and put it into works. I’ve already made phone calls to Democratic leaders. I am not one to sit back and wait. I know what needs to be done and I will make them listen to me. My team and I are putting things together and I’d like to hear some insights from each of you. We made a short survey to learn how you are processing the results and how you would like to be involved going forward. These insights are so helpful in framing our future work. Will you please take 2 minutes to share your thoughts? Here’s the first question: How are you feeling right now? Fired up, ready to fight [] Worried, need community [] Discouraged, ready to give up [] We poured our hearts into this campaign, and while the outcome wasn’t what we wanted, the strength and passion of this team have been nothing short of extraordinary. Our fight for justice is just beginning. Together, we’re going to take the next step toward building a movement that lasts. Please make a contribution today to help us retire our campaign, so I can focus on laying the foundation for what comes next. [] Thank you again, from the bottom of my heart, for your dedication, your passion, and your belief in what we can accomplish together. Let’s take our grief, our hope, and our strength—and turn it into a force for lasting change. Working for US, Tamie Wilson alt [] Donate to Tamie Today [] ©2024 Tamie Wilson for US, all rights reserved To contribute via check, please address to: Tamie Wilson For US 273 Saratoga St Delaware, OH 43015 United States www.tamiewilson.com [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe:

name: Steve Daines
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
We did it! We won back the Senate in a historic victory for Republicans, and it was thanks to you and your commitment to our country. So from the bottom of my heart, thank you. |
---
[]()
Fellow American, we did it! _We won back the Senate in a historic victory for Republicans, and it was thanks to you and your commitment to our country._ So from the bottom of my heart, _**thank you.**_

Your generous support to our rockstar class of candidates did not go unnoticed, _and we delivered a strong, conservative win to enact President Trump’s winning agenda._

Your contributions made a tremendous difference, helping us connect with voters, spread our message, and make this victory possible.

We couldn’t have done it without you. Your commitment and belief in our vision have been inspiring, and we’re incredibly grateful to have you as a partner in this journey.

As we move forward, we’ll continue to work hard to honor the trust and support you’ve shown us.

Thank you again for standing with us as we work to **Make America Great Again!**

Gratefully,

[]()

Steve Daines

Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. [_**Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!**_]()

**Senator Steve Daines

** [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=180ea659d96b49c2a9ef642706876030&_e=QzJpoIDXCplAUEQHpB4E1tj7mazpIj3d0oCZxM2mWv2qXEACl-zG4IhVGIjgltLN2_yCK1SHLaLpoiIZK8Yign7xQib0H2pJ7qnOz0ETonnaN-54lmXN0okNYoJABLizwRzJzrLvKlmVUhNO6ZSGYBic1Em4i_bIh02FRbyCzSp2d3vPE6Qp_xZItwoUPf5nk7KemSwJVrog2FMs_t0eOyEpZuVnz0g9G4zmIT0IWm4%3D) [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=180ea659d96b49c2a9ef642706876030&_e=QzJpoIDXCplAUEQHpB4E1gfvXmiQP1cIKaQWB-xwud8Bl3F09WIcX3U_ZFeA9bjOpYyWSYF4JeCF18GHdOvi5BTNvTTu0DR57mf3-yv769NcZlcGHxrAGCA-pz-4pM15XZnnlWbz_tKnE4V1YUW-wkhnWRuB47o4SQvS_-QoN7cGdrM73ZLNeqFKCGV5yANkuBB_3bzvVpKq2Q6BRgtXrQ%3D%3D)

name: Lindsey Williams Drath
subject: Forward Volunteers showed up to work in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Read about how Forward members helped to build our movement

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_days_after&n=1)
---
Thursday, November 07, 2024 | Dear Forward Party Supporters, _Why do you think you will be successful when other efforts to launch a new political party have failed?_ We face this question daily. A key reason is that we are students of those failed attempts. A key learning is that efforts that started at the top of the ticket - with the Presidential race - failed. They collapsed under their own weight. Campaigns constructed around a cult of personality don’t last. One of the primary reasons that Forward didn’t run someone for president in 2024 is that we don’t have the infrastructure built out to run a successful campaign...yet. We are focused on building out the infrastructure to support a new political movement and its candidates up and down the ballot from the ground up. So while we recognize the importance of high profile races across the country, our focus in 2024 was on down-ballot races so that we could build out the party and support infrastructure that will grow each cycle until we are able to compete fully against the legacy parties. You showed up to do the work!
### **Volunteer Work**
2024 is the first election cycle where we made a concerted effort to support a wide variety of candidates across the nation. Through the efforts of state leadership teams and our national candidate team, we were able to identify 125+ candidates to receive our endorsement! While our state parties across the country engaged in volunteer efforts for these candidates, we also established a national volunteer program to get the word out, and then get the vote out for them! _Thanks for all your help and encouragement. It's been awesome to feel the support of the Forward team in these last weeks of the campaign!_ -Madison Granger, Arlington County Board candidate Across Utah, Pennsylvania, Minnesota, Colorado, Massachusetts, Kentucky, Nevada, Virginia, South Carolina, North Carolina, and New Jersey, hundreds of thousands of voters heard about Forward endorsed candidates. 56 volunteers stepped up to send out over **264,000 messages** about these candidates across 10 text bank parties. **258,000 voters were contacted** , and over 29,000 of them engaged in a conversation with our volunteers. We’re going to give a special shout-out to Top 5 Volunteers:
* Chris Hessler, with 13,000 messages sent
* Dawn Guendert, with 13,000 messages sent
* Wendy Petry, with 14,000 messages sent
* Ben Valimont, with 36,000 messages sent
* And Jeanne Sole, with a ridiculous 49,000 messages sent

These are truly heroic numbers, and our candidates thank them (and everyone else who chipped in) for their support! As one voter put it: _“Interesting. Thanks for reaching out. This might be the only worthwhile political text message I’ve received this cycle."
_
### **State Party Growth**
2024 was an exciting year for the growth of our state parties. Some highlights:
* **Utah**
After receiving minor party status, the Utah team identified 19 candidates to support. 4 of them are running on the Forward line, including former state lead Miles Pomeroy. Miles ran for state treasurer to maintain the minor party status; a goal that he achieved with room to spare.

The Utah team also supported candidates from the allied United Utah Party, a minor party in the state that shares many values with us. Along with the national organization, the team also propelled John Curtis to a Senate seat.

* **Pennsylvania**
In order to achieve a level of party recognition that will allow them to start registering voters, the Pennsylvania team recruited two statewide candidates: Eric Settle for Attorney General, and Chris Foster for State Treasurer.

The press coverage on these candidates was extensive, with one paper referring to Settle as at least as qualified, if not moreso, than his legacy party opponents. While the two did not hit the threshold to gain party status for Forward in PA, they did manage to receive votes in every county of the Keystone State.

* **Washington**
Our reverse coattails strategy was in full effect in Washington state, supporting a “slate” in Challam and Yakima Counties to drive votes for our top-of-ballot candidates. In Challam County, Phyllis Bernard was re-elected for PUD Commissioner; in Yakima County, Kyle Curtis was re-elected as County Commissioner.

We supported Judge Dave Larson in his bid for Supreme Court. This is his third time running, and despite losing two earlier contests, he is currently leading in a very tight race. He carried both Yakima and Challam counties. We’re excited to see him clinch victory, as he is a strong believer in teaching people about our democracy and ensuring that the rule of law is strictly upheld.

These aren’t all the stories out there, either! Nevada received their party designation and can register people for their party. The State Party team held 15 training sessions, getting the state leadership teams in a better position to organize members and support candidates. **180+ new state leads** were identified in 29 states, expanding our map for future cycles. In short, 2024 was truly a year where you, our state leads, membership, and volunteers, stepped up in a real way. We’re all in this together, building a movement and delivering a better way to approach politics for the majority of Americans who are sick of feeling unheard. In the wake of the 2024 election, we know that many of you are feeling anger, or despair, or any number of other negative emotions. But, in '24 you all showed up to do the work. Let's keep that energy next year and grow the party even more. **We can only imagine what this group will manage to accomplish in 2025!** Best, Lindsey Williams Drath Forward Party CEO
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_days_after&n=2) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_days_after&n=3) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_days_after&n=4) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_days_after&n=5) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_days_after&n=6) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is:
1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Jacky’s team is hustling to make sure every vote is counted fairly, but her campaign just let me know they’re seriously behind their emergency fundraising goal – and they might have to STOP their operation if she can’t catch up.
**We’re letting Nevada slip through our fingers, and I need you to LOCK. IN. RIGHT. We have a path to victory, but it’ll take every last one of us getting off of our you-know-whats and taking action TODAY. **That means we cannot get complacent, or this sh*tshow will become a total CLUSTERF* &K.**

name: Jeremy Shaffer
subject: Thank You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jeremy Shaffer
body:
| | | | |
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3b71915cc519/im-running-and-i-need-your-support-12717412?e=8c80cba7e7)
---
| | | | | Dear ,
We began our campaign nearly a year ago, and on Tuesday, we brought home a resounding victory for the citizens of District 28! So many of you stepped up and helped us along the way to make this win possible. Thank you to all of you who donated generously.

---
| We ran a 100% positive campaign, focusing all of our time and resources on engaging voters to better understand their concerns and to present real solutions to make Pennsylvania an even better place. Those in and around the PA-28 know that we were faced with an onslaught of negative ads on TV, mailboxes, and digital. While we outspent $730K to $290K (that’s a 2.5 to 1 ratio), our 150+ volunteers stepped up to make the difference. Our tremendous ground game included collecting signatures in the cold of January to get our campaign on the ballot, handwriting postcards and envelopes, knocking doors, waving signs, talking with neighbors, and standing outside polling places for 13 hours. I could not have done this without you! I am so very proud of our amazing team!
While the race ended last night, the most important tasks now begin. We need to work together to build up our state and region to be even better places where we can all thrive. I know Western PA is one of the best places in the country to live and raise a family. We have the world’s best workforce, first-class educational and cultural institutions, hospitals second to none, natural resources all around us and below us, and outdoor activities that abound in every season. We should be one of the fastest growing regions in the U.S., yet high taxes and burdensome regulations drive people and jobs away. The work starts today to change that. I will hold firm to our values while working with Republicans and Democrats in the legislature and administration on solutions to help grow Pennsylvania and continue to improve our region.
Finally, as an engineer, I am a numbers person. For those of you who love the numbers as much as me, let me share some with you. First, with all mail-in and in-person votes counted, we won 57.06% to 42.84% (23,037 to 17,295 votes)!
Here are some more great numbers for you:
● 700+ signatures to get on the ballot ● 50,000+ handwritten postcards and hand addressed, stuffed, sealed envelopes sent● 18,000+ doors knocked● 50+ events attended across PA-28● Over 150 volunteers engaged to bring this victory home!
Once again, our focused strategy on presenting clear solutions and connecting with every resident in PA-28 to understand their concerns and priorities coupled with our amazing volunteers delivered our outstanding results on November 5th!Thank you again! I could not have done this without you!
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| Jeremy Shaffer
---
| |
---
|

---
|
---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: We need to make sure every last vote gets counted
body:
We can’t afford to lose another Senate seat.
---
Here's where things stand, Derek: **Nevada’s Senate race is not over yet -- which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.** We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to push through their destructive agenda -- including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: [**Please, will you split $20 now -- or whatever you can spare -- between my campaign and the Democratic National Committee to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-jr-split-nov-2024?refcode=em_20241107_2310_fr&amount=20&refcode2=2313_22930333_DHQIIB&akid=2313%2E22930333%2EDHQIIB) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Jacky Rosen and the Democratic National Committee instantly._ **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-jr-split-nov-2024?refcode=em_20241107_2310_fr&express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode2=2313_22930333_DHQIIB&akid=2313%2E22930333%2EDHQIIB)** We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day -- because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But now, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. The stakes are higher than ever -- we absolutely need to reach this goal to win. body:
We are proud to announce our alums who ran for Congress won big on Election Day!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96759206/511091466/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMzIzY2E2LTVlOWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=63evJWPuN1pRsERZ7rBauexbWuYlq7FlA9MMo5lhq58=)
---
| Peter,

Despite VP Harris’ heartbreaking loss, Emerge women shine through. We are proud to announce our alums who ran for Congress won big on Election Day!

Congratulations to our Congressional candidates Yassamin Ansari (AZ-03), Dr. Maxine Dexter (OR-03), and Sarah Elfreth (MD-03) for their victories and for expanding the Democratic bench in the House! This means there will now be 10 women in the Emerge Congressional Caucus with two races left to call.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96759207/511091467/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMzIzY2E2LTVlOWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=63evJWPuN1pRsERZ7rBauexbWuYlq7FlA9MMo5lhq58=)
This is what Emerge does with our collective strength – we train women to run for the right districts at the right time and win. You are a crucial part of supporting Democratic women who are committed to delivering progress.

We’re so proud that with your support, Emerge alums Yassamin Ansari, Dr. Maxine Dexter, and Sarah Elfreth will join a new generation of leadership in Congress and look forward to adding Janelle Bynum and Lateefah Simon to that list when their races are called over the next few days. This is major progress for our movement to transform politics and to elect leaders who put people first and defend our rights. None of these victories would be possible without you. Thank you for your incredible support.

But our work here doesn’t end. Now, we’re gearing up to ramp up recruitment efforts to train a new class of bold Democratic women to build a firewall against MAGA Republicans in 2025 and beyond. [_**Will you contribute $10 or more today to celebrate our Congressional victories and help us kick off recruitment season?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96759208/511091468/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-11-07_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzMzIzY2E2LTVlOWQtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=63evJWPuN1pRsERZ7rBauexbWuYlq7FlA9MMo5lhq58=)

subject: Kamala Harris Made One Phone Call to Donald Trump That She Instantly Regretted
body:
| | | |

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: We're headed to a recount…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We won't stop until every vote is counted.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2198%2E135344%2EUfWfgZ)

Team,
I know many of us are still processing the results of Tuesday's election and what it means for our district and our nation. Donald Trump's victory presents challenges we must now confront together, and we'll need a strong presence in the People's House of Representatives to find the Big Middle, breaking down partisan divides.
Results are still coming in, and it looks like our race may result in a recount despite our small lead. That's why we must do everything we can to win the House or limit the GOP majority - that means holding the line in OH-09.
Team, I need your support to fund our recount efforts and help us get over the finish line. Can I count on you right now? **
**Here's the link to split a contribution between Elissa Slotkin and our recount efforts:****[https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/Slotkin-Kaptur](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-kaptur-nov24.ptEIqT&refcode=em241107-2-15&t=2&akid=2198%2E135344%2EUfWfgZ)**
Thank you so much.
— Marcy

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2198%2E135344%2EUfWfgZ).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=2198%2E135344%2EUfWfgZ)

****[**_I’m reaching out now because Jacky needs to see a major surge of resources to finish this race strong and keep her seat blue. I know we didn’t get all of the results we wanted on Election Night, but that‘s why it’s even more important to ensure that we defend Jacky Rosen’s critical Senate seat.
Jacky’s dangerous MAGA opponent, Sam Brown, will be a rubber stamp for President-elect Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda, including a national abortion ban and pushing through the extreme, far-right Project 2025 agenda. Securing Jacky’s seat means that Democratic Senators will have a check on Donald Trump and the new Republican Senate Majority.
Just like my race in 2022, this race is coming down to the wire. And believe me when I say that there is still lots of work to be done to guarantee that every vote is counted – and that they’re counted fairly.
The truth is, that work is expensive. And Jacky urgently needs our help so she can keep her campaign running. Republicans spent nearly $80 million against Jacky to defeat her this year, so her campaign drained their resources to get her to Election Day. Now, she’s relying on us to step up so she can keep her ground game going strong and count every last vote.
[**_Time is running out, and the stakes are higher than ever. So I’m humbly asking you to split a donation to Jacky Rosen’s absolutely CRITICAL Senate race and NV Dems so we can get ballots counted and secure her seat._**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtEEjhuOfSZtU0xhsJqEpvPCvEPhzQ3eFVNrKyq9t1o0LNZs2v33T2luyDVS3heY8TqoM3LKohGkerYhkHQJGGWSrMmCuKyIGiWoeN63U1WW89CcuhyGdKdD4yQBVQB9enpwunmshAcLq6u3tA-ovkHwx9KsihJlmCENEvf3vJtTDgpa4JWoh3-KWwDJn-cyeLZ-L_NED2_qtimOy3c9NT4LYZ81VlYCKzOwWKJR3FzqmqtwcXXVUrg29FK94RBGiANHJ6KKPhAxQdqNhw0hrZ5UhRXrGujvzyesT9nTJcPKfymkRjt78rY6W0ZeDGED7V-DF9NCwI79N18yhaozq8monnzzoHsXvBtnXdLkKfMiCLW7xrRZ2u2G3gx6ybhL-_iLMbwxawIU8DXjbykCWSl/4b9/6pUF_LqcT8W8cmFhsxTJJQ/h3/h001.iaekTiI4kqcxQwuFVBKSeUQWNcrNETUBPTDCfz07qag)

clean_body: | | | | Folks: Our work in Nevada isn’t done. Jacky Rosen’s race is still ongoing and thousands of ballots are still being counted. **** I know we didn’t get all of the results we wanted on Election Night, but that‘s why it’s even more important to ensure that we defend Jacky Rosen’s critical Senate seat. Jacky’s dangerous MAGA opponent, Sam Brown, will be a rubber stamp for President-elect Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda, including a national abortion ban and pushing through the extreme, far-right Project 2025 agenda. Securing Jacky’s seat means that Democratic Senators will have a check on Donald Trump and the new Republican Senate Majority. Just like my race in 2022, this race is coming down to the wire. And believe me when I say that there is still lots of work to be done to guarantee that every vote is counted – and that they’re counted fairly. The truth is, that work is expensive. And Jacky urgently needs our help so she can keep her campaign running. Republicans spent nearly $80 million against Jacky to defeat her this year, so her campaign drained their resources to get her to Election Day. Now, she’s relying on us to step up so she can keep her ground game going strong and count every last vote. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Catherine Cortez Masto The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

clean_body: ...it’s needed now more than ever It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Reader,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

name: AOC
subject: It's time to know our neighbor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The assignment we have ahead of us.
#
I’m not here to sugarcoat what we all are about to collectively experience.
But I think what we can do to prepare is build community. We do not have a choice.
Our choice is to build. Our choice to continue to fight. Our choice is to win. **Our choice is to have each other**.
We are about to enter a political period that will have consequences for the rest of our lives.
**Our main project is to unite the working class in this country against a fascist agenda. Period.**
Believe it or not, building community — whether it's your church, mosque, a knitting group, your dinner circle — is far more transformative than you realize.
If you don’t know your neighbor, it’s time to know your neighbor**.
If you have a co-worker you think you’re cool with, it’s time to get to know that person**.
It’s time to get to know the people we will be relying on to protect each other.
It may seem frivolous, but I guarantee you it’s not: **creating community around you is one of the most powerful and radical things you can do in an environment like this**.
Sometimes even just being in community with people who are not like-minded with you — is a very odd little thing that can help change their mind.
We have no choice but to live in the times that we live in, and to make it better one day at a time, one choice at a time.
**Never, ever think that any choice or act of yours is too small. It isn't.**
Regimes and autocracies are taken down by millions of drops of small actions that would otherwise be invisible by masses of people.
This is the assignment that we have ahead of us. I look forward to doing this work with you all.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
