name: Andy Kim
subject: This is how we move forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96759280/511091803/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjgxYjNmMy01ZjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wW-_XdST40TSqiLVeHkUG4wZp5AVbe-4jmht3v_ycis=&emci=ca81b3f3-5f9d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=cb81b3f3-5f9d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=26261389)
---

| | In 2020, I was one of 7 Democrats who won a district that Trump won, so I held a series of listening sessions with people who voted for Trump and voted for me to understand their actions. **I reread the transcripts yesterday, and much of it felt like it could have been said today.** Across the board, the conversations began with expressions of what I can only describe as deep disgust in politics. Severe distrust in politicians and the status quo. And this wasn't about the specifics of the moment, but instead deep-seated long-term dissatisfaction. Even after 4 years in office, Trump wasn't seen as the status quo or as a "politician." There was a clear belief that Trump was different. Some raised real concerns about Trump's policies and personality, but those concerns didn't override their disgust for politics. The perception that he was different and also taking on the status quo boosted him. In other words, the deep existing distrust in politics and governance gave oxygen to Trump's strength. But for these voters, they also saw me as "different." What stood out to me is that their comments presented an opening for a different way to be different. **Trump's playbook isn't the only way.** For instance, the 2020 crossover voters resonated with my heavy focus on reform and taking on corruption. They liked that I don't accept corporate PAC funding as they see special interests as a major corrupting force in politics that drowns out the voice of regular people. **I learned never to underestimate the extent to which people distrust and despise politics, especially those who do not engage regularly.** **There were other issues that they raised, but the main point I wanted to convey is that the hinge was on what it means to be "different." Not about being just different from Trump, but different from the same old same old entrenched politics that people are wholly angry at.** I'm sure this reflection on 4 years ago isn't perfect for this moment, but it speaks to the need to immediately dive in and assess rather than shoot from the hip. I do not have an easy answer to what went wrong because none exists, but nuance and humility are important. **There is too much hubris in our politics.** Too many people who think they have all the answers. Let's go out and have deep and thoughtful conversations with people. Listen to them. And then earnestly work to address their concerns and rebuild trust. We do that while we seriously think through what it means to be "different." To show that our defense of democracy and our institutions doesn't mean we defend what is clearly a broken politics that has contributed to the greatest amount of inequality in our nation's history. We're on an unsustainable trajectory as a nation if we don't address this distrust. **On election night, I said, "I believe the opposite of democracy is apathy." I still believe we can heal the country and restore trust and integrity to public service. Let's get to work.** Onward, _Andy_ [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96759281/511091804/-1197072038?refcode=2024-11-07-election&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=cb81b3f3-5f9d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjgxYjNmMy01ZjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wW-_XdST40TSqiLVeHkUG4wZp5AVbe-4jmht3v_ycis=) |
---|---|---

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Your participation is key
body:
The White House and leftists in Congress have deliberately created a crisis at our southern border.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=1f908e14f8634fa48579bdc4ba0acfa9&_t=ttyLyHGKUtP8u7fG5CXO0_ckqw7W2eYM2p6IG0T1SoKgj8afAlhjXpR42A-GCfN0olNxm5YDFIE0THv7zbhOJ0GeLzkoXRgBbYtxQlpjn2mGUOi9N_dCI3zrU1LXNAAJ)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=1f908e14f8634fa48579bdc4ba0acfa9&_e=jYfAE7yApmDYG-Mw3jXJVD_4pu27oTL50Y2th2hyMYXy4-bfrKKexzWrBpfM8BZ23Zg1Y3QAVAF-sY5Unf0_xmOYNJ-Iv0r8tuRbBNEvtnDyc9r662jl8OJDkKLebX_Otwjq5rZIfTHMChSrV59omvLIp3ltBsKBX4PCdlu9Zo4VYlDPMsQMFgJhPrhfoifto8oPywcpK1GiC8d-2drrtc-T3g1XLY2-jKiFuWEbDRgBHEfmKe7j8CeDei5e1w7X59V2BjYlRsRes01sRVDYOPKqA_f2ymcCXkbMWbjXXFKRH7ZR8sD6o3ytmdwYaFjaE7Mbqvhlr6qMXozopmZ-4_kSp_2KeXnMQTk7Kv44inUZz4GXJl_2PCREBu6h7Pr9)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

The White House and leftists in Congress have deliberately created a crisis at our southern border. They want people to come into our country illegally. _In fact, they encourage it._

Having millions of illegal immigrants in our country radically increases the potential for voter fraud and undermines the integrity of our elections.

Patriotic Americans need to make their voices heard about this crucial issue.

**That 's why I'm inviting you to complete The Heritage Foundation's [Survey on Illegal Immigrants Voting in U.S. Elections](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=1f908e14f8634fa48579bdc4ba0acfa9&_e=jYfAE7yApmDYG-Mw3jXJVD_4pu27oTL50Y2th2hyMYXy4-bfrKKexzWrBpfM8BZ23Zg1Y3QAVAF-sY5Unf0_xmOYNJ-Iv0r8tuRbBNEvtnDyc9r662jl8OJDkKLebX_Otwjq5rZIfTHMChSrV59omvLIp3ltBsKBX4PCdlu9Zo4VYlDPMsQMFgJhPrhfoifto8oPywcpK1GiC8d-2drrtc-T3g1XLY2-jKiFuWEbDRjaQAP9htBaC6bHvHM5IZqocklt0ozQCbg6i_SVOqWa8CS0uuD1TZoCVs_oX6uF7uaEfVhw3sdgO6qMOMiJMh3DyFPcrxFI1FjjtqGpkwRnwNlW6WBTjc8pGMNXPUTq_5RchL9rDdjgvrpBZ_TkZp5w).**

Your responses will help my team educate policymakers, news outlets, and the public about the dangers of illegal immigrants voting in our elections.

**You can complete your survey using the secure link below.**

name: Lila Rose
subject: These diaper brands are pro-abortion
body:
Did you know that America’s most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion?

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=c147d98b8e4a45b3b18491d322ae1958&_t=cnEEOffMQQfgEf_-5Nyd_vXV34ZQg-XNg7db3zTQht6ZZ5cJVCcw-RriwDmNZy34VnjoeC69Z8YAqNXrhC_FQsHCZ0BRQAo9_39GLGmgfBmxWJrs4CRnVoy-mOZO7AqX)_

[ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c147d98b8e4a45b3b18491d322ae1958&_e=runHATZaArZGxMeCFxSf9BVGffHhfkVipw9jhnEtsdn3b50reWppHK6jYG910MUdQXempzuojGWV7RpPZRJ0ez-Mv42AzEzWrO2ZjCaTucY-6tgGj-ncMtTqCE6EfQX4Mj-qXud4-LNpkQw79RG1RWa14GQAQJ9gJnrciz1aKTU3mJDL-fpJhmTCGXNBPkD7yAJX9IJbYxeO6AlXyIV7OC1HsArXWhl4PZjRdIYSKj9bOMYQltOjJdrB1J-x4Hd123gbEz2Y4r2JHu7c-TOSMGhtdxWHd97MITh_RD5KN0yYoMK_VWSE6t-Hjfh-3koGl2NrXuuD2oIVNvISxyu0w2JQhx0aT5uwdi6wqh1l_sbjRZrzM2bkQL6brl7yFxujJnu6fwFdJ4QVqmK1jgpwiA%3D%3D)
#
Friend of Life,

Did you know that America's most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion?

This is peak irony. Brands that provide a necessity for babies also financially and/or publicly support an act that intentionally kills innocent children in the womb.

As pro-life people, we can do something to put a stop to this.

**Live Action is hosting a diaper drive with EveryLife -- the first pro-life diaper company -- to help mothers and their babies in need.**

If you're tired of supporting brands that don't align with your pro-life values, you can do something now to help women AND support a pro-life business.

**Your gift of just $50 will provide six packs of EveryLife diapers to a mom who is considering abortion or is facing a crisis and help her embrace life. Our goal is to provide 34 boxes of diapers to every state.**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c147d98b8e4a45b3b18491d322ae1958&_e=runHATZaArZGxMeCFxSf9BVGffHhfkVipw9jhnEtsdn3b50reWppHK6jYG910MUdQXempzuojGWV7RpPZRJ0ez-Mv42AzEzWrO2ZjCaTucY-6tgGj-ncMtTqCE6EfQX4Mj-qXud4-LNpkQw79RG1RWa14GQAQJ9gJnrciz1aKTU3mJDL-fpJhmTCGXNBPkD7yAJX9IJbYxeO6AlXyIV7OC1HsArXWhl4PZjRdIYSKj_VzMepSF3eoSDojn9ZPG7M603zTpM8H7UPtboZiMX--fnl0tbnfLl46IlrSpIPbp7xqFpY24OLOhqWIzWKyqcGpWKZTBBFSt7fRNpwZu1b1CY2PJie5inK5VPvWOhE1tL3Uoak1z8JkbOnh4Zwiq_IcPGMyoDNDc-G0Hq25JzgHA%3D%3D)
Is this something you can do? Here's your secure link to give: **[https://give.liveaction.org/send-a-box-of-diapers-to-a-mom-in-need/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c147d98b8e4a45b3b18491d322ae1958&_e=runHATZaArZGxMeCFxSf9BVGffHhfkVipw9jhnEtsdn3b50reWppHK6jYG910MUdQXempzuojGWV7RpPZRJ0ez-Mv42AzEzWrO2ZjCaTucY-6tgGj-ncMtTqCE6EfQX4Mj-qXud4-LNpkQw79RG1RWa14GQAQJ9gJnrciz1aKTU3mJDL-fpJhmTCGXNBPkD7yAJX9IJbYxeO6AlXyIV7OC1HsArXWhl4PZjRdIYSKj_AQKyS0Bg4wblHmruaI91jnp2PV7p7wQDeYc5oRRTtmSEROn1XAPfsS8XO5Pgoy5D_SxosGezefIbIoVKK6peGyBxR5Ewg47MeOlW06melLvWS3uUF0XnW8zjYdm_0Z8oTf4zlHLgEVk2FvPPoFCx7k6avirq0r3MFt00QmfrDDw%3D%3D)**

EveryLife prides itself in being a pro-life company that uses premium materials for their diapers-- and better yet, EveryLife promotes the message that every baby is a miracle from God who deserves to be loved, protected, and supported.

Your gift will send a box of diapers to a local pro-life pregnancy clinic so that moms days away from a potentially life-ending decision can receive the practical support they need to choose life.

Thank you in advance for standing with us against big abortion and equipping moms to choose life.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=c147d98b8e4a45b3b18491d322ae1958&_e=runHATZaArZGxMeCFxSf9BVGffHhfkVipw9jhnEtsdn3b50reWppHK6jYG910MUdQXempzuojGWV7RpPZRJ0ez-Mv42AzEzWrO2ZjCaTucY-6tgGj-ncMtTqCE6EfQX4Mj-qXud4-LNpkQw79RG1RWa14GQAQJ9gJnrciz1aKTU3mJDL-fpJhmTCGXNBPkD7yAJX9IJbYxeO6AlXyIV7OC1HsArXWhl4PZjRdIYSKj92PI4Mw8txUENJ--4M1OnWHMySopoUqgBg40ev6PtPgWrYToxnAfMh-zkDz2TiBcwt6dnzUpDhKlXsSYO4D3XGQMz-EKylq-i9sIfVzg1Dyo2XzuljHUOTD6iwiWr_cmokr6HES033bejUb6QJWqUCkqpJiv3rsLmRrZhE2JljVQ%3D%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

body:
The fight for control of the House isn’t over yet. There are a number of tight races right here in California that will determine the majority. And I’m here to see it through.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96759401/511092303/-1667771354?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2024-11-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGRmODI1NC02MDlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kXRCfXnPpCVMmnXYhovbd3PGKW3RG26J05vrrkgApmw=)
---
| Hey Peter,

I know we’re all still processing the results of the election, but I wanted to reach out to express my gratitude. I'm so proud of the dedicated team we've built, and I’m thankful for all we accomplished together.

As the chair of BOLD PAC, I’m proud of the work we’ve done to secure victories for pro-choice Latinos across the county. So, thank you for sticking with this campaign and for standing up for what's right. We might not have achieved every outcome we hoped for, but our work and our voices mattered.

_**The fight for control of the House isn’t over yet.**_ There are a number of tight races right here in California that will determine the majority. And I’m here to see it through.

I’m not backing down on the fight for the working class, equal opportunities, and our communities’ rights. I hope you’ll stay in this fight with me—because together, we’re so much stronger. With so much at stake, we need every single person on board.

Onwards,

Linda
---

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support? = Nancy Pelosi is counting on you. clean_body: | Peter, We fought like our lives depended on it for the past year here in State 48, it's imperative you don't listen to the biased mainstream media and keep fighting. This election is NOT over. Kari Lake WILL BE Arizona's next U.S. Senator — you can take that to the bank. What we can do to help Kari right now is make sure every single LEGAL ballot is counted. This race will be close. The last major election in Arizona was decided by just a few thousand votes. What we do in the next 24 hours could decide not only Arizona's next U.S. Senator but also the fate of the entire country. | Thank you, Lake Campaign HQ Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, .

Team — Like many of you, I’m still wrapping my mind around Tuesday’s results. We still have quite a few races up and down the ballot that are too close to call, so we have to make sure that every ballot cast is counted in the results. name: MGP
subject: This is democracy at work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marie for Congress
body:
| | Peter, I’m sure we’re all experiencing serious post-election fatigue, but here in WA-03 it’s not over just yet.

I wanted to give you a quick update on our progress: Currently, we’re leading Joe Kent. These results are encouraging, but we expect the margin to tighten even more as the count continues.

This is democracy at work, Peter. It takes time, but it’s worth it to uphold and protect the will of the voters.

We’re still fighting to make sure every last ballot is counted, and we could really use your support in that fight. You’ve been such an important part of this team, and we couldn’t have gotten to this point without you – now, we just need to give this final stretch our all.

[Peter, will you donate $10 to our Campaign Defense Fund to help us take this to the finish line?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96759581/511093034/1892105723?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_241107_2_4&refcode2=3f9a1c8e-629d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjlhMWM4ZS02MjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YWHkk5BG4Iw10mECjixs2jNZ9NxXA240OMfRzfFlj0s=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96759582/511093035/1892105723?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_241107_2_4&refcode2=3f9a1c8e-629d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjlhMWM4ZS02MjlkLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YWHkk5BG4Iw10mECjixs2jNZ9NxXA240OMfRzfFlj0s=)**

**Peter, if this lead holds, rest assured that I remain committed to being an independent voice for Southwest Washington in Congress.**

I’m ready to get right back to fighting for you – from bringing back manufacturing and creating local jobs, lowering costs for working families, repairing our vital infrastructure, and defending our democracy and our freedoms, including the freedom of women to make their own health care decisions.

clean_body: | | Peter, I’m sure we’re all experiencing serious post-election fatigue, but here in WA-03 it’s not over just yet. I wanted to give you a quick update on our progress: Currently, we’re leading Joe Kent. These results are encouraging, but we expect the margin to tighten even more as the count continues. This is democracy at work, Peter. It takes time, but it’s worth it to uphold and protect the will of the voters. We’re still fighting to make sure every last ballot is counted, and we could really use your support in that fight. You’ve been such an important part of this team, and we couldn’t have gotten to this point without you – now, we just need to give this final stretch our all. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Peter, if this lead holds, rest assured that I remain committed to being an independent voice for Southwest Washington in Congress.
